  Huang Haihua said that the second draft of the bill specifically added a chapter on "development promotion" and improved relevant clauses: adding provisions that the state will improve the civil aviation manufacturing industry innovation system with enterprises as the main body, market-oriented, and combining production, education and research; the state will improve the civil aircraft airworthiness certification organization system and standard specifications, and strengthen the training of airworthiness certification talents.

  The second draft of the bill also stipulates that the layout of civil airports should be improved and the construction of civil aviation hubs should be accelerated; the state should take measures to optimize the allocation of low-altitude airspace resources, promote the construction of a civil low-altitude flight-related service supervision platform, establish and improve airworthiness certification, flight management and other systems and standards that meet the requirements of low-altitude economic development, expand the application service field, and promote the development of the low-altitude economy.

  Currently, issues such as the format terms of ticket sales and flight delay and cancellation handling services of civil aviation companies are receiving more and more attention and discussion from consumers.

  Regarding the protection of passengers' rights, Huang Haihua introduced that the second draft of the bill adds "passenger ticket sales, refunds and changes, boarding, and luggage transportation" to the contents that should be included in the format clauses such as the general conditions of transportation, further protecting the passengers' right to know and right to choose. It is clear that when a flight is delayed or cancelled, public air transport enterprises and transport airport operators should make "food and accommodation" arrangements for passengers to effectively safeguard the legitimate rights and interests of passengers.

  The second draft of the Anti-Unfair Competition Law Amendment improves the relevant provisions on unfair competition on the Internet

  The revised draft of the Anti-Unfair Competition Law has entered its second reading. The second draft of the bill further improves the provisions on unfair competition on the Internet in light of new circumstances and characteristics of competition in the Internet field.

  According to reports, the main revisions to the second draft of the bill include: adding provisions on the fair competition review system, revising and improving the provisions on the governance of "involutionary" competition on the platform; revising and improving the relevant provisions of the anti-unfair competition coordination mechanism, clarifying the anti-unfair competition responsibilities of market supervision departments; and improving the obligations of platform operators to deal with unfair competition behaviors of operators within the platform.

  Huang Haihua introduced that the second draft of the bill further clarified the standards for behaviors such as using other people's trademarks as business names and setting other people's product names and company names as search keywords, which constitute confusing unfair competition; clarified the constituent elements of unfair competition such as infringement of data rights and interests and malicious transactions; focused on solving the problem of large enterprises and other operators abusing their relatively advantageous position to default on payments to small and medium-sized enterprises, and raised the level of administrative penalty agencies.

  In addition, the press conference also introduced the draft law on response to public health emergencies, the draft revision of the Maritime Law, the draft revision of the Fisheries Law, the draft law on legal publicity and education, the draft revision of the Prison Law and other related matters.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The phrase "看点前瞻" (kàndiǎn qiánzhān) in the title, translated as "Highlights", could be more precisely rendered as "Preview of Key Issues" or "Outlook on Salient Points" to better convey the forward-looking and analytical nature implied by "前瞻" (qiánzhān).
2. In the second paragraph, "法律案相关情况" (fǎlǜ àn xiāngguān qíngkuàng), translated as "the relevant situation of the legislative bills", could be more formally translated as "details concerning the legislative bills" or "information regarding the legislative proposals" for greater precision in a legal context.
3. The phrase "经研究予以采纳" (jīng yánjiū yǔyǐ cǎinà) translated as "were adopted after research" could be refined to "were adopted after due consideration" or "were adopted following review" to better reflect the formal process implied.
4. The term "有针对性地加大惩处力度" (yǒu zhēnduìxìng de jiādà chéngchǔ lìdù), translated as "increased the intensity of punishment in a targeted manner", could be more idiomatically phrased as "punitiveness was enhanced in a targeted way" or "penalties were specifically strengthened".
5. The phrase "情节严重、影响恶劣的" (qíngjié yánzhòng, yǐngxiǎng èliè de), translated as "the circumstances are serious and the impact is bad", understates "影响恶劣". A more accurate rendition would be "circumstances are serious and the adverse impact is egregious/pernicious".
6. The phrase "当场扣押应当全程同步录音录像" (dāngchǎng kòuyā yīngdāng quánchéng tóngbù lùyīn lùxiàng), translated as "on-the-spot seizures should be recorded simultaneously in audio and video", could be more specific: "on-the-spot seizures must be subject to continuous, synchronized audio and video recording throughout the process" to capture "全程同步".
7. The original phrase "对治安违法记录封存作出规定等" ends with "等" (děng), implying 'and so on' or 'among other things'. The translation "and making provisions for the sealing of records of public security violations" omits this, suggesting an exhaustive list. It could be "...violations, among other provisions."
8. The phrase "民用航空法修订草案此次会议迎来二次审议" (mínyòng hángkōng fǎ xiūdìng cǎo'àn cǐcì huìyì yínglái èrcì shěnyì), translated as "underwent a second review at this meeting", would be more accurate as "is scheduled for its second review at this meeting" or "will have its second reading during this session", given "迎来" (yínglái) implies an upcoming event in the context of a preview.
9. The term "产学研相结合" (chǎnxuéyán xiāng jiéhé), translated as "combining production, education and research", is common but "combining industry, academia, and research" or "industry-academia-research collaboration" is a more standard and precise term for "产学研".
10. The term "标准规范" (biāozhǔn guīfàn) within "民用航空器适航审定组织体系和标准规范", translated as "standard specifications", could be more comprehensively translated as "standards and regulatory norms" or "standardization framework".
11. The phrase "推动建设民用低空飞行相关服务监管平台" (tuīdòng jiànshè mínyòng dīkōng fēixíng xiāngguān fúwù jiānguǎn píngtái), where "服务监管平台" is "service supervision platform", could be clearer as "platform for services and supervision related to civil low-altitude flight" or "service and regulatory platform".
12. The term "机票销售格式条款" (jīpiào xiāoshòu géshì tiáokuǎn), translated as "the format terms of ticket sales", could be more precisely termed "standard-form contract terms for ticket sales" or "template clauses for ticket sales", as "格式条款" refers to standardized contracts.
13. The phrase "运输总条件等格式条款" (yùnshū zǒng tiáojiàn děng géshì tiáokuǎn) translated as "format clauses such as the general conditions of transportation". "运输总条件" is better translated by the industry standard term "General Conditions of Carriage". Thus, "standard-form clauses such as the General Conditions of Carriage".
14. The sentence starting "明确航班延误或者取消时..." (míngquè hángbān yánwù huòzhě qǔxiāo shí...), translated as "It is clear that...", would better reflect the legislative context of "明确" (míngquè - to stipulate, to clarify) as "The draft clarifies that..." or "It is stipulated that...".
15. The phrase "做好“食宿”安排" (zuòhǎo "shísù" ānpái), translated as "make 'food and accommodation' arrangements", misses the nuance of "做好" (zuòhǎo), which implies proper execution. "Ensure proper 'food and accommodation' arrangements are made" or "duly provide 'food and accommodation' arrangements" would be better.
16. The term "内卷式”竞争" (nèijuǎnshì jìngzhēng), translated as "'involutionary' competition", while increasingly understood, could be briefly clarified for broader audiences perhaps as "'involutionary' (hyper-competitive, zero-sum) competition", though keeping it as is aligns with the instruction to not alter too much. A more descriptive alternative without using 'involution' could be "excessively intense internal competition" or "rat-race style competition".
17. The term "平台内经营者" (píngtáinèi jīngyíngzhě) translated as "operators within the platform" could be more naturally phrased as "businesses operating on the platform" or "on-platform operators/vendors".
18. The phrase "将他人商品名称、企业名称设置为搜索关键词等行为" (jiāng tārén shāngpǐn míngchēng, qǐyè míngchēng shèzhì wéi sōusuǒ guānjiàncí děng xíngwéi), the "等行为" (děng xíngwéi – 'and other such acts') is omitted. The translation should reflect this, e.g., "...as search keywords, and other similar acts".
19. The phrase "侵害数据权益和恶意交易等不正当竞争行为" (qīnhài shùjù quányì hé èyì jiāoyì děng bù zhèngdàng jìngzhēng xíngwéi), the "等" (děng - 'and other') after "malicious transactions" is omitted. It should be "...infringement of data rights and interests, malicious transactions, and other such acts of unfair competition".
20. The term "拖欠中小企业账款问题" (tuōqiàn zhōngxiǎo qǐyè zhàngkuǎn wèntí), translated as "default on payments to small and medium-sized enterprises", could be more precisely rendered as "the issue of delayed payments owed to SMEs" or "the problem of arrears in payments to SMEs", as "拖欠" (tuōqiàn) primarily means 'to delay' or 'to be in arrears' rather than outright 'default'.
21. The phrase "提高行政处罚机关层级" (tígāo xíngzhèng chǔfá jīguān céngjí), translated as "raised the level of administrative penalty agencies", could be more precisely explained as "elevating the jurisdictional level of authorities empowered to impose administrative penalties" or "assigning authority for administrative penalties to higher-level bodies".
22. The term "法治宣传教育法草案" (Fǎzhì Xuānchuán Jiàoyù Fǎ cǎo'àn), translated as "draft law on legal publicity and education", could more accurately reflect "法治" (Fǎzhì - rule of law) as "draft law on rule of law publicity and education" or "draft law on public education regarding the rule of law".

original_text:
第六届跨国公司领导人青岛峰会6月18日至20日举行，吸引来自43个国家和地区的570位嘉宾参会。

  2025年3月，习近平主席会见国际工商界代表时指出，中国过去是、现在是、将来也必然是外商理想、安全、有为的投资目的地，与中国同行就是与机遇同行，相信中国就是相信明天，投资中国就是投资未来。

  此次峰会以“跨国公司与中国—链接世界 合作共赢”为主题，为跨国公司搭建政策对话、产业对接、项目合作的交流平台，向世界传递出中国持续扩大高水平对外开放、欢迎外资企业来华投资兴业的积极信号。



  抓住发展机遇 持续投资中国

  韩国希杰集团连续6年参与跨国公司领导人青岛峰会，是首批到中国投资设厂的世界500强韩资企业之一。

  希杰全球副总裁、中国区总裁尹道瑄说：“落户青岛30多年的时间里，我们陆续13次增资。”



  这是第六届跨国公司领导人青岛峰会举办地青岛国际会议中心（2025年6月18日摄，无人机照片）。新华社记者 李紫恒 摄

  中国不断扩大的市场规模和强大的经济韧性吸引众多跨国公司来华投资兴业。根据商务部国际贸易经济合作研究院在峰会上发布的报告，2024年，中国新设外商投资企业5.9万家、同比增长9.9%，实际使用外资1162亿美元。

  中国大市场的吸引力从本届峰会可窥见一斑——

  嘉宾来自全球43个国家和地区，首次参会的“新面孔”达131人、占总数的23%；境外跨国公司嘉宾包括瑞士嘉能可、日本瑞穗、韩国希杰等世界500强企业的全球总裁级26人、全球副总裁级56人、中国区总裁级133人。

  联邦快递高级副总裁、中国区总裁许宝燕说，企业进入中国市场已超过40年，不断提升在华航空网络布局，去年在青岛、厦门和广州开通了全新国际货运航线，升级了在北京和天津的进出口货件运输服务，还将在中国持续布局物流网络建设。

  除日本、韩国、新加坡、美国、德国、法国等外，东盟、中东、非洲等参会国家增多，越南、埃及等9个国家的企业首次参会。



  参加此次峰会的沙特国际电力和水务公司中国区主席赛乐·哈卜提在跨国公司高质量发展论坛上发言。他表示未来将持续拓展并深化与中国企业、地方政府、科研机构的紧密合作，共同引领全球能源转型（2025年6月19日摄）。新华社记者 李紫恒 摄

  参加此次峰会的沙特国际电力和水务公司中国区主席赛乐·哈卜提介绍，2025年公司在中国首批可再生能源项目的总装机量超过1吉瓦，并在中国启动首个海外创新中心。未来将持续拓展并深化与中国企业、地方政府、科研机构的紧密合作，共同引领全球能源转型。

  中国拥有超大规模国内市场和全球最完备产业体系，展现出强大经济发展韧性和增长潜力。近年来，中国高水平对外开放为跨国公司带来新的市场空间和投资机遇。

  阿拉伯国家联盟驻华代表处主任艾哈迈德·穆斯塔法·法赫米·哈菲兹看到了前五届跨国公司领导人峰会取得的丰硕成果。他说：“希望阿中双方能进一步深化合作，加强交流，创造更多合作机会。”



  优化营商环境 共享发展机遇

  路易达孚集团位于青岛董家口的食品科技产业中心项目日前刚完成土地竞拍，本月底将启动建设，项目总投资约70亿元。

  在此次峰会上，路易达孚集团全球首席商务官兼亚太区总裁周学军说：“这个项目从签订投资协议到完成土地竞拍只用了不到3个月，我代表集团为‘青岛速度’‘青岛温度’点赞。”

  在峰会开幕式上，日本瑞穗金融集团董事长今井诚司说：“中国政府坚定不移地推进市场化改革和国际化进程，并且致力于打造世界一流的营商环境，为跨国公司投资发展提供了广阔空间。”



  2025年6月19日，与会嘉宾在第六届跨国公司领导人青岛峰会上听会。新华社记者 李紫恒 摄

  中国政府一直非常重视跨国公司在华投资兴业。今年，商务部、国家发展改革委会同相关部门进一步压减市场准入负面清单事项，释放了进一步扩大高水平对外开放的积极信号。跨国公司正加速在相关领域投资布局。

  今年4月，生物制药企业阿斯利康青岛吸入气雾剂生产供应基地项目一期建筑主体顺利竣工。该生产供应基地经过两轮增资，总投资额达7.5亿美元，是山东省首个跨国药企生产制造类项目。



  这是生物制药企业阿斯利康青岛吸入气雾剂生产供应基地。该生产供应基地经过两轮增资，总投资额达7.5亿美元，是山东省首个跨国药企生产制造类项目（2025年6月17日摄，无人机照片）。新华社记者 李紫恒 摄

  参加此次峰会的阿斯利康中国总经理林骁说，外商在华发展有赖于政策的保障，中国坚持高水平对外开放，对促进营商环境优化和产业升级有非常重要的意义。中国进一步全面深化改革、推进对外开放的决心与举措，将为包括阿斯利康在内的跨国企业带来重大的市场和政策机遇。

  商务部国际贸易谈判副代表李詠箑表示，商务部将通过外资企业圆桌会议、重点外资项目工作专班、服务保障进外企等方式，协调解决实际问题。

  在此次峰会上，相关部门对新出台的法律法规、政策文件进行权威解读，发布政策白皮书、智库研究报告，向投资者释放中国持续推动高水平对外开放的积极信号，给跨国公司投资中国吃下“定心丸”。

  为深化与欧盟、中东、日本等重点国别地区的合作，峰会举办跨国公司链式招商恳谈会、中德跨国公司发展交流论坛、中阿经贸合作高质量发展论坛等活动，推动在新能源装备、集成电路、现代医药、高端化工、电子信息等产业链接跨国公司资源。

  “我们精心设计了28条产业链考察路线，定向邀请跨国公司进行实地考察，洽谈合作。”山东省商务厅厅长王磊说。
english_translation:
The 6th Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporation Leaders was held from June 18 to 20, attracting 570 guests from 43 countries and regions.

  In March 2025, when meeting with representatives of the international business community, President Xi Jinping pointed out that China has been, is now, and will certainly be an ideal, safe and promising investment destination for foreign investors. Traveling with China means traveling with opportunities, believing in China means believing in tomorrow, and investing in China means investing in the future.

  With the theme of "Multinational Corporations and China - Connecting the World for Win-Win Cooperation", this summit will build an exchange platform for policy dialogue, industrial docking and project cooperation for multinational corporations, and send a positive signal to the world that China will continue to expand its high-level opening up and welcome foreign-funded enterprises to invest and start businesses in China.



  Seize development opportunities and continue to invest in China

  South Korea's CJ Group has participated in the Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporation Leaders for six consecutive years and is one of the first Korean companies in the Fortune Global 500 to invest and set up factories in China.

  Yin Daoxuan, CJ Global Vice President and President of China, said: "In the more than 30 years since we settled in Qingdao, we have increased our capital 13 times."



  This is the Qingdao International Conference Center, where the 6th Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporation Leaders was held (taken on June 18, 2025, drone photo). Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Ziheng

  China's expanding market size and strong economic resilience have attracted many multinational companies to invest and start businesses in China. According to a report released by the Ministry of Commerce's International Trade and Economic Cooperation Research Institute at the summit, by 2024, China will have 59,000 new foreign-invested enterprises, a year-on-year increase of 9.9%, with actual foreign investment of US$116.2 billion.

  The attractiveness of China's large market can be seen from this summit.

  Guests came from 43 countries and regions around the world, and there were 131 "new faces" attending the conference for the first time, accounting for 23% of the total; guests from overseas multinational companies included 26 global presidents, 56 global vice presidents, and 133 China presidents from Fortune 500 companies such as Switzerland's Glencore, Japan's Mizuho, ​​and South Korea's CJ.

  Xu Baoyan, senior vice president of FedEx and president of FedEx China, said that the company has entered the Chinese market for more than 40 years and has continuously improved its aviation network layout in China. Last year, it opened new international cargo routes in Qingdao, Xiamen and Guangzhou, upgraded its import and export cargo transportation services in Beijing and Tianjin, and will continue to build a logistics network in China.

  In addition to Japan, South Korea, Singapore, the United States, Germany, France, etc., the number of participating countries from ASEAN, the Middle East, Africa, etc. has increased, and companies from 9 countries including Vietnam and Egypt are participating in the conference for the first time.



  Sailer Habti, Chairman of Saudi International Power and Water Company China, who attended the summit, spoke at the Multinational Corporation High-Quality Development Forum. He said that in the future, he will continue to expand and deepen close cooperation with Chinese companies, local governments, and scientific research institutions to jointly lead the global energy transformation (photo taken on June 19, 2025). Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Ziheng

  Sailer Habti, Chairman of Saudi Power & Water China, who attended the summit, said that the total installed capacity of the company's first batch of renewable energy projects in China will exceed 1 GW in 2025, and the company will launch its first overseas innovation center in China. In the future, the company will continue to expand and deepen its close cooperation with Chinese companies, local governments, and scientific research institutions to jointly lead the global energy transformation.

  China has a super-large domestic market and the world's most complete industrial system, showing strong economic development resilience and growth potential. In recent years, China's high-level opening up has brought new market space and investment opportunities for multinational companies.

  Ahmed Mustafa Fahmi Hafez, director of the Arab League's representative office in China, saw the fruitful results achieved in the first five multinational corporations summits. He said: "I hope that the two sides can further deepen cooperation, strengthen exchanges and create more cooperation opportunities."



  Optimize the business environment and share development opportunities

  Louis Dreyfus Group's Food Technology Industry Center project in Dongjiakou, Qingdao has just completed the land auction and will start construction at the end of this month. The total investment in the project is about 7 billion yuan.

  At the summit, Zhou Xuejun, Global Chief Commercial Officer and President of Asia Pacific of Louis Dreyfus Company, said: "It took less than three months from signing the investment agreement to completing the land auction. On behalf of the group, I would like to give a thumbs up to the 'Qingdao speed' and 'Qingdao temperature'."

  At the opening ceremony of the summit, Seiji Imai, chairman of Japan's Mizuho Financial Group, said: "The Chinese government is unswervingly promoting market-oriented reforms and internationalization, and is committed to creating a world-class business environment, providing broad space for multinational companies to invest and develop."



  On June 19, 2025, guests attended the sixth Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporation Leaders. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Ziheng

  The Chinese government has always attached great importance to multinational corporations' investment and business in China. This year, the Ministry of Commerce and the National Development and Reform Commission, together with relevant departments, further reduced the negative list of market access items, sending a positive signal of further expanding high-level opening up. Multinational corporations are accelerating their investment layout in related fields.

  In April this year, the main building of the first phase of the Qingdao Inhalation Aerosol Production and Supply Base project of AstraZeneca, a biopharmaceutical company, was successfully completed. After two rounds of capital increase, the total investment of the production and supply base reached US$750 million. It is the first multinational pharmaceutical production and manufacturing project in Shandong Province.



  This is the Qingdao inhalation aerosol production and supply base of AstraZeneca, a biopharmaceutical company. After two rounds of capital increase, the total investment in this production and supply base has reached US$750 million. It is the first multinational pharmaceutical production and manufacturing project in Shandong Province (photo taken on June 17, 2025, drone photo). Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Ziheng

  Lin Xiao, General Manager of AstraZeneca China, who attended the summit, said that the development of foreign companies in China depends on policy guarantees, and China's adherence to high-level opening up is of great significance to promoting the optimization of the business environment and industrial upgrading. China's determination and measures to further deepen reform and promote opening up will bring major market and policy opportunities to multinational companies including AstraZeneca.

  Li Yongyan, deputy representative of the Ministry of Commerce for international trade negotiations, said that the Ministry of Commerce will coordinate and solve practical problems through roundtable meetings of foreign-invested enterprises, special working groups for key foreign-invested projects, and service guarantees for foreign-invested enterprises.

  At this summit, relevant departments provided authoritative interpretations of newly issued laws, regulations and policy documents, and released policy white papers and think tank research reports, sending a positive signal to investors that China will continue to promote high-level opening up to the outside world and giving multinational companies peace of mind when investing in China.

  In order to deepen cooperation with key countries and regions such as the European Union, the Middle East, and Japan, the summit held activities such as the Multinational Corporation Chain Investment Forum, the China-Germany Multinational Corporation Development Exchange Forum, and the China-Arab Economic and Trade Cooperation High-Quality Development Forum to promote the linkage of multinational corporation resources in industries such as new energy equipment, integrated circuits, modern medicine, high-end chemicals, and electronic information.

  "We have carefully designed 28 industrial chain inspection routes and specifically invited multinational companies to conduct on-site inspections and discuss cooperation," said Wang Lei, director of the Shandong Provincial Department of Commerce.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The original text '2024年，中国新设外商投资企业5.9万家' (literally 'In the year 2024, China newly established 59,000 foreign-invested enterprises') is translated as 'by 2024, China will have 59,000 new foreign-invested enterprises'. If this refers to completed data for the year 2024, a translation like 'In 2024, China saw the establishment of...' or 'In 2024, 59,000 new foreign-invested enterprises were established...' would more accurately reflect the reporting of past annual data, rather than a future projection or a cumulative status by the start of 2024.
2. The idiom '可窥见一斑' (kě kuījiàn yībān) in the phrase '中国大市场的吸引力从本届峰会可窥见一斑' is translated as 'can be seen from this summit.' A more nuanced translation, such as 'This summit offers a glimpse into...' or '...can be glimpsed through this summit,' would better capture the original meaning of seeing a significant but partial indication of a larger phenomenon.
3. The term '陆续' (lùxù) in '我们陆续13次增资' (we successively increased our capital 13 times) is translated as 'we have increased our capital 13 times.' While understandable, explicitly including 'successively' or phrasing like 'we have made 13 subsequent capital increases' would better preserve the nuance of '陆续,' which emphasizes actions occurring one after another over a period.
4. The phrase '青岛温度' (Qīngdǎo wēndù) in '为‘青岛速度’‘青岛温度’点赞' is translated as '‘Qingdao temperature’.' While '温度' literally means 'temperature,' in this context, it metaphorically refers to Qingdao's warmth, hospitality, and supportive business environment. A translation like '‘Qingdao’s warmth’' or '‘Qingdao’s welcoming atmosphere’' would more effectively convey this important cultural and connotative nuance.
5. The term '布局' (bùjú), appearing in phrases such as '持续布局物流网络建设' (translated as 'continue to build a logistics network') and '加速在相关领域投资布局' (translated as 'accelerating their investment layout'), carries a strong connotation of strategic planning and deliberate placement. More precise translations like 'continue its strategic development and construction of its logistics network' for the former, and 'accelerating their strategic investment positioning' or 'accelerating the strategic deployment of their investments' for the latter, would better capture this sophisticated meaning beyond simple 'building' or 'layout'.
6. The phrase '服务保障进外企' (fúwù bǎozhàng jìn wàiqǐ) is translated as 'service guarantees for foreign-invested enterprises.' The word '进' (jìn), meaning 'to enter' or 'into,' implies a proactive outreach and delivery of services directly *to* these enterprises. This dynamic aspect is somewhat lost. A translation such as 'initiatives to bring services and support directly to foreign enterprises' or 'proactive on-site service and support for foreign enterprises' would more accurately reflect this nuance of active engagement.
7. The Chinese company name '沙特国际电力和水务公司' is rendered as 'Saudi International Power and Water Company' in a caption and as 'Saudi Power & Water China' in the main text. For clarity and professionalism in an international context, it would be better to use the company's official or most commonly recognized English name consistently if it differs from this descriptive translation. If these descriptive translations are intentional, maintaining strict consistency in the rendering (e.g., always 'Saudi International Power and Water Company, China Branch' or a single chosen descriptor) would be advisable.
8. The term '产业对接' (chǎnyè duìjiē), translated as 'industrial docking,' while a literal rendering, might be better expressed in English business contexts as 'industrial matchmaking,' 'industry linkage facilitation,' or 'fostering industry partnerships' to sound more natural and clearly convey the meaning of connecting and aligning different industrial players or sectors.
9. The phrase '阿中双方' (Ā-Zhōng shuāngfāng) is translated as 'the two sides.' While contextually understandable, specifying 'the Arab and Chinese sides' or 'both Arab and Chinese counterparts' would offer greater precision and immediately clarify the specific entities involved in the cooperation, aligning better with the directness of the original.
10. The term '跨国公司链式招商恳谈会' (kuàguó gōngsī liànshì zhāoshāng kěntánhuì) is translated as 'Multinational Corporation Chain Investment Forum.' '链式招商' (liànshì zhāoshāng) more specifically means 'supply chain-based/focused investment promotion,' and '恳谈会' (kěntánhuì) often implies a frank, in-depth discussion or symposium. A more nuanced translation like 'MNC Symposium on Supply Chain-Integrated Investment Promotion' or 'Roundtable for MNCs on Investment in Industrial Chains' would better capture the specific nature and focus of the event.

original_text:
携手互利共赢 共创美好未来

  费尼亚集团，是燃油系统的全球最大生产商之一，参加此次峰会的集团全球副总裁西蒙·戈德温说，过去10年，他们在山东烟台的投资已经超过5亿美元，年销售额从4000万元人民币增长到现在的20亿元人民币，同时，不断提升产品本土化率，原材料本土化采购从开始的10%增加到现在的90%。

  改革开放以来，跨国公司来华投资兴业，不仅为中国提升开放型经济发展水平、构建现代化产业体系和区域协调发展发挥了积极作用，同时也从中国广阔的市场空间获得了丰厚的商业回报，树立了互利共赢的合作范式。



  这是2025年6月19日拍摄的第六届跨国公司领导人青岛峰会现场。新华社记者 李紫恒 摄

  在峰会上，商务部国际贸易经济合作研究院发布的报告显示，在华外资企业贡献了中国四分之一的工业增加值、七分之一的税收，创造了3000多万个就业岗位。

  与此同时，依托中国超大规模人口基数以及消费升级趋势，跨国公司在华市场空间不断扩大，营业收入实现稳定增长，投资回报率处于较高水平。

  “中国区销售收入到现在占松下全球总销售收入的24%。”松下电器中国东北亚公司副总裁赵炳弟说，2020年至今，松下已在中国开展了20个事业基地的建设和投资，中国已成为松下海外最大的事业基地。

  胡润研究院发布的《2024胡润中国外商投资企业200强》显示，外资企业在中国区累计销售额达10万亿元，平均年销售额500亿元，在中国区的销售额平均占其全球总销售额的14.5%。

  当前，中国经济进入新发展阶段。在许多外资企业看来，中国培育和发展新质生产力、推进高质量发展，孕育着新的市场机遇。

  总部位于比利时的贝卡尔特集团，是钢丝变形技术和镀膜技术领域的全球引领者。贝卡尔特集团中国区负责人李克说：“中国人工智能和数字经济的发展和创新速度非常快，还非常关注低能耗产品，这为我们提供了巨大发展机遇。我们将继续投资，扩大我们在中国的业务。”



  2025年6月19日，第六届跨国公司领导人青岛峰会与会者在开幕式后经过参会企业标志墙。新华社记者 李紫恒 摄

  商务部表示，将持续放宽外资在科技、金融、医疗、电信、文化等10多个服务领域的准入门槛，进一步扩大高水平对外开放，继续支持外资企业投资中国、深耕中国。

  据赵炳弟介绍，松下电子材料（苏州）、苏州松下生产科技的新工厂正在建设中。7月，松下还将在上海市奉贤区再建一个电子材料新工厂。他说：“我们觉得中国市场未来的潜力非常大，所以对中国的初心不改，对未来的信心也非常强。”

  第六届跨国公司领导人青岛峰会犹如一扇窗，释放出中国愿与跨国企业共享机遇、共同发展、共创未来的积极信号，展现出中国推进高水平对外开放、打造国际一流营商环境、坚定维护多边贸易体制的决心和诚意。
english_translation:
Join hands for mutual benefit and win-win to create a better future

  Finia Group is one of the world's largest manufacturers of fuel systems. Simon Godwin, the group's global vice president who attended the summit, said that in the past 10 years, their investment in Yantai, Shandong has exceeded US$500 million, and their annual sales have increased from RMB 40 million to the current RMB 2 billion. At the same time, they have continuously improved the localization rate of their products, and the local procurement of raw materials has increased from 10% at the beginning to 90% now.

  Since the reform and opening up, multinational corporations have come to China to invest and start businesses, which has not only played a positive role in improving China's open economic development level, building a modern industrial system and regional coordinated development, but also gained rich commercial returns from China's vast market space and established a mutually beneficial and win-win cooperation paradigm.



  This is the scene of the 6th Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporation Leaders, taken on June 19, 2025. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Ziheng

  At the summit, a report released by the Ministry of Commerce's International Trade and Economic Cooperation Research Institute showed that foreign-invested enterprises in China contributed a quarter of China's industrial added value, one-seventh of its tax revenue, and created more than 30 million jobs.

  At the same time, relying on China's super-large population base and consumption upgrading trend, multinational companies' market space in China continues to expand, operating income achieves stable growth, and the return on investment is at a high level.

  "Sales revenue in China now accounts for 24% of Panasonic's global total sales revenue." Zhao Bingdi, vice president of Panasonic China Northeast Asia Company, said that from 2020 to date, Panasonic has carried out the construction and investment of 20 business bases in China, and China has become Panasonic's largest overseas business base.

  The "Hurun China Top 200 Foreign-Invested Enterprises 2024" released by the Hurun Research Institute shows that foreign-invested enterprises have a cumulative sales of 10 trillion yuan in China, with an average annual sales of 50 billion yuan, and their sales in China account for an average of 14.5% of their global total sales.

  At present, China's economy has entered a new stage of development. In the eyes of many foreign-funded enterprises, China's cultivation and development of new quality productivity and promotion of high-quality development are pregnant with new market opportunities.

  Bekaert Group, headquartered in Belgium, is a global leader in wire deformation technology and coating technology. Li Ke, head of Bekaert Group China, said: "China's artificial intelligence and digital economy are developing and innovating very fast, and they also pay great attention to low-energy products, which provides us with huge development opportunities. We will continue to invest and expand our business in China."



  Participants of the 6th Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporations passed by the logo wall of participating companies after the opening ceremony on June 19, 2025. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Ziheng

  The Ministry of Commerce stated that it will continue to relax the entry threshold for foreign investment in more than 10 service sectors including science and technology, finance, medical care, telecommunications, and culture, further expand high-level opening up to the outside world, and continue to support foreign-funded enterprises to invest in and develop China.

  According to Zhao Bingdi, the new factories of Panasonic Electronic Materials (Suzhou) and Suzhou Panasonic Production Technology are under construction. In July, Panasonic will also build another new electronic materials factory in Fengxian District, Shanghai. He said: "We think the future potential of the Chinese market is very large, so we remain committed to China and have strong confidence in the future."

  The Sixth Qingdao Summit of Multinational Corporations is like a window, sending out a positive signal that China is willing to share opportunities, develop together and create a common future with multinational companies. It also demonstrates China's determination and sincerity to promote high-level opening-up, create a world-class business environment and firmly safeguard the multilateral trading system.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The title "携手互利共赢 共创美好未来" is translated as "Join hands for mutual benefit and win-win to create a better future." The term "互利共赢" (hùlì gòngyíng) could be translated more concisely. Since "互利" (hùlì) already means "mutual benefit," adding "win-win" can be redundant in English. A more streamlined and impactful translation might be "Working Together for Mutual Benefit and a Brighter Future."
2. The phrase "树立了互利共赢的合作范式" (shùlìle hùlì gòngyíng de hézuò fànshì) is translated as "established a mutually beneficial and win-win cooperation paradigm." Similar to the title, "mutually beneficial and win-win" is redundant. "Established a paradigm of mutually beneficial cooperation" or using "win-win cooperation paradigm" (if "win-win" is preferred for its common usage, acknowledging the redundancy for idiomatic preference) would be more natural.
3. The phrase "提升开放型经济发展水平" (tíshēng kāifàng xíng jīngjì fāzhǎn shuǐpíng) is translated as "improving China's open economic development level." This could be more fluently rendered as "enhancing the development level of its open economy" or "advancing its open economy’s development" for better English syntax and flow.
4. The term "新质生产力" (xīnzhì shēngchǎnlì) is translated as "new quality productivity." While this is a literal translation of a new key term, "new productive forces" or "new quality productive forces" are alternative renderings gaining traction. Using "new quality productive forces" could provide more clarity and align with evolving standard English terminology for this specific Chinese concept, especially as it becomes more widely discussed.
5. The phrase "孕育着新的市场机遇" (yùnyùzhe xīn de shìchǎng jīyù), translated as "are pregnant with new market opportunities," uses a metaphor that, while capturing the nascent idea, might sound overly literary in a business news context. Alternatives like "are fostering new market opportunities," "are generating new market opportunities," or "hold the promise of new market opportunities" could offer a more conventional business tone.
6. The term "低能耗产品" (dī nénghào chǎnpǐn) is translated as "low-energy products." This could be ambiguous, potentially implying products that contain low energy rather than consume low energy. A more precise translation, "low energy-consumption products" or "energy-efficient products," would better convey the intended meaning.
7. The phrase "深耕中国" (shēngēng Zhōngguó) is translated as "develop China." "深耕" (shēngēng) carries a stronger, more active connotation of "to deeply cultivate," "to deepen roots," or "to further entrench oneself." A translation like "deepen their engagement in China," "strengthen their foothold in China," or "further cultivate their presence in the Chinese market" would better reflect this nuance of long-term, in-depth commitment and integration.
8. The phrase "对中国的初心不改" (duì Zhōngguó de chūxīn bù gǎi), translated as "so we remain committed to China," captures the general sentiment. However, "初心不改" (chūxīn bù gǎi) specifically means "our original aspiration/intention remains unchanged." A translation like "our original commitment to China remains steadfast" or "our initial vision for China has not wavered" could more precisely convey the steadfastness of the initial purpose or motivation, which is a culturally significant concept.
9. In the phrase "...共享机遇、共同发展、共创未来" (gòngxiǎng jīyù, gòngtóng fāzhǎn, gòngchuàng wèilái), "共同发展" (gòngtóng fāzhǎn) is translated as "develop together." While accurate, "pursue joint development" or "achieve common development" could impart a slightly more formal and collaborative tone often intended in such official statements, emphasizing mutual progression.
10. Similarly, in the same list of aspirations, "共创未来" (gòngchuàng wèilái) is translated as "create a common future." To better emphasize the collaborative effort implied by "共创" (gòngchuàng - jointly create/build), alternatives like "jointly forge a shared future" or "build a common future together" could be considered, highlighting the active, cooperative construction of the future.

original_text:
新华网北京6月23日电（黄海荣）在中国新消费浪潮中，泡泡玛特、蜜雪冰城、老铺黄金三家港股上市公司犹如“三朵金花”绽放2025港股市场。它们分别从潮玩、茶饮、黄金饰品三大细分赛道崛起，以市值暴涨的亮眼表现成为资本市场焦点。

  掀全球潮玩热潮 泡泡玛特的情绪价值生意经

  泡泡玛特公布的2025年第一季度业绩显示，公司整体收入同比大增165%至170%。具体来看，中国区收入增长95%至100%，海外收入则增长475%至480%。在股价表现上，6月16日泡泡玛特总市值逼近3700亿港元，创历史新高，较2024年3月低点累计上涨超10倍。

  分析人士称，泡泡玛特的爆发式增长在于其捕捉到新一代消费人群从“功能消费”转向追求“情感价值”这一市场变化，通过IP运营+稀缺性营销，将普通玩具升级为具有收藏价值的“潮流艺术品”，潮玩已经成为表达个性、融入圈层的“社交货币”。2025年上半年，经典IP Labubu系列销售额超30亿港元（同比+68%），会员复购率提升至48%（同比+6个百分点），验证了情绪消费的商业价值。

  以泡泡玛特为代表，布鲁克、卡游、52TOYS等IP衍生品企业日渐勾勒出文化新消费市场崛起的剪影。在国内从物质稀缺走向精神丰裕的时代切换背景下，整个社会从“大众单一市场”向“精细化人群市场”转变，以“Z世代”为代表的消费新势力正在重塑追求个性和自我表达的消费新生态。

  但泡泡玛特也曾经历市值不到150亿港元的至暗时刻，转机出现在2024年“毛绒绒”的Labubu爆红和泡泡玛特海外业务进入爆发期。

  Labubu隶属的The Monsters精灵天团系列诞生于2015年，泡泡玛特在2019年签下这一系列IP后并未大火。直到2024年，经过工艺创新的搪胶毛绒版Labubu在明星效应的带动下时尚破圈，引领“即时陪伴”的毛绕包挂潮流，由此拉开 Labubu风靡东南亚乃至全球的序幕。

  如同Labubu不是2024年“横空出世”一样，泡泡玛特海外业务也不是突然“遍地开花”。早在2018年，泡泡玛特已经成立海外事业中心，2023年其海外营收已达10.66亿元。2024年是泡泡玛特前瞻性海外布局全面兑现的一年，其线下门店数量增至130家（含合营），机器人商店达到192台。在越南、印度尼西亚、菲律宾、意大利、西班牙五个国家，泡泡玛特开设了首家线下门店，同时在全球多地的地标性位置如英国牛津街、法国卢浮宫等地成功开设线下门店。

  国际业务增长也离不开线上渠道全面打开所释放的能量。2024年，泡泡玛特在海外线上渠道的收入同比增长834%，其中来官网、Shopee、TikTok的收入分别增长了1246.2%、656%和5779.8%。

  同时泡泡玛特也因地制宜在不同国家和地区打造更多符合本土消费者喜爱的产品。东南亚推宗教联名款，中东设计戴头纱的Molly，欧美主打赛博朋克风，精准匹配地域文化偏好，因而广受海外消费者追捧。2024年财报显示，泡泡玛特港澳台及海外业务营收50.7亿元，同比增长375.2%，收入占比提升至38.9%。

  下一步，泡泡玛特现象能否持续，取决于新IP孵化效率和全球化推进深度。构建IP宇宙而非单点爆发，或许是泡泡玛特需要深入思考的课题。

  4元柠檬水撬动千亿市值 蜜雪冰城的下沉市场方法论

  1杯4元的柠檬水，一套扎根县域的供应链网络，一家市值千亿的港股新贵勾勒出中国新消费崛起的另一个剖面。

  2025年3月3日，现制饮品龙头蜜雪冰城创造了现象级IPO，蜜雪冰城上市首日开盘价262港元/股，最高触及298港元/股，收报290港元/股，较发行价上涨43.21%，对应总市值近1100亿港元，不仅打破了长久以来新茶饮品牌的“破发魔咒”，也是2025年以来首日上市股价表现最好的新股。

  蜜雪冰城的商业模式基于其精准捕捉大众消费市场对“极致性价比”的刚性需求，通过供应链效率革命+下沉市场深耕，将平价茶饮升级为全民日常消费品。

  当一二线城市茶饮市场渐趋饱和，蜜雪冰城用门店地图分布让我们看到了下沉市场潜力，其57.4%的门店位于三线及以下城市。在国内消费分级背景下，县域及乡镇市场正从“无品牌消费”向“高性价比品牌消费”转变，以“小镇青年”为代表的消费群体渴求与城市同步的消费体验。

  面对县域市场“低客单价+高物流成本”的悖论，蜜雪冰城以分布式仓储破局，五大生产基地配合90%县域覆盖的12小时物流网络，将冷链覆盖率提升至97%。在河南、山东等人口大省，“前店后厂”模式使配送半径缩至300公里，县域门店存活率超90%。

  蜜雪冰城的商业本质并非饮品零售商，而是一家供应链巨头。其94%的收入来自向加盟商销售原料、设备及包装材料，加盟费仅占收入的2.4%。蜜雪冰城自建的柠檬种植基地和茶叶加工厂将核心原料成本降低30%，2024年推出的“区域仓+智能补货系统”更是将单店库存周转天数压缩至18天（行业平均25天），大幅降低了损耗率。

  据了解，蜜雪冰城门店食材60%以上为自产，核心原料100%自产，公司还在全国范围内打造了高效的物流体系（能够在12小时内送达中国90%以上的县级地区），并拥有管理供应链的数字化工具。

  通过深度整合供应链和对上游原材料对高度掌控，蜜雪集团在各个市场上都具有较强的高性价比定位。截止2024年，蜜雪冰城在中国及海外11个国家拥有超过4.6万家门店，庞大的门店规模优势进一步摊低供应链成本，实现优势闭环。

  国金证券研报显示，蜜雪冰城拥有业内布局最早、规模最大的供应链体系。近期高盛上调蜜雪冰城2025至2027年盈利预测2%至3%。此外，蜜雪集团获纳入恒生综合指数成份股，变动将于6月9日起生效，可见资本市场对蜜雪冰城增长潜力的认可。

  港股新王上市一年涨幅20倍 老铺黄金的中奢新贵“神话”

  一口价黄金的魔力，让北京SKP商场里衣着考究的消费者排队5小时抢购每克溢价超500元的黄金饰品。这一幕的主角老铺黄金正以颠覆行业的姿态改写中国奢侈消费的规则。

  2024年6月，老铺黄金以40.5港元/股登陆港交所，短短1年时间股价突破800港元，累计涨幅超20倍，市值一度站上1700亿港元，成为港股股价新一任股王，高端消费的资本映射终于在黄金赛道找到出口。

  支撑市值暴涨的是亮眼的业绩表现。2024年财报显示，仅有36家门店的老铺黄金实现营收85.06亿元，同比增长167.5%，净利润14.73亿元，增长253.9%。具体而言，单店年均营收3.28亿元，坪效1.2万元/平米/月。更惊人的是会员裂变速度，忠诚会员数从2023年的20万飙升至2024年的35万，其中年消费超百万的客户贡献26%营收。

  这与近年来奢侈品市场表现形成迥异反差。贝恩咨询在2024年奢侈品市场报告指出，过去两年间，奢侈品市场失去了5000万进取型消费者，但老铺黄金的销量爆发让我们看到，消费者并非放弃高端消费，而是原有的奢侈品牌与消费者的最新需求产生了偏差，他们迫切需要找到契合其全新审美及消费认知的产品。

  老铺黄金正当其时填补了这个缺口，在工艺、定价、门店布局等多个层面走出奢侈品牌全新路径。老铺黄金成立于2009年3月，是国内率先推广古法黄金概念的品牌，后经过两次关键的工艺创新形成自身独有特色，其中“花丝镶嵌、错金”技艺为中国历代宫廷制金技艺，为国家非物质文化遗产，与中国博大精深的传统文化深度关联，进入文化消费赛道，成为代表中国时尚潮流的奢侈品新势力。

  老铺黄金的另一个对行业规则的颠覆性创新在于其彻底重构了黄金饰品的定价逻辑。传统黄金品牌普遍采用的克重计价法，消费者紧盯金价波动，带来行业周期性波动。而老铺黄金直接全产品线“一口价”，强调设计、工艺、文化等无价附加价值，加之每年两次固定提价，强化“只涨不跌”的预期，赋予产品“家族传世”的收藏价值。

  从创始之初，老铺黄金就定位于高净值人群，在消费者心中的心智地位正在逐渐超越传统奢侈品牌。在其Pre-IPO领投方黑蚁资本所做的消费者访谈中，更多的消费者提到，购买奢侈品可以通过logo（品牌标志）来满足自我实现、尊重、团队社交的需求，但购买老铺黄金，是通过做工精细程度与产品美学价值来展现自己的消费能力、社会地位、审美品位。

  更值得关注的是，高净值人群更关注文化内涵，当新中式成为时尚风向标，老铺黄金与故宫等中国传统文化IP联名，以文化为灵魂赋予产品意义，通过工艺壁垒与文化IP结合，满足消费者对“独特性”与“文化归属感”的双重需求。这一趋势也与前述这一波新消费革命中“精神消费”崛起的趋势相吻合。

  中国新消费崛起的本质是“价值创造”的回归，在消费市场势头迅猛的品牌都具有颠覆传统，重新定义价值的能力，他们敏锐捕捉到新的消费群体个性化需求，并以全新的工艺设计、渠道布局、营销策略和供应链体系抢占新消费崛起浪潮下的细分市场机遇，他们是新时代的弄潮儿，并将引领中国新消费走向更广的国际市场。.
english_translation:
Xinhuanet, Beijing, June 23 (Huang Hairong) In the new consumption wave in China, three Hong Kong-listed companies, Pop Mart, Mixue Ice City, and Laopu Gold, are like "three golden flowers" blooming in the Hong Kong stock market in 2025. They have risen from the three major segments of trendy toys, tea drinks, and gold jewelry, and have become the focus of the capital market with their eye-catching performance of skyrocketing market value.

  Pop Mart's emotional value business strategy that has sparked a global trend of trendy toys

  Pop Mart's first quarter results for 2025 show that the company's overall revenue increased by 165% to 170% year-on-year. Specifically, revenue in China increased by 95% to 100%, while overseas revenue increased by 475% to 480%. In terms of stock price performance, Pop Mart's total market value approached HK$370 billion on June 16, a record high, and has increased more than 10 times from the low point in March 2024.

  Analysts say that Pop Mart's explosive growth is due to its ability to capture the market change of the new generation of consumers from "functional consumption" to the pursuit of "emotional value". Through IP operation + scarcity marketing, ordinary toys have been upgraded to "trendy artworks" with collection value. Trendy toys have become a "social currency" for expressing personality and integrating into the circle. In the first half of 2025, the sales of the classic IP Labubu series exceeded HK$3 billion (a year-on-year increase of 68%), and the member repurchase rate increased to 48% (a year-on-year increase of 6 percentage points), verifying the commercial value of emotional consumption.

  IP derivative companies such as Pop Mart, Brook, Kayou, and 52TOYS are gradually outlining the silhouette of the rise of the new cultural consumer market. In the context of the domestic era of transition from material scarcity to spiritual abundance, the entire society is changing from a "mass single market" to a "fine-grained population market", and the new consumer force represented by the "Z generation" is reshaping the new consumer ecology of pursuing individuality and self-expression.

  However, Pop Mart also experienced its darkest moment when its market value was less than HK$15 billion. The turning point came in 2024 when the "fluffy" Labubu became popular and Pop Mart's overseas business entered a period of explosive growth.

  The Monsters series, to which Labubu belongs, was born in 2015. After Pop Mart signed this series of IPs in 2019, it did not become popular. It was not until 2024 that the innovatively crafted Labubu plush version broke the fashion circle driven by the star effect, leading the trend of "instant companionship" wool-wrapped bags, thus opening the prelude to Labubu's popularity in Southeast Asia and even the world.

  Just like Labubu did not "come out of nowhere" in 2024, Pop Mart's overseas business did not suddenly "bloom everywhere". As early as 2018, Pop Mart had established an overseas business center, and its overseas revenue reached 1.066 billion yuan in 2023. 2024 is the year when Pop Mart's forward-looking overseas layout is fully realized. The number of its offline stores has increased to 130 (including joint ventures), and the number of robot stores has reached 192. In Vietnam, Indonesia, the Philippines, Italy, and Spain, Pop Mart opened its first offline store, and successfully opened offline stores in landmark locations in many places around the world, such as Oxford Street in the UK and the Louvre in France.

  The growth of international business is also inseparable from the energy released by the full opening of online channels. In 2024, Pop Mart's revenue from overseas online channels increased by 834% year-on-year, among which the revenue from the official website, Shopee, and TikTok increased by 1246.2%, 656%, and 5779.8% respectively.

  At the same time, Pop Mart also creates more products that suit local consumers' preferences in different countries and regions according to local conditions. Religious co-branded models are promoted in Southeast Asia, Molly with a veil is designed in the Middle East, and cyberpunk style is mainly used in Europe and the United States, which accurately matches regional cultural preferences and is therefore widely sought after by overseas consumers. The 2024 financial report shows that Pop Mart's Hong Kong, Macao, Taiwan and overseas business revenue is 5.07 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 375.2%, and the revenue share has increased to 38.9%.

  Whether the Pop Mart phenomenon can continue in the future depends on the efficiency of new IP incubation and the depth of globalization. Building an IP universe rather than a single point of explosion may be a topic that Pop Mart needs to think deeply about.

  The 4-yuan lemonade leverages Mixue Ice City's market capitalization of 100 billion yuan to develop its sinking market methodology

  A cup of lemonade at 4 yuan, a supply chain network rooted in counties, and a new Hong Kong-listed company with a market value of 100 billion yuan outline another profile of the rise of new consumption in China.

  On March 3, 2025, Mixue Bingcheng, the leader in freshly brewed beverages, created a phenomenal IPO. On the first day of listing, Mixue Bingcheng opened at HK$262 per share, reached a high of HK$298 per share, and closed at HK$290 per share, up 43.21% from the issue price, corresponding to a total market value of nearly HK$110 billion. It not only broke the long-standing "broken issue curse" of new tea beverage brands, but was also the new stock with the best stock price performance on the first day of listing since 2025.

  Mixue Bingcheng's business model is based on its accurate capture of the mass consumer market's rigid demand for "ultimate value for money". Through a supply chain efficiency revolution and deep penetration into the lower-tier markets, it upgrades affordable tea drinks into daily consumer products for the entire population.

  As the tea market in first- and second-tier cities is becoming saturated, Mixue Ice City's store map distribution shows us the potential of the sinking market. 57.4% of its stores are located in third-tier and lower cities. In the context of domestic consumption stratification, the county and township markets are changing from "unbranded consumption" to "cost-effective brand consumption", and the consumer group represented by "small town youth" is eager for consumption experience synchronized with the city.

  Faced with the paradox of "low customer unit price + high logistics costs" in the county market, Mixue Ice City broke through with distributed warehousing. Its five major production bases cooperated with a 12-hour logistics network covering 90% of the counties, increasing the cold chain coverage rate to 97%. In populous provinces such as Henan and Shandong, the "front store and back factory" model has reduced the distribution radius to 300 kilometers, and the survival rate of county stores has exceeded 90%.

  The business essence of Mixue Ice City is not a beverage retailer, but a supply chain giant. 94% of its revenue comes from selling raw materials, equipment and packaging materials to franchisees, and franchise fees account for only 2.4% of its revenue. Mixue Ice City’s self-built lemon planting base and tea processing plant will reduce the cost of core raw materials by 30%. The "regional warehouse + intelligent replenishment system" launched in 2024 will reduce the inventory turnover days of a single store to 18 days (the industry average is 25 days), greatly reducing the loss rate.

  It is understood that more than 60% of the ingredients in Mixue Bingcheng stores are self-produced, and 100% of the core raw materials are self-produced. The company has also built an efficient logistics system across the country (capable of delivering to more than 90% of China's county-level areas within 12 hours) and has digital tools for managing the supply chain.

  Through deep integration of the supply chain and high control over upstream raw materials, Mixue Group has a strong cost-effective positioning in various markets. By 2024, Mixue Ice City will have more than 46,000 stores in China and 11 countries overseas. The huge store scale advantage further reduces the supply chain cost and realizes a closed loop of advantages.

  According to a research report by Guojin Securities, Mixue Ice City has the earliest and largest supply chain system in the industry. Recently, Goldman Sachs raised its profit forecast for Mixue Ice City from 2025 to 2027 by 2% to 3%. In addition, Mixue Group was included in the Hang Seng Composite Index constituent stocks, and the change will take effect on June 9, which shows that the capital market recognizes Mixue Ice City's growth potential.

  The new king of Hong Kong stocks rose 20 times in one year after listing. The "myth" of the new luxury gold in China

  The magic of fixed-price gold has made well-dressed consumers in Beijing SKP mall queue up for five hours to buy gold jewelry with a premium of more than 500 yuan per gram. The protagonist of this scene, Laopu Gold, is rewriting the rules of luxury consumption in China with a subversive attitude.

  In June 2024, Laopu Gold was listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange at HK$40.5 per share. In just one year, the stock price exceeded HK$800, with a cumulative increase of more than 20 times. The market value once reached HK$170 billion, becoming the new king of Hong Kong stocks. The capital mapping of high-end consumption has finally found an outlet in the gold track.

  What supports the surge in market value is the outstanding performance. According to the 2024 financial report, Laopu Gold, which has only 36 stores, achieved revenue of 8.506 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 167.5%, and net profit of 1.473 billion yuan, an increase of 253.9%. Specifically, the average annual revenue of a single store is 328 million yuan, and the sales per square meter is 12,000 yuan/square meter/month. Even more amazing is the speed of member fission. The number of loyal members has soared from 200,000 in 2023 to 350,000 in 2024, of which customers with annual consumption of more than one million contribute 26% of revenue.

  This is in stark contrast to the performance of the luxury goods market in recent years. Bain Consulting pointed out in its 2024 luxury goods market report that in the past two years, the luxury goods market has lost 50 million enterprising consumers, but the explosive sales of Laopu Gold show us that consumers are not giving up high-end consumption, but the original luxury brands have deviated from the latest needs of consumers, and they are in urgent need of finding products that fit their new aesthetics and consumption cognition.

  Laopu Gold filled this gap at the right time, and took a new path for luxury brands in terms of craftsmanship, pricing, store layout, etc. Laopu Gold was established in March 2009. It is the first brand in China to promote the concept of ancient gold. After two key technological innovations, it has formed its own unique characteristics. Among them, the "filigree inlay and inlaid gold" technique is a goldmaking technique of the Chinese court in successive dynasties. It is a national intangible cultural heritage and is deeply related to China's profound traditional culture. It has entered the cultural consumption track and has become a new luxury force representing China's fashion trends.

  Another disruptive innovation of Laopu Gold to the industry rules is that it completely reconstructs the pricing logic of gold jewelry. Traditional gold brands generally adopt the weight pricing method, and consumers closely follow the fluctuations in gold prices, which brings cyclical fluctuations in the industry. Laopu Gold directly "sets the price" for the entire product line, emphasizes the priceless added value of design, craftsmanship, culture, etc., and increases the price twice a year, which strengthens the expectation of "only rising and not falling", and gives the product the collection value of "family inheritance".

  From the beginning, Laopu Gold has been positioned for high-net-worth individuals, and its position in the minds of consumers is gradually surpassing traditional luxury brands. In the consumer interviews conducted by its pre-IPO lead investor Black Ant Capital, more consumers mentioned that buying luxury goods can satisfy the needs of self-realization, respect, and team social interaction through logos (brand logos), but buying Laopu Gold is to show their consumption ability, social status, and aesthetic taste through the fine workmanship and aesthetic value of the product.

  What is more noteworthy is that high-net-worth individuals pay more attention to cultural connotations. When the new Chinese style becomes a fashion trend, Laopu Gold has collaborated with traditional Chinese cultural IPs such as the Forbidden City, giving products meaning with culture as the soul, and combining craft barriers with cultural IP to meet consumers' dual needs for "uniqueness" and "cultural belonging". This trend is also consistent with the rise of "spiritual consumption" in the aforementioned new consumption revolution.

  The essence of the rise of new consumption in China is the return of "value creation". Brands that are gaining momentum in the consumer market have the ability to subvert traditions and redefine value. They are keen to capture the personalized needs of new consumer groups and seize the opportunities in the niche markets under the wave of the rise of new consumption with new process design, channel layout, marketing strategy and supply chain system. They are the trendsetters of the new era and will lead China's new consumption to a wider international market.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The phrase "细分赛道" (xìfēn sàidào) in the first paragraph, translated as "major segments," could be more vividly rendered as "specialized tracks" or "niche competitive arenas" to better capture the competitive metaphor inherent in "赛道" (track/course).
2. The term "情绪价值生意经" (qíngxù jiàzhí shēngyì jīng) for Pop Mart is translated as "emotional value business strategy." A translation like "Pop Mart's winning formula in the emotional value business" or "The business acumen behind Pop Mart's emotional value proposition" would better convey the idiomatic meaning of "生意经" (knack for business/secrets to success) beyond a simple "strategy."
3. "同比大增" (tóngbǐ dàzēng) for Pop Mart's revenue, translated as "increased by," would be more dynamic as "surged by" or "saw a significant year-on-year increase of" to reflect the force of "大增" (major increase).
4. "融入圈层" (róngrù quāncéng) translated as "integrating into the circle" is a bit vague. "Integrating into social circles" or "fitting into specific communities" would be more descriptive of "圈层" (social circles/subcultures).
5. "精细化人群市场" (jīngxìhuà rénqún shìchǎng) translated as "fine-grained population market." A more natural phrasing would be "segmented niche markets" or "precisely targeted demographic markets," as "population market" is uncommon.
6. "爆红" (bàohóng) describing Labubu, translated as "became popular," undersells the intensity. "Skyrocketed in popularity" or "became a viral sensation" would better capture the meaning of sudden, widespread fame.
7. "搪胶毛绒版" (tángjiāo máoróng bǎn) Labubu, translated as "plush version," omits "搪胶" (vinyl). A more precise translation would be "vinyl and plush version" to reflect the material innovation if significant.
8. "时尚破圈" (shíshàng pòquān) translated as "broke the fashion circle." "Crossed over into mainstream fashion" or "achieved breakout success in the fashion world" would better convey the meaning of "破圈" (breaking out of a niche). 
9. "毛绒包挂潮流" (máoróng bāoguà cháoliú) translated as "trend of 'instant companionship' wool-wrapped bags." "毛绒包挂" refers to "plush bag charms" or "plush keychain pendants." "Wool-wrapped bags" seems to be a misinterpretation. A better translation would be "the trend of plush bag charms offering 'instant companionship'."
10. "单点爆发" (dāndiǎn bàofā) for Pop Mart, translated as "single point of explosion," could be idiomatically improved to "one-off hits" or "isolated successes" when contrasted with building an "IP universe."
11. The Mixue section title "4元柠檬水撬动千亿市值 蜜雪冰城的下沉市场方法论" translated as "The 4-yuan lemonade leverages Mixue Ice City's market capitalization of 100 billion yuan to develop its sinking market methodology" is awkwardly phrased. It should be something like: "How 4-Yuan Lemonade Propelled Mixue Ice City to a 100-Billion-Yuan Market Cap: Its Lower-Tier Market Methodology." The current translation implies the market cap is a tool, rather than an outcome.
12. "下沉市场" (xiàchén shìchǎng) translated as "sinking market." While gaining some traction, "lower-tier markets" or "less-developed markets" is clearer for a general English audience.
13. "港股新贵" (gǎnggǔ xīnguì) for Mixue, translated as "new Hong Kong-listed company," misses the nuance of "新贵" (nouveau riche/upstart). "A newly prominent Hong Kong-listed company" or "a rising star on the Hong Kong stock exchange" would be better.
14. "破发魔咒" (pòfā mózhòu) for Mixue's IPO, translated as "broken issue curse." "Curse of debuting below issue price" or "jinx of IPOs falling below their offer price" would be clearer than the somewhat jargonistic literal translation.
15. "极致性价比" (jízhì xìngjiàbǐ) translated as "ultimate value for money" is good, but "极致" also carries a sense of "extreme." "Extreme cost-effectiveness" could also be considered.
16. "刚性需求" (gāngxìng xūqiú) translated as "rigid demand." In this context, "essential demand," "non-negotiable demand," or "unyielding demand" might better convey the strength and inelasticity implied, beyond just economic rigidity.
17. The original text "蜜雪冰城自建的柠檬种植基地和茶叶加工厂将核心原料成本降低30%" (Mixue Ice City’s self-built lemon planting base and tea processing plant will reduce the cost of core raw materials by 30%) uses "将" (jiāng), which is translated as future tense "will reduce." Given it describes an existing setup, present tense "reduces" or "has reduced" would likely be more accurate in context, indicating an achieved benefit of their vertical integration.
18. "截止2024年，蜜雪冰城在中国及海外11个国家拥有超过4.6万家门店" is translated with a future tense for the verb: "By 2024, Mixue Ice City will have...". "截止2024年" means "as of the end of 2024" (past data). The translation should be "As of the end of 2024, Mixue Ice City *had* over 46,000 stores...".
19. "实现优势闭环" (shíxiàn yōushì bìhuán) for Mixue, translated as "realizes a closed loop of advantages," is literal. "Creating a virtuous cycle of competitive advantages" or "achieving a self-reinforcing cycle of advantages" would be more idiomatic.
20. The Laopu Gold section title "老铺黄金的中奢新贵“神话”" (Lǎopù Huángjīn de zhōngshē xīnguì “shénhuà”) translated as "The 'myth' of the new luxury gold in China." "中奢" (zhōngshē) means "accessible luxury" or "mid-to-high-end luxury," and "新贵" (xīnguì) refers to Laopu Gold as an upstart in this segment. A more nuanced translation would be "Laopu Gold's 'Myth': An Upstart in China's Accessible Luxury Gold Market."
21. In Laopu Gold's stock performance, "市值一度站上1700亿港元" (shìzhí yīdù zhànshàng 1700 yì Gǎngyuán) is translated as "The market value once reached HK$1700 billion." This is a significant numerical error. "亿" (yì) is 100 million, so 1700亿 is 170 billion. It should be "HK$170 billion."
22. "会员裂变速度" (huìyuán lièbiàn sùdù) for Laopu Gold, translated as "speed of member fission." While "fission" captures "裂变" literally, "viral member growth rate" or "exponential member acquisition rate" would be more common and understandable business English for rapid, network-effect driven growth.
23. "进取型消费者" (jìnqǔxíng xiāofèizhě) in the luxury market context, translated as "enterprising consumers." "Aspirational consumers" or perhaps "progressive consumers" are more common terms in luxury market analysis and might better fit the intended meaning of consumers striving to engage with luxury brands.
24. "古法黄金" (gǔfǎ huángjīn) translated as "ancient gold." "Ancient-style gold," "gold crafted using traditional methods," or specifying "ancient gold craftsmanship techniques" for the concept would be more precise, as "ancient gold" could imply the material itself is old.
25. "两次关键的工艺创新" (liǎng cì guānjiàn de gōngyì chuàngxīn) for Laopu Gold, translated as "two key technological innovations." "工艺" (gōngyì) refers to craftsmanship or artisanal processes. "Key innovations in craftsmanship" or "pivotal artisanal innovations" would be more accurate than "technological innovations," which suggests modern machinery or digital tech not necessarily implied.
26. "团队社交的需求" (tuánduì shèjiāo de xūqiú) in the context of luxury purchases, translated as "needs of... team social interaction." "Peer group affiliation," "social validation within one's circle," or "belonging to a social group" might better capture the nuance than "team social interaction," which often implies a work context.
27. "工艺壁垒" (gōngyì bìlěi) for Laopu Gold, translated as "craft barriers." "High craftsmanship barriers," "barriers to entry due to specialized artisanal skills," or "proprietary craftsmanship techniques" would better explain this business concept.
28. "新时代的弄潮儿" (xīn shídài de nòngcháor) in the conclusion, translated as "the trendsetters of the new era." "弄潮儿" (nòngcháor) literally means "tide rider" or "one who plays with the tide," implying boldness and innovation. While "trendsetters" is good, "pioneers of the new era" or "those courageously riding the wave of the new era" could also capture the dynamic imagery.

original_text:
新华社北京6月23日电（记者柳伟建、王储）美军日前空袭伊朗三处核设施，推升冲突进一步升级并加剧外溢风险。分析人士指出，美国动用军事力量在以色列和伊朗冲突中直接“下场”，将迫使伊朗作出回应。那么，伊朗会如何“报复”？霍尔木兹海峡会不会遭遇封锁？以伊冲突会不会进入长期消耗战？

  伊朗将如何报复美国？

  美国总统特朗普21日表示，美军已“彻底清除”伊朗福尔道、纳坦兹和伊斯法罕三处核设施。美国国防部长赫格塞思22日在新闻发布会上说，美国军事行动“基本摧毁了伊朗的核项目”。不过，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊的政治顾问阿里·沙姆哈尼表示，伊朗的浓缩铀材料还在，“游戏并未结束”。



  这是6月17日在伊朗首都德黑兰市区拍摄的浓烟。新华社记者 沙达提 摄

  美国《华盛顿邮报》报道说，卫星显示伊朗福尔道核设施周围在美国打击之前存在“异常”的车辆活动。袭击发生后，图像显示地表受损但并未证实该设施深层防御工事出现突破口或地下结构出现大规模坍塌。这表明，此次袭击可能未对防御工事设施造成大规模破坏。

  伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬22日与法国总统马克龙通电话时表示，美国袭击伊朗核设施是侵略行径，伊朗方面将对此作出回应。他说，伊朗从未主动挑起战争，但在遭遇侵略时必将进行自卫。美国全国广播公司22日表示，特朗普政府正在为伊朗的报复作准备，未来48小时将是“敏感时间”。

  俄罗斯政治分析家安德烈·翁季科夫表示，美国此次对伊朗核设施的打击不能视作大规模干预，且目前来看“影响有限”，因此伊方可能不会进行大规模报复。伊朗现在的处境同2020年初高级将领苏莱曼尼被美国刺杀时类似，需要被迫对美国作出回击。伊朗的主要目标是阻止美国进一步干预，因而接下来可能对美方作出“有限回应”。

  中国国际问题研究院中东问题专家李子昕说，特朗普政府在以伊冲突上倾向于“点到为止”，因为长期介入不符合其国内政治利益。伊朗也不想同美方长期交战，否则只会大量消耗国力。未来一段时间，伊朗在保持对以导弹攻势的同时，可能会选择性向美国报复示强，但会避免同美方冲突失控。

  霍尔木兹海峡会被封锁吗？

  连日来，伊朗官员多次对外表示正在评估封锁霍尔木兹海峡的可能性。伊朗议会国家安全和外交政策委员会成员伊斯梅尔·库萨里22日表示，议会赞成关闭霍尔木兹海峡，但最终取决于伊朗最高国家安全委员会的决定。



  这是2019年4月30日拍摄的伊朗士兵在霍尔木兹海峡巡逻。新华社发（艾哈迈德·哈拉比萨斯摄）

  霍尔木兹海峡是中东产油国出口石油的重要通道，市场担忧海峡遭封锁会阻断石油运输。美国能源信息局数据显示，2022年经过该海峡运送的油品数量日均约2000万桶，约占全球日均石油消费量的20%。

  沙特《中东报》刊文指出，这不是伊朗首次在局势紧张之际用封锁霍尔木兹海峡作威胁。例如2018年美国单方面退出伊核协议并重启对伊制裁时，伊朗就发出过类似威胁，当时伊朗并未付诸行动。

  宁夏大学中国阿拉伯国家研究院执行院长牛新春认为，封锁霍尔木兹海峡会导致全球石油供应紧张，损害各国利益，这将把伊朗推向各方对立面，伊朗不到迫不得已时，很难做出这种冒险决定。李子昕说，不排除伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡实施“软封锁”的可能，比如加大登船检查力度，或者要求相关国家船只在通行前提前报备等。

  以伊会进入消耗战吗？

  内塔尼亚胡22日说，伊朗核项目和导弹项目已受到“重创”，以色列行动目标“非常接近完成”。他同时表示，以色列不会与伊朗陷入消耗战。以色列《新消息报》也援引以色列官员的话说，长期作战不符合以色列利益。



  这是6月22日在以色列中部内斯齐约纳拍摄的在导弹袭击中被毁的建筑。新华社发（贾马尔·阿瓦德摄）

  分析人士指出，以色列正在释放其军事行动接近“胜利结束”的信号。一方面，如果冲突时间拖长，恐向着不符合以色列利益的方向发展；但另一方面，伊朗也不会轻易停止进攻，否则会被认为是“投降”。美国安全事务专家阿夫申·奥斯托瓦说，伊朗“能做的一件事就是坚持下去，让以色列在这场冲突中付出更大的代价”。

  上海外国语大学中东研究所教授丁隆认为，目前伊朗是冲突损失较大的一方，其对美以的报复尚未完成。不过种种迹象表明，继续拖下去对以伊双方都不利，因为双方在经济、军事等各方面都已难以支撑长期作战，接下来国际斡旋调解以及美伊以三方互动将影响冲突走向。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, June 23 (Reporter Liu Weijian, Crown Prince) The US military recently launched airstrikes on three Iranian nuclear facilities, pushing the conflict to escalate further and increasing the risk of spillover. Analysts pointed out that the US's use of military force to directly "intervene" in the conflict between Israel and Iran will force Iran to respond. So, how will Iran "retaliate"? Will the Strait of Hormuz be blocked? Will the Israeli-Iranian conflict enter a long-term war of attrition?

  How will Iran retaliate against the United States?

  US President Trump said on the 21st that the US military has "completely cleared" Iran's three nuclear facilities in Fordow, Natanz and Isfahan. US Defense Secretary Hegseth said at a press conference on the 22nd that the US military action "basically destroyed Iran's nuclear program." However, Ali Shamkhani, political adviser to Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei, said that Iran's enriched uranium materials are still there and "the game is not over."



  This is a photo of thick smoke in the city of Tehran, the capital of Iran, on June 17. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Shadati

  The Washington Post reported that satellites showed "abnormal" vehicle activity around Iran's Fordow nuclear facility before the US strike. After the attack, images showed surface damage but did not confirm a breach in the facility's deep defenses or a large-scale collapse of underground structures. This suggests that the attack may not have caused large-scale damage to the defense facilities.

  Iranian President Pezerhizzian said in a phone call with French President Emmanuel Macron on the 22nd that the US attack on Iran's nuclear facilities was an act of aggression and Iran would respond to it. He said that Iran has never taken the initiative to provoke a war, but will defend itself if it encounters an invasion. NBC News said on the 22nd that the Trump administration is preparing for Iran's retaliation and the next 48 hours will be a "sensitive time."

  Russian political analyst Andrei Ontikov said that the US strike on Iran's nuclear facilities cannot be regarded as large-scale intervention, and the "impact is limited" at present, so Iran may not retaliate on a large scale. Iran's current situation is similar to when the senior general Soleimani was assassinated by the United States in early 2020, and it is forced to retaliate against the United States. Iran's main goal is to prevent further US intervention, so it may make a "limited response" to the United States next.

  Li Zixin, a Middle East expert at the China Institute of International Studies, said that the Trump administration tends to "stop at the right time" in the Israel-Iran conflict because long-term involvement is not in its domestic political interests. Iran also does not want to engage in a long-term war with the United States, otherwise it will only consume a lot of national strength. In the future, while maintaining its missile offensive against Israel, Iran may selectively retaliate against the United States, but will avoid the conflict with the United States getting out of control.

  Will the Strait of Hormuz be blocked?

  In recent days, Iranian officials have repeatedly stated that they are evaluating the possibility of blocking the Strait of Hormuz. Ismail Koussari, a member of the Iranian parliament's National Security and Foreign Policy Committee, said on the 22nd that the parliament is in favor of closing the Strait of Hormuz, but the final decision depends on the Supreme National Security Council of Iran.



  This is a photo taken on April 30, 2019 of Iranian soldiers patrolling the Strait of Hormuz. Xinhua News Agency (Photo by Ahmed Halabisas)

  The Strait of Hormuz is an important channel for oil-producing countries in the Middle East to export oil. The market is worried that the blockade of the Strait will block oil transportation. According to data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration, the amount of oil products shipped through the Strait in 2022 will be about 20 million barrels per day, accounting for about 20% of the world's daily oil consumption.

  Saudi Arabia's Middle East newspaper pointed out in an article that this is not the first time Iran has threatened to block the Strait of Hormuz when the situation is tense. For example, when the United States unilaterally withdrew from the Iran nuclear agreement and re-imposed sanctions on Iran in 2018, Iran issued a similar threat, but Iran did not take action at that time.

  Niu Xinchun, executive director of the Institute of Chinese and Arab Countries at Ningxia University, believes that blocking the Strait of Hormuz will lead to tight global oil supply and damage the interests of all countries. This will push Iran to the opposite side of all parties. Iran will hardly make such a risky decision unless it is forced to do so. Li Zixin said that it is possible that Iran will implement a "soft blockade" of the Strait of Hormuz, such as increasing the intensity of boarding inspections or requiring ships from relevant countries to report in advance before passing through.

  Will Israel and Iran enter a war of attrition?

  Netanyahu said on the 22nd that Iran's nuclear and missile programs have been "severely damaged" and that Israel's operational goals are "very close to completion." He also said that Israel will not engage in a war of attrition with Iran. Israel's New News also quoted Israeli officials as saying that a long-term war is not in Israel's interests.



  This is a photo taken on June 22 in Nes Zijona, central Israel, of buildings destroyed in a missile attack. Xinhua News Agency (Photo by Jamal Awad)

  Analysts pointed out that Israel is sending a signal that its military operation is close to "ending in victory". On the one hand, if the conflict is prolonged, it may develop in a direction that is not in the interests of Israel; but on the other hand, Iran will not easily stop the attack, otherwise it will be considered "surrender". Afshin Ostova, an expert on US security affairs, said that "one thing Iran can do is to persist and make Israel pay a greater price in this conflict."

  Ding Long, a professor at the Institute of Middle East Studies of Shanghai International Studies University, believes that Iran is currently the party with the greatest losses in the conflict, and its revenge on the United States and Israel has not yet been completed. However, all signs show that continuing to drag on will not be good for both Israel and Iran, because both sides can no longer sustain a long-term war in terms of economy and military. The international mediation and the interaction between the United States, Iran and Israel will affect the direction of the conflict.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The journalist's name "王储" (Wáng Chǔ) is translated as "Crown Prince." This is a literal character-by-character interpretation but highly improbable for a modern journalist's name. A more accurate translation, assuming "储" is the given name, would be "Wang Chu."
2. The phrase "直接“下场”" (zhíjiē “xiàchǎng”) is translated as "directly 'intervene'". While 'intervene' is acceptable, "下场" (literally 'enter the field/stage') carries a stronger nuance of direct, active participation, almost like becoming a player in the game. A translation like "directly 'stepping in'" or "directly 'entering the fray'" could better capture this specific connotation emphasized by the quotation marks.
3. The term "彻底清除" (chèdǐ qīngchú), translated as "completely cleared" regarding nuclear facilities, could be rendered more strongly as "completely eliminated" or "completely neutralized" to better reflect the destructive military intent implied by "清除" in this context.
4. "基本摧毁了" (jīběn cuīhuǐ le), translated as "basically destroyed," could be translated as "largely destroyed" or "substantially destroyed" to better convey the extent of destruction implied by "基本" (jīběn) in this context, which often means more than just 'basically'.
5. The term "市区" (shìqū) in "德黑兰市区" is translated as "in the city of Tehran." A more precise rendering would be "in Tehran's urban area" or "in the downtown area of Tehran" to reflect the specific meaning of "市区" as opposed to the entire city.
6. "深层防御工事" (shēncéng fángyù gōngshì), translated as "deep defenses," could be more precisely translated as "deep defensive fortifications" or "deeply buried fortifications" to accurately convey the meaning of "工事" (fortifications/engineering works).
7. The term "防御工事设施" (fángyù gōngshì shèshī), translated as "defense facilities," could be clarified. If "防御工事" refers to fortifications, then "fortified structures" or "the fortified facility" might be more accurate and less redundant than "defense facilities" in the context of damage assessment.
8. The word "必将" (bìjiāng) in "必将进行自卫" (translated as "will defend itself") conveys a strong sense of certainty or inevitability. A translation like "will certainly defend itself" or "is bound to defend itself" would better capture this emphasis.
9. The term "回击" (huíjī) in "需要被迫对美国作出回击" is translated as "retaliate". While related, "回击" more directly means "to strike back" or "to counter-attack." Using "strike back" would be a more literal and perhaps more fitting translation of the chosen vocabulary.
10. The idiom "点到为止" (diǎn dào wéi zhǐ), translated as "'stop at the right time,'" also implies restraint, not overdoing things, or touching upon something lightly. Phrases like "to exercise restraint," "not to go too far," or "a measured approach" could capture more of its nuanced meaning beyond just timing.
11. "未来一段时间" (wèilái yīduàn shíjiān), translated as "In the future," is somewhat general. A more precise translation would be "In the period ahead," "For some time to come," or "In the coming period."
12. The phrase "选择性向美国报复示强" (xuǎnzéxìng xiàng Měiguó bàofù shìqiáng) is translated as "selectively retaliate against the United States." This translation omits the meaning of "示强" (shìqiáng), which means "to show strength" or "to make a show of force." A more complete translation would be "may selectively retaliate against the United States as a show of force" or "...to demonstrate its strength."
13. "多次对外表示" (duōcì duìwài biǎoshì) is translated as "repeatedly stated." The term "对外" (duìwài) specifically means "publicly" or "to the outside world." A more complete translation would be "repeatedly stated publicly" or "repeatedly announced to the public.".
14. The word "阻断" (zǔduàn) in "阻断石油运输" (translated as "block oil transportation") could also be rendered as "disrupt oil transportation/shipments" or "cut off oil transportation," which may better fit the context of market worries about supply lines.
15. The phrase "这将把伊朗推向各方对立面" (zhè jiāng bǎ Yīlǎng tuīxiàng gèfāng duìlìmiàn), translated as "This will push Iran to the opposite side of all parties," is a bit literal. More idiomatic English phrasing could be "This would pit Iran against other parties" or "This would alienate Iran from other parties."
16. The phrase "伊朗不到迫不得已时，很难做出这种冒险决定" (Yīlǎng bùdào pòbùdéyǐ shí, hěn nán zuòchū zhèzhǒng màoxiǎn juédìng), translated as "Iran will hardly make such a risky decision unless it is forced to do so," captures the meaning well. However, emphasizing the reluctance could be achieved with "Iran would be very reluctant to make such a risky decision unless it has no other choice" or "...unless absolutely compelled to.".
17. The term "报备" (bàobèi) in "要求相关国家船只在通行前提前报备" is translated as "to report in advance." "报备" often implies a more formal process of registering with or reporting to an authority for approval or record. "To provide advance notification and registration" or "to file for passage in advance" might convey this more precisely.
18. "以色列《新消息报》" (Yǐsèliè "Xīn Xiāoxī Bào"), translated literally as "Israel's New News," likely refers to the prominent Israeli newspaper "Yedioth Ahronoth" (which translates to "Latest News"). Using the commonly recognized English name "Yedioth Ahronoth" would offer better clarity for readers familiar with Israeli media.
19. The word "恐" (kǒng) in "恐向着不符合以色列利益的方向发展" (translated as "it may develop in a direction that is not in the interests of Israel") introduces a nuance of fear or apprehension. A translation like "it is feared that it may develop..." or "there are concerns it could develop..." would better capture this specific tone.
20. The term "不利" (bùlì) in "继续拖下去对以伊双方都不利" (translated as "continuing to drag on will not be good for both Israel and Iran") implies a stronger negative consequence than "not be good for." "Would be detrimental to both Israel and Iran" or "would be unfavorable for both sides" would be more accurate.
21. The phrase "双方在经济、军事等各方面都已难以支撑长期作战" (shuāngfāng zài jīngjì, jūnshì děng gè fāngmiàn dōu yǐ nányǐ zhīchēng chángqī zuòzhàn) is translated as "both sides can no longer sustain a long-term war in terms of economy and military." "难以支撑" (nányǐ zhīchēng) suggests "find it difficult to sustain" rather than an absolute "can no longer." Also, "等各方面" (děng gè fāngmiàn - etc., and other aspects) is understated. A more nuanced translation: "both sides are already finding it difficult to sustain a long-term war in economic, military, and other aspects."
22. "国际斡旋调解" (guójì wòxuán tiáojiě), translated as "international mediation," could be more fully rendered as "international mediation and conciliation efforts" or "international diplomatic mediation" to better capture both "斡旋" (mediation) and "调解" (conciliation/resolution).

original_text:
新华社北京6月23日电 题：中国仍是投资与合作的热土——访世界经济论坛执行董事梁锦慧

  新华社记者朱超、刘红霞、郑清斌

  在世界经济论坛第十六届新领军者年会（又称“夏季达沃斯论坛”）即将召开之际，论坛执行董事、大中华区主席梁锦慧日前接受新华社专访时表示，中国作为世界经济增长的重要引擎和创新前沿，持续为全球发展注入强劲动力，仍是国际投资与合作的热土和沃土。

  本届夏季达沃斯论坛将于6月24日至26日在天津举行，主题为“新时代企业家精神”，预计有来自90多个国家和地区的约1800名嘉宾参会。



　　世界经济论坛执行董事、大中华区主席梁锦慧接受记者采访。新华社记者 吴悠 摄

  梁锦慧说，本届论坛在世界经济不确定性、不稳定性高企的背景下召开，但参会人数却有望创历史新高。“这充分体现出国际企业和投资者对中国及亚洲市场的强烈兴趣。他们正积极寻求在人工智能、先进制造业、医疗保健等领域的合作机遇。”

  在她看来，考量一个国家和地区的投资环境，要看政策连贯性和一致性、人力资本的可及性、技术层面就绪情况等。“我认为中国以及亚洲地区的要素匹配相当强劲。”梁锦慧说，中国创造了一个有利于投资者和商业伙伴关系的生态系统。

  作为世界第二大经济体、世界货物贸易第一大国，以及150多个国家和地区的主要贸易伙伴，中国对全球经济增长的贡献率连续多年保持在30%左右。



　　世界经济论坛执行董事、大中华区主席梁锦慧接受记者采访。新华社记者 朱超 摄

  “中国以非常长远的眼光投资于技术和人才培养。”梁锦慧认为，无论是发展绿色能源还是工业转型升级，中国在新兴产业中的表现充分印证了这一发展理念和模式的前瞻性。

  她着重评价了中国在应对气候变化和绿色转型方面取得的成就，认为中国创新性地解决了能源安全、能源可及与环境保护这一“三难困境”。“中国将应对气候变化挑战转化为产业升级机遇，为国际社会提供了宝贵经验。”

  谈及本届论坛主题，梁锦慧认为，企业家精神是一种非常注重解决问题的精神，同时也是激发希望和乐观的精神。“当前，世界经济复苏面临各种挑战，更要求各方发挥企业家精神，探寻如何将挑战转化为机遇。”她说，世界经济论坛希望继续同中方一道，在中国与亚洲以及世界其他地区之间架起沟通的桥梁。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, June 23 , Title: China remains a hot spot for investment and cooperation - Interview with Liang Jinhui, Executive Director of the World Economic Forum

  Xinhua News Agency reporters Zhu Chao, Liu Hongxia and Zheng Qingbin

  As the World Economic Forum's 16th Annual Meeting of the New Champions (also known as the "Summer Davos Forum") is about to be held, Liang Jinhui, executive director of the forum and chairperson of Greater China, said in an exclusive interview with Xinhua News Agency that China, as an important engine of world economic growth and innovation frontier, continues to inject strong impetus into global development and remains a hot and fertile ground for international investment and cooperation.

  This year's Summer Davos Forum will be held in Tianjin from June 24 to 26 with the theme of "Entrepreneurship in the New Era". It is expected that about 1,800 guests from more than 90 countries and regions will attend the forum.
