8. The phrase "落实此前俄乌达成的协议内容" (luòshí cǐqián É Wū dáchéng de xiéyì nèiróng) is simplified to "implementing the agreement reached between Russia and Ukraine." This omits the explicit mention of "此前" (cǐqián), meaning "previously" or "prior." A more faithful translation would be "after implementing the content of the prior agreement," retaining the original's emphasis on sequence.
9. The pilot is described as having to "操纵受伤战机" (cāozòng shòushāng zhànjī). The translation is "steered the damaged fighter jet." While `受伤` (shòushāng) means "damaged" in this context, its literal meaning is "injured," which personifies the aircraft slightly. A translation like "maneuvered the stricken fighter jet" would better capture this subtle, dramatic tone.
10. The description of the pilot's fate, "来不及弹射跳伞" (láibují tánshè tiàosǎn), is translated as "did not have time to eject and parachute." This is accurate, but a more fluid and tense phrasing like "with no time to eject" would better convey the urgency and tragic suddenness implied by "来不及."
11. The phrase "现实的地面情况（战场形势）" is translated as "the actual ground situation (battlefield situation)." While accurate, the term "现实的" (xiànshí de) carries a strong connotation of "the reality" or "the facts on the ground." Translating it as "the reality of the situation on the ground" would better emphasize the pragmatic, unvarnished perspective being insisted upon.
12. In the sentence "二人同意双方...通话" (èr rén tóngyì shuāngfāng... tōnghuà), the translation "the two agreed that they... can talk" simplifies the original's structure. The original uses both "二人" (the two individuals) and "双方" (both sides). A translation like, "The two individuals agreed that both sides could speak..." would more accurately reflect the original's slight redundancy, which serves to emphasize the mutual nature of the agreement between the parties.

original_text:
新华社香港6月30日电 香港特别行政区政府发言人30日表示，当天是香港国安法公布实施五周年的重要日子。五年来，香港国安法为香港实现由乱到治的重大转折，为维护国家主权、安全和发展利益，奠定了坚实的法律基础，更是“一国两制”事业的重要里程碑。

  发言人说，国家安全是头等大事，是国家生存与发展的根本前提。香港在回归祖国后的较长一段时间，在维护国家安全方面处于“不设防”状态，反中乱港分子及外部敌对势力不断挑战“一国两制”的原则底线，甚至妄图夺取香港管治权。

  发言人表示，中央在香港危急关头果断出手，全国人大常委会制定香港国安法，并将其列入香港基本法附件三，由香港特区公布实施，填补了香港特区维护国家安全法律制度和执行机制的短板漏洞，发挥定海神针的作用，止暴制乱，效果立竿见影，成为香港由乱到治的“分水岭”，“一法安香江”。

  其后，凭着特区政府与特区立法会及社会各界的努力，香港特区切实履行宪制责任，去年成功完成香港基本法第23条立法，订立《维护国家安全条例》并于2024年3月23日刊宪生效，完善香港特区维护国家安全的法律制度和执行机制，与香港国安法兼容互补、浑然一体，为香港筑牢维护国家安全的坚实屏障。

  发言人强调，五年来的实践证明，香港国安法是捍卫“一国两制”、维护香港繁荣稳定的“守护神”，是具有重大历史意义和现实意义的好法律。今天，香港的营商环境持续改善，位居全球最自由经济体的榜首、国际金融中心地位稳占世界第三、世界竞争力排名重返三甲，可见香港正在由治及兴的大道上全速前进。

  发言人重申，特区政府必定继续在香港国安法和《维护国家安全条例》的坚实保障下，坚决维护国家主权、安全、发展利益，持续完善相关法律制度和执行机制，以更有效应对不断变化的国安风险挑战；深化宣传教育，让每位市民都自觉维护国家安全，从而形成抵御外部干预的社会基础，以高水平安全护航高质量发展，不断谱写“一国两制”实践新篇章。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Hong Kong, June 30 (Xinhua) -- A spokesperson for the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government said on June 30 that the day marked the fifth anniversary of the promulgation and implementation of the Hong Kong National Security Law. Over the past five years, the Hong Kong National Security Law has achieved a major turning point from chaos to order in Hong Kong, laid a solid legal foundation for safeguarding national sovereignty, security and development interests, and is an important milestone in the cause of "one country, two systems".

  The spokesperson said that national security is a top priority and a fundamental prerequisite for the survival and development of a country. For a long period of time after its return to the motherland, Hong Kong was in a "defenseless" state in terms of maintaining national security. Anti-China and Hong Kong rioters and external hostile forces have continuously challenged the bottom line of the "one country, two systems" principle and even attempted to seize the governance of Hong Kong.

  The spokesperson said that the central government acted decisively at the critical moment in Hong Kong. The Standing Committee of the National People's Congress formulated the Hong Kong National Security Law and included it in Annex III to the Basic Law of Hong Kong, which was promulgated and implemented by the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. It filled the shortcomings and loopholes in the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region's legal system and enforcement mechanism for safeguarding national security, played the role of a stabilizing force, stopped violence and chaos, and the effect was immediate. It became a "watershed" for Hong Kong's transition from chaos to order, and "one law to bring peace to Hong Kong."

  Subsequently, with the efforts of the SAR government, the SAR Legislative Council and all sectors of society, the Hong Kong SAR has earnestly fulfilled its constitutional responsibilities and successfully completed the legislation of Article 23 of the Basic Law of Hong Kong last year. The "Ordinance on Safeguarding National Security" was enacted and promulgated into the Gazette on March 23, 2024, which improved the legal system and enforcement mechanism for safeguarding national security in the Hong Kong SAR, and is compatible, complementary and integrated with the Hong Kong National Security Law, building a solid barrier for safeguarding national security in Hong Kong.

  The spokesperson stressed that the practice over the past five years has proved that the Hong Kong National Security Law is a "guardian" to safeguard "one country, two systems" and maintain Hong Kong's prosperity and stability. It is a good law with great historical and practical significance. Today, Hong Kong's business environment continues to improve. It ranks first among the world's freest economies, ranks third in the world as an international financial center, and returns to the top three in the world's competitiveness ranking. It can be seen that Hong Kong is moving forward at full speed on the road from governance to prosperity.

  The spokesperson reiterated that the SAR government will continue to firmly safeguard national sovereignty, security, and development interests under the solid guarantee of the Hong Kong National Security Law and the "Safeguarding National Security Ordinance", and continue to improve relevant legal systems and enforcement mechanisms to more effectively respond to ever-changing national security risks and challenges; deepen publicity and education so that every citizen will consciously safeguard national security, thereby forming a social foundation for resisting external interference, using high-level security to escort high-quality development, and constantly writing a new chapter in the practice of "one country, two systems".
translation_improvement_points:
1. The term "妄图" (wàngtú) in the phrase "甚至妄图夺取香港管治权" is translated as "attempted." This translation is too neutral. "妄图" carries a strong connotation of a futile, arrogant, or wild scheme. A more nuanced translation like "vainly attempted to" or "harbored the wild ambition of seizing" would better capture the original's condemnation of the intent.
2. The cultural metaphor "定海神针" (dìng hǎi shén zhēn), which alludes to the mythical sea-pacifying pillar from the classic novel *Journey to the West*, is translated functionally as "a stabilizing force." While correct in essence, this loses the powerful imagery of an unshakable, almost mythical anchor. A translation like "an anchor of stability" or "the unshakeable pillar" would better preserve the original's evocative power and cultural weight.
3. The term "反中乱港分子" (fǎn zhōng luàn gǎng fènzǐ) is translated as "Anti-China and Hong Kong rioters." The word "rioters" is a specific interpretation focusing on action. The original term "分子" (fènzǐ) is more akin to the political term "elements," which is broader and includes individuals involved in political agitation, not just physical riots. A more precise rendering would be "anti-China elements seeking to destabilize Hong Kong."
4. The expression "守护神" (shǒuhùshén), translated as "guardian," loses some of its original intensity. "守护神" literally means "guardian deity" or "patron saint," implying a powerful, almost sacred or talismanic level of protection. While "guardian" is a safe choice, a phrase like "talismanic protector" would more accurately convey the depth of reverence and security implied in the original text.
5. The phrase "一法安香江" (yī fǎ ān xiāng jiāng) is a highly concise and poetic slogan, translated as "one law to bring peace to Hong Kong." The translation is accurate in meaning but loses the punchy, slogan-like quality and the poetic reference of "香江" (Xiāng Jiāng), a literary name for Hong Kong. A more stylistically faithful option could be "One Law, Peace for the Fragrant Harbour" or the more direct "One Law Secures Hong Kong."
6. The term "管治权" (guǎnzhì quán) is translated as "the governance of Hong Kong." This is slightly imprecise, as it could refer to the act of governing. The original term specifically refers to the *power* or *authority* to govern. A more accurate translation would be "governing authority" or "the power of governance."
7. The verb "护航" (hùháng) in the phrase "以高水平安全护航高质量发展" is literally translated as "to escort." In English, this phrasing sounds somewhat unnatural in this context. The term implies safeguarding and enabling a process. A more idiomatic and clearer translation would be "to safeguard" or "to underpin," for instance: "using high-level security to safeguard high-quality development."
8. The phrase "浑然一体" (húnrán yītǐ) is translated as "integrated." This is correct but incomplete. The term suggests a seamless, organic, and indivisible whole. A more precise translation would be "seamlessly integrated" or "forming an organic whole" to better capture the nuance of perfect cohesion with the Hong Kong National Security Law.

original_text:
新新华社北京6月30日电 美国消息人士透露，美方截获伊朗高级官员之间的通信，伊方认为伊朗核设施在美军空袭中受损程度比预料的轻。


　　6月24日，民众在伊朗首都德黑兰革命广场庆祝伊以停火。新华社发
  美国《华盛顿邮报》6月29日援引4名知情人士的话报道，伊朗高级官员在被截获的通信中提到，美军空袭的规模和破坏力低于他们的预料。

  关于伊朗核设施受损以及核计划受挫程度，目前众说纷纭。美国总统唐纳德·特朗普称，伊朗的核设施已经遭“完全和彻底清除”。但美国媒体曝出，根据美国国防情报局评估，美军轰炸并未“摧毁”藏在地下的核设施，部分高丰度浓缩铀在美军行动前已被转移，大部分用于铀浓缩的离心机在轰炸后仍完好，空袭仅把伊朗核项目进度拖慢数月。

  美国政府官员没有否认美方截获了伊朗官员的通信，但表示这些官员的话不可信。一名美方官员说，美军空袭精准地打击了目标。白宫新闻秘书卡罗琳·莱维特回应称：“不知姓名的伊朗官员了解数百英尺下废墟情况的说法简直是一派胡言。他们的核武器计划已经完蛋了。”


　　6月25日，在荷兰海牙，美国总统特朗普（前）在北约峰会后出席记者会。新华社记者赵丁喆摄
  美国中央情报局局长约翰·拉特克利夫上周在国会出席闭门听证会。《华盛顿邮报》和美联社6月29日分别援引美国官员的话报道，拉特克利夫说，伊朗核计划多座关键设施被完全摧毁，包括唯一的“金属转化”设施。这一设施位于伊斯法罕核设施内，用于把浓缩铀气体转化成金属，对制造核武器的爆炸核心至关重要。按照拉特克利夫的说法，伊朗需要数年才能重建这一设施。

  拉特克利夫还说，伊朗的浓缩铀可能大多仍然被埋在遭空袭的福尔道和伊斯法罕核设施中。

  参加听证会的美国国会议员对这些评估结果的看法有分歧。民主党籍参议员克里斯·墨菲告诉媒体记者，“我仍相信我们没有彻底挫败”伊朗的核计划。特朗普的盟友、共和党籍参议员林赛·格雷厄姆则表示相信伊朗核计划被迟滞数年。


　　6月22日，伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐在土耳其伊斯坦布尔举行的新闻发布会上发言。新华社记者刘磊摄
  伊朗一直坚决否认试图制造核武器，强调自身核计划是为和平利用核能并有此权利。

  伊朗外长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐6月29日致函联合国秘书长及联合国安全理事会主席，要求安理会认定以色列和美国为侵略方，追究其包括战争赔偿在内的责任。

  伊朗副外长马吉德·塔赫特-拉万希接受英国广播公司(BBC)采访时说，如果美国想与伊朗恢复谈判，必须承诺不再对伊朗发动打击。特朗普6月27日警告称，如果情报显示伊朗有能力将铀浓缩至军用级别，美国“毫无疑问”将再次空袭。

  伊朗常驻联合国代表阿米尔·赛义德·伊拉瓦尼接受美国哥伦比亚广播公司采访时表示，如果国际原子能机构履行自身职责，伊朗可能恢复与其合作。伊朗议会6月25日通过法案，暂停伊朗与国际原子能机构的合作。这一议案获得伊朗宪法监护委员会批准。伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫曾表示，国际原子能机构没有履行任何义务，沦为政治工具。（惠晓霜）
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, June 30: American sources revealed that the United States has intercepted communications between senior Iranian officials. Iran believes that the damage to Iran's nuclear facilities in the US air strikes is less than expected.


　　On June 24, people celebrated the ceasefire between Iran and Israel at Revolution Square in Tehran, the capital of Iran. Xinhua News Agency
  The Washington Post reported on June 29, citing four people familiar with the matter, that senior Iranian officials mentioned in intercepted communications that the scale and destructive power of the US air strikes were lower than they expected.

  There are many different opinions about the damage to Iran's nuclear facilities and the extent of the setback to its nuclear program. US President Donald Trump said that Iran's nuclear facilities have been "completely and thoroughly eliminated." However, US media revealed that according to the assessment of the US Defense Intelligence Agency, the US bombing did not "destroy" the nuclear facilities hidden underground. Some highly enriched uranium had been moved before the US military action, and most of the centrifuges used for uranium enrichment were still intact after the bombing. The air strikes only slowed down the progress of Iran's nuclear program by a few months.

  U.S. government officials did not deny that the U.S. had intercepted Iranian officials' communications, but said the officials' words were not credible. A U.S. official said the U.S. airstrikes had accurately hit the target. White House press secretary Carolyn Levitt responded: "The claim that an unnamed Iranian official knew about the ruins hundreds of feet below is simply nonsense. Their nuclear weapons program is finished."


　　On June 25, in The Hague, Netherlands, US President Trump (front) attended a press conference after the NATO summit. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Zhao Dingzhe
  John Ratcliffe, director of the US Central Intelligence Agency, attended a closed-door hearing in Congress last week. The Washington Post and the Associated Press quoted US officials on June 29 as saying that Ratcliffe said that several key facilities of Iran's nuclear program were completely destroyed, including the only "metal conversion" facility. This facility is located in the Isfahan nuclear facility and is used to convert enriched uranium gas into metal, which is crucial for making the explosive core of nuclear weapons. According to Ratcliffe, it will take Iran several years to rebuild this facility.

  Ratcliffe also said that most of Iran's enriched uranium may still be buried in the Fordow and Isfahan nuclear facilities that were attacked.

  U.S. lawmakers attending the hearing had different views on the assessments. Democratic Senator Chris Murphy told reporters, "I still believe we have not completely thwarted" Iran's nuclear program. Trump's ally, Republican Senator Lindsey Graham, said he believed Iran's nuclear program had been delayed for several years.


　　Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi speaks at a press conference in Istanbul, Turkey on June 22. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Liu Lei
  Iran has always firmly denied attempting to build nuclear weapons, stressing that its nuclear program is for the peaceful use of nuclear energy and that it has the right to do so.

  On June 29, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi sent a letter to the UN Secretary-General and the President of the UN Security Council, asking the Security Council to designate Israel and the United States as aggressors and hold them accountable, including for war reparations.

  Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Majid Takht-Ravanchi told the BBC that if the United States wants to resume negotiations with Iran, it must promise not to launch strikes against Iran. Trump warned on June 27 that if intelligence shows that Iran has the ability to enrich uranium to military grade, the United States will "undoubtedly" launch another air strike.

  Iran's permanent representative to the United Nations, Amir Seyed Iravani, said in an interview with Columbia Broadcasting Corporation that Iran may resume cooperation with the IAEA if it fulfills its responsibilities. The Iranian parliament passed a bill on June 25 to suspend Iran's cooperation with the IAEA. The bill was approved by Iran's Guardian Council. Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf once said that the IAEA has not fulfilled any of its obligations and has become a political tool. (Hui Xiaoshuang)
translation_improvement_points:
1. The idiom "众说纷纭" (zhòngshuōfēnyún) is translated as "There are many different opinions." This is a functional but weak translation that loses the original's vivid sense of widespread confusion and contradiction. A more faithful rendering would be "Conflicting reports abound" or "Accounts vary widely."
2. The phrase "一派胡言" (yī pài húyán) is translated as "simply nonsense." This translation significantly softens the highly dismissive and aggressive tone of the original Chinese idiom. A more accurate tonal equivalent would be "utter nonsense" or "a complete fabrication."
3. The term "沦为" (lúnwéi) in "沦为政治工具" (lúnwéi zhèngzhì gōngjù) is translated as "has become." This misses the strong negative connotation of degradation or decline inherent in "沦为." A more nuanced translation like "has been reduced to a political tool" or "has degenerated into a political tool" would better preserve this implied criticism.
4. The colloquial phrase "完蛋了" (wándàn le), used in a quote, is translated as "is finished." While technically correct, this translation lacks the blunt, almost gloating finality of the original. "Is done for" would better capture the original's forceful and informal tone.
5. The term "比预料的轻" (bǐ yùliào de qīng), referring to damage, is translated as "is less than expected." Using the literal meaning of "轻" (qīng, light), a more idiomatic English phrasing would be "was lighter than anticipated" or "was less severe than expected," which sounds more natural in the context of damage assessment.
6. The phrase "追究其...责任" (zhuījiū qí...zérèn) is translated as "hold them accountable." This is a good standard translation, but "追究" (zhuījiū) carries a sense of actively investigating and pursuing fault. A translation like "to pursue accountability for..." would more fully capture this proactive and legalistic nuance.
7. The image caption's reference to an "伊以停火" (Yī Yǐ tínghuǒ), accurately translated as "ceasefire between Iran and Israel," introduces a topic completely extraneous to the article's main subject of US-Iran tensions. A translator's note might be warranted to point out that this is likely a source text error or a non-sequitur, as the faithful translation creates potential confusion for the English reader.

original_text:
新华社拉萨6月30日电 题：格桑花开——记中共党员、武警西藏总队某支队排长达娃卓嘎

  新华社记者李秉宣



　　↑达娃卓嘎（右一）和战友进行战术训练

  六月的拉萨，格桑花含苞待放。

  “你是不是那个‘藏族女狙击手’？”外出参加单位组织的参观活动，达娃卓嘎被纪念馆的工作人员认了出来。

  2020年，在一段不足十秒的视频中，身穿吉利服、手握狙击枪的她盯着瞄准镜，扣动扳机，一声枪响，“呲呲”燃烧的导火索应声断成两截。

  这让无数网友记住了这位“帅炸了”的女特战队员，也记住了达娃卓嘎这个来自雪域高原的名字。

  从手持牧羊鞭的藏族姑娘成长为一名优秀的女特战队员，再到当选为党的二十大代表，达娃卓嘎说：“无数汗水汇聚成河流，终将带着我奔向更广阔的天地。”



　　↑达娃卓嘎进行狙击训练

  “把青春和泪水铸成锐利子弹，压入祖国的枪膛”

  成为军人，是达娃卓嘎从小的梦想。

  达娃卓嘎的家在西藏贡嘎。她是被全家人捧在手心里的小女儿。小时候，当过民兵的父亲，经常给她和哥哥姐姐讲十八军进藏的故事。

  在全家人心中，军人是直接和打仗划等号的：去当兵就意味着把这个孩子交给国家，就意味着他可能永远回不来了。

  即便如此，当电视中播放军旅题材的画面，父亲常说：“如果有机会，多希望家里能有个军人。”

  “成为军人一定是需要什么特殊才能的。”从军，在这个藏族姑娘心中，如同远处连绵的雪山，神秘而又令人神往。

  中专毕业后，达娃卓嘎报名参军。收到入伍通知时，达娃卓嘎正在山上放羊。“我要去当兵了！”她从石头上高高蹦起，一溜烟地跑下山。

  达娃卓嘎不记得是怎么来到军营的，她唯一记得的是父亲临别前的那句叮嘱：当最好的兵。

  泪水，是军营留给达娃卓嘎最初的印象。

  新兵训练，横在达娃卓嘎面前的难题不是站军姿、搞体能，而是说普通话。

  新兵班长罗智陆记得，队列训练时因为听不懂口令，那个身高一米七、鹤立鸡群般站在排头的姑娘，动作总是慢半拍。上理论课，达娃卓嘎听不懂教员的话。一堂课结束，她的笔记本上经常只有零星几个字。

  自卑和迷茫让这个原本爱说爱笑的姑娘常常伴着泪水入睡。她开始怀疑自己为什么要来当兵，甚至想过退伍。

  骨子里那种不服输的劲头让达娃卓嘎战胜了怯懦。她没有忘记“当最好的兵”的叮嘱。“我要把青春和泪水铸成锐利子弹，压入祖国的枪膛。”达娃卓嘎说。

  为了练发音，白天她跟着战友学说话，晚上对着洗漱镜练口型。每天读书读报时，别人都是安静默读，只有她大声朗读。为了学汉字，她临摹了十几本字帖。教育读本和训练教材上，她一字不落地在汉字上备注拼音。为了练交流，她经常一人分饰几角自我对话，刻意在各种场合跟别人搭话。

  新兵训练结束时，虽然还带着浓重的口音，但达娃卓嘎已经能用普通话和战友正常交流了。

  在许多人看来，军营是男人的世界，特战队员更是专属于男军人的代名词。

  那年，总队筹划组建女子特警队。“男兵能做到的，我也一定能做到。”达娃卓嘎激动得几乎一宿没睡，第二天一早就报了名。

  狙击手是特种作战的关键角色，也是最为复杂的专业之一。在许多人眼中，成为一名狙击手，天赋远大于努力。达娃卓嘎知道自己没有这种天赋，但她偏要选择成为一名狙击手。

  谁能想到，如今在狙击精度射击课目能打出“五发穿一孔”成绩的达娃卓嘎，在第一次摸底考核中是所有队员中唯一一个脱靶的。

  “达娃卓嘎原本是作为备份队员参加集训的。”总队狙击专业教员杨友刚记得，第一次见面他就记住了这个成绩虽差，但身上有股“虎气”的姑娘。

  达娃卓嘎知道，和其他队员比自己输在了起跑线上。“我要吃别人吃不了的苦，做别人不敢做的事，接受别人不敢面对的挑战，才有资格成为名副其实的特战队员。”达娃卓嘎说。

  为了练就“人枪合一”，她在靶纸中间增加一个和子弹直径相同大小的圆，要求自己必须正中圆心。为了磨练耐心，她用绣花针在大米上穿孔，将米粒编成项链，十个手指经常被轮番扎破。

  日复一日的努力让她练就了一身硬功，成为手枪、步枪、狙击枪多种枪型的优秀射手，一千米超远距离狙击她几乎弹无虚发。

  入伍12年，达娃卓嘎参加重大任务20余次，先后荣立一等功、二等功、三等功各一次，被武警部队评为“中国武警十大忠诚卫士”“武警部队十大标兵士官”。



　　↑达娃卓嘎（右一）和战友进行战术训练

  “成为别人心中的一束光”

  达娃卓嘎，藏语的意思是“月亮女神”。她说自己似乎有某种宿命：“是党和军队让我有能力去帮助别人，我要成为别人心中的一束光。”

  2020年，达娃卓嘎被保送至武警警官学院。毕业那年，学校领导希望她能留校任教。面对优渥的条件，达娃卓嘎婉言谢绝了，她选择回到练兵备战一线：“是雪域高原养育了我，我要回到那里去。”

  达娃卓嘎说，自己永远忘不了当新兵时是战友们让自己感到了部队的温暖。

  训练中，班长会特意问她能否听懂口令，训练结束后，会将她单独留下加练，像对待孩子一样教她口令用语和动作要领。战友们会主动和她聊天，帮她纠正汉语发音。

  入伍第四年，达娃卓嘎也开始担任班长。从那时起，她明白不仅要自己强，更要带领全班变强。

  在中士卢锦绣心中，训练场和生活中的班长简直判若两人：“生活中是知心姐姐，一到训练场就变得异常严苛。”

  飞身下是攀登训练中的难点课目，要求队员面朝地面，仅靠一根绳索从五楼一跃而下。

  一次训练中，达娃卓嘎失手从楼上坠落，幸好战友迅速抓住保护绳。为了克服心理障碍，她一次次将自己绑在楼顶边沿，逼着自己往下看。最终她战胜自己，完成了这个动作。如今她依然是总队飞身下课目的女子纪录保持者。

  如今卢锦绣也可以像班长一样完成好这个动作。她说：“是班长给了我战胜自己的勇气。”

  青藏高原被称为世界屋脊，高寒缺氧。在这样的气候环境下，女特战队员们同男兵一起参加七天六夜的“魔鬼周训练”——徒步行军数百公里，每天睡眠不足4小时，连贯完成极限体能、野战生存、户外伪装、特种射击等几十个课目。

  这样的训练，女队员们每年要参加4次。

  有一次“魔鬼周训练”，所在单位共评出5名“极限训练勇士”，4人出自达娃卓嘎所在的班，卢锦绣就是其中之一。

  从一名新兵成为班长，又成为一名优秀的狙击手，综合表现优异的卢锦绣被保送进入军校，新的军旅生涯已经在向她招手。

  在卢锦绣眼中，班长就是她心中的那束光：“我就是在沿着班长的轨迹前行。”

  上等兵陈薪羽在入伍之初就听说过达娃卓嘎的故事。

  “我就是因为听说嘎排的故事报名参军的，也是因为她选择了成为一名特战队员。”她说，“我要像嘎排一样，当一名优秀的军人。”

  2024年，达娃卓嘎被表彰为全国三八红旗手。

  达娃卓嘎觉得女性不应该被定义成应该是什么样子，每个女性都有自己最独特的样子。“我喜欢自己穿着藏族服装的样子，也喜欢身着迷彩，脸上涂满油彩，在训练场上全力拼搏的样子。”她说。

  如今，达娃卓嘎时常收到兄弟单位、军队和地方院校的邀请去参加交流活动。只要时间允许，她都会积极参加。她说：“我希望能带给更多的兄弟姐妹力量。”

  “那一刻感觉生在这个时代真幸福”

  达娃卓嘎的家离拉萨贡嘎国际机场不远，小时候经常能够看到机场起降的飞机。儿时的她常常梦想着坐飞机去外面的世界看看。

  入伍后第一次休假，达娃卓嘎带着爸爸妈妈坐飞机去了北京。

  那是她和家人第一次走出西藏。父亲特意穿上了一件亲手缝制的新藏袍。

  天安门广场上，当鲜艳的五星红旗冉冉升起，达娃卓嘎的泪止不住地往外流。她说：“那一刻感觉生在这个时代真幸福。”

  2025年是西藏自治区成立60周年。“为建设团结富裕文明和谐美丽的社会主义现代化新西藏而努力奋斗，以优异成绩迎接西藏自治区成立60周年”的巨幅标语就悬挂在离部队营区不远的公路两旁。

  达娃卓嘎是村里第一个军人，更是第一个女军人。

  当年听说她要去当兵，全村的男女老少几乎都来了，带着鸡蛋、酥油和奶渣。

  从藏族放羊娃成长为一名军官，达娃卓嘎从没有忘记自己的家乡。她说，如果没有党对少数民族的优待政策，自己就不会有穿上军装实现从军梦的机会，也就不会有现在的自己。

  如今，达娃卓嘎的哥哥姐姐都已经有了稳定的工作，二姐还把家安在了拉萨。父母除了种地、养牛羊的收入，还有政府每月发放的养老金。尽管父母并不缺钱，孝顺的达娃卓嘎每个月都会给父母打生活费。

  不久前，父女俩商量之下，达娃卓嘎用原本准备孝顺父母的钱买了100袋大米。父亲开着车挨家挨户将大米送到同村的孤寡老人家里。

  每次休假回家，达娃卓嘎都会去家乡的村镇小学，给孩子们送书包和文具，给他们讲军营里的故事，讲高原之外的故事。她说，她希望孩子们也能走出农村。

  2022年，达娃卓嘎当选为党的二十大代表。她说，她觉得自己肩上的担子更重了，但是她因此感到高兴，因为“更有能力和责任去帮助更多人”。

  从2018年开始，达娃卓嘎一直资助着一位名叫拉姆的藏族姑娘。拉姆生活在一个单亲家庭，母亲因为残疾没有稳定的收入来源。

  如今拉姆已经是一名大二学生，达娃卓嘎每月给拉姆资助学费和生活费。拉姆称呼达娃卓嘎“阿佳（姐姐）”，她说自己要像阿佳一样当一名军人，当一名特战队员。达娃卓嘎叮嘱她，要先完成学业，有了文化她才更有能力成为一名对社会有用的人。

  成为一名排长后，达娃卓嘎并没有放松自己的军事训练。单位纪录墙上，俯卧撑、引体向上等课目依然写着达娃卓嘎的名字。

  虽然在常人看来训练异常艰苦，但达娃卓嘎说自己的爱好就是训练。

  “在训练场上，我有底气，有信心，那里是我最熟悉的地方，在那里我就是幸福的。”

  格桑花，又被称为“幸福之花”，是藏族人民期盼幸福与吉祥的象征。

  达娃卓嘎的微信头像是一位身着民族服饰、带着灿烂笑容的藏族姑娘，手中捧着一束盛开的格桑花。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Lhasa, June 30, titled : Gesang flowers bloom - remembering Dawa Zhuoga, a member of the Communist Party of China and platoon leader of a detachment of the Tibet Armed Police Corps

  Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Bingxuan



　　↑ Dawa Zhuoga (first from right) and his comrades conduct tactical training

  In June in Lhasa, the Gesang flowers are in bud and about to bloom.

  "Are you the 'Tibetan female sniper'?" Dawa Zhuoga was recognized by the staff of the memorial hall when she was out on a tour organized by her unit.

  In 2020, in a video of less than ten seconds, she was wearing a ghillie suit and holding a sniper rifle. She stared at the scope and pulled the trigger. There was a gunshot, and the burning fuse broke into two with a "hiss".

  This made countless netizens remember this "super handsome" female special forces soldier, and also remember the name Dawa Zhuoga from the snowy plateau.

  From a Tibetan girl holding a shepherd's whip to an outstanding female special forces soldier, and then elected as a delegate to the 20th CPC National Congress, Dawa Zhuoga said: "Countless sweat has gathered into a river, which will eventually lead me to a broader world."



　　↑Dawa Zhuoga undergoes sniper training

  "Forge youth and tears into sharp bullets and press them into the barrel of the motherland's gun"

  Becoming a soldier has been Dawa Zhuoga’s dream since childhood.

  Dawa Zhuoga's home is in Gonggar, Tibet. She is the youngest daughter who is cherished by her family. When she was a child, her father, who was a militiaman, often told her and her brothers and sisters the story of the 18th Army's march into Tibet.

  In the minds of the whole family, soldiers are directly equated with war: joining the army means handing the child over to the country, which means that he may never come back.

  Even so, when military-themed scenes were shown on TV, my father often said, "If I had the chance, I would really like to have a soldier in my family."

  "It must take some special talent to become a soldier." In the heart of this Tibetan girl, joining the army is like the snow-capped mountains in the distance, mysterious and fascinating.

  After graduating from technical secondary school, Dawa Zhuoga signed up to join the army. When she received the enlistment notice, she was herding sheep on the mountain. "I'm going to be a soldier!" She jumped up from the stone and ran down the mountain.

  Dawa Zhuoga didn’t remember how she came to the military camp. The only thing she remembered was her father’s parting advice: be the best soldier.

  Tears were the first impression the military camp left on Dawa Zhuoga.

  During the training for new recruits, the challenge facing Dawa Zhuoga was not standing at attention or doing physical fitness, but speaking Mandarin.

  Luo Zhilu, the squad leader of the new recruits, remembers that during the drill, the girl, who was 1.7 meters tall and stood out from the crowd, was always a step behind because she couldn't understand the commands. During the theory class, Dawa Zhuoga couldn't understand what the instructor said. At the end of a class, there were often only a few words in her notebook.

  Inferiority and confusion made this talkative and cheerful girl often fall asleep in tears. She began to doubt why she joined the army and even thought about retiring.

  The unyielding spirit in her bones helped Dawa Zhuoga overcome her cowardice. She did not forget the advice to "be the best soldier." "I want to turn my youth and tears into sharp bullets and press them into the barrel of the motherland's gun," said Dawa Zhuoga.

  In order to practice pronunciation, she learned to speak with her comrades during the day and practiced her lip shape in front of the mirror at night. Every day when reading books and newspapers, others read silently, but she read aloud. In order to learn Chinese characters, she copied more than a dozen calligraphy books. In educational textbooks and training materials, she annotated the pinyin of Chinese characters without missing a word. In order to practice communication, she often played several roles and talked to herself, and deliberately talked to others in various occasions.

  By the end of the recruit training, although he still had a strong accent, Dawa Zhuoga was able to communicate normally with his comrades in Mandarin.

  In the eyes of many people, the military camp is a man’s world, and special forces members are a synonym exclusively for male soldiers.

  That year, the corps planned to form a female special police team. "If the male soldiers can do it, I can do it too." Dawa Zhuoga was so excited that she almost didn't sleep all night, and signed up early the next morning.

  Snipers are key players in special operations and one of the most complex professions. In the eyes of many people, becoming a sniper requires more talent than hard work. Dawa Zhuoga knew she didn't have this talent, but she chose to become a sniper.

  Who would have thought that Dawa Zhuoga, who could now achieve a score of "five shots through one hole" in the sniper precision shooting course, was the only one among all the team members who missed the target in the first baseline assessment.

  "Dawa Zhuoga originally participated in the training camp as a backup team member." Yang Yougang, a sniper instructor at the Corps, remembered that the first time they met, he remembered this girl who had poor grades but had a "tiger spirit" about her.

  Dawa Zhuoga knew that he was already behind other members at the starting line. "I have to endure hardships that others cannot endure, do things that others dare not do, and accept challenges that others dare not face, only then can I be qualified to become a real special forces member," said Dawa Zhuoga.

  In order to practice the unity of man and gun, she added a circle in the middle of the target paper with the same diameter as the bullet, and required herself to hit the center of the circle. In order to hone her patience, she used an embroidery needle to pierce holes in rice and made a necklace out of rice grains, often pricking her ten fingers in turn.

  Her hard work day after day enabled her to acquire solid skills and become an excellent shooter with various types of guns, including pistols, rifles, and sniper rifles. She could almost never miss a shot with an ultra-long-range sniper at a distance of one thousand meters.

  In the 12 years since she joined the army, Dawa Zhuoga has participated in more than 20 major missions, and was awarded the first-class merit, second-class merit and third-class merit once each. She was rated as "Top Ten Loyal Guards of the Chinese Armed Police" and "Top Ten Model Non-commissioned Officers of the Armed Police Force" by the Armed Police Force.



　　↑ Dawa Zhuoga (first from right) and his comrades conduct tactical training

  “Be a ray of light in others’ hearts”

  Dawa Zhuoga, which means "Moon Goddess" in Tibetan, said she seemed to have a certain destiny: "It is the Party and the army that have enabled me to help others. I want to be a ray of light in others' hearts."

  In 2020, Dawa Zhuoga was recommended to the Armed Police Officers College. When she graduated, the school leaders hoped that she could stay on to teach. Faced with generous conditions, Dawa Zhuoga declined politely and chose to return to the front line of training and preparation: "It was the snowy plateau that raised me, and I want to go back there."

  Dawa Zhuoga said that she would never forget that it was her comrades who made her feel the warmth of the army when she was a new recruit.

  During training, the squad leader would specifically ask her if she could understand the commands. After training, he would leave her alone for additional practice, teaching her the commands and movements like a child. Comrades would take the initiative to chat with her and help her correct her Chinese pronunciation.

  In her fourth year in the army, Dawa Zhuoga also began to serve as a squad leader. From then on, she knew that she had to be strong not only herself, but also lead the whole squad to become stronger.

  In the mind of Sergeant Lu Jinxiu, the squad leader in the training ground and in real life are two completely different people: "In real life, she is a caring sister, but in the training ground, she becomes extremely strict."

  Flying down is a difficult subject in climbing training, which requires team members to face the ground and jump down from the fifth floor with only a rope.

  During a training session, Dawa Zhuoga accidentally fell from a building, but fortunately her comrades quickly grabbed the safety rope. In order to overcome the psychological barrier, she tied herself to the edge of the roof again and again, forcing herself to look down. In the end, she defeated herself and completed the action. Today, she is still the female record holder of the team's flying down course.

  Now Lu Jinxiu can also perform this action as well as the squad leader. She said: "It was the squad leader who gave me the courage to overcome myself."

  The Qinghai-Tibet Plateau is known as the roof of the world, and it is cold and lacks oxygen. In such a climate, female special forces members participated in the seven-day and six-night "devil week training" with male soldiers - marching hundreds of kilometers on foot, sleeping less than four hours a day, and completing dozens of courses such as extreme physical fitness, field survival, outdoor camouflage, special shooting, etc.

  The female team members have to participate in such training four times a year.

  During a "devil's week training" once, the unit selected five "extreme training warriors", four of whom were from Dawa Zhuoga's class, and Lu Jinxiu was one of them.

  From a recruit to a squad leader and then to an excellent sniper, Lu Jinxiu, with her excellent overall performance, was admitted to the military academy. A new military career was beckoning her.

  In Lu Jinxiu's eyes, the squad leader is the light in her heart: "I am just following the squad leader's path."

  Private First Class Chen Xinyu heard about Dawa Zhuoga's story when he first joined the army.

  "I signed up for the army because I heard Ga Pai's story, and it was because of her that I chose to become a special operations soldier," she said. "I want to be an excellent soldier like Ga Pai."

  In 2024, Dawa Zhuoga was recognized as the National March 8th Red Flag Bearer.

  Dawa Zhuoga believes that women should not be defined by what they should look like, and every woman has her own unique look. "I like the way I look in Tibetan clothes, and I also like the way I look in camouflage, with oil paint on my face, and fighting hard on the training ground," she said.

  Nowadays, Dawa Zhuoga often receives invitations from sister units, the military and local colleges to participate in exchange activities. As long as time permits, she will actively participate. She said: "I hope to bring strength to more brothers and sisters."

  “At that moment, I felt so lucky to be born in this era”

  Dawa Zhuoga's home is not far from Lhasa Gonggar International Airport. When she was a child, she could often see planes taking off and landing at the airport. As a child, she often dreamed of taking a plane to see the outside world.

  On her first leave after joining the army, Dawa Zhuoga took her parents on a plane to Beijing.

  It was the first time for her and her family to leave Tibet. Her father specially wore a new Tibetan robe that he had sewn himself.

  In Tiananmen Square, when the bright five-star red flag rose slowly, Dawa Zhuoga couldn't stop crying. She said: "At that moment, I felt so lucky to be born in this era."

  2025 marks the 60th anniversary of the founding of the Tibet Autonomous Region. Huge banners with the slogan "Work hard to build a united, prosperous, civilized, harmonious and beautiful socialist modern new Tibet, and welcome the 60th anniversary of the founding of the Tibet Autonomous Region with outstanding achievements" are hung on both sides of the road not far from the military camp.

  Dawa Zhuoga is the first soldier in the village, and also the first female soldier.

  When they heard that she was going to join the army, almost all the men, women, young and old in the village came, bringing eggs, ghee and curds.

  Growing from a Tibetan shepherd to an officer, Dawa Zhuoga has never forgotten her hometown. She said that if it weren't for the party's preferential policies for ethnic minorities, she would not have the opportunity to wear a military uniform and realize her dream of joining the army, and she would not be who she is today.

  Today, Dawa Zhuoga's older brothers and sisters have stable jobs, and her second sister has settled down in Lhasa. In addition to the income from farming and raising cattle and sheep, her parents also receive a monthly pension from the government. Although her parents are not short of money, the filial Dawa Zhuoga gives them living expenses every month.

  Not long ago, after discussion, Dawa Zhuoga used the money originally intended for her parents to buy 100 bags of rice. Her father drove the rice door to door to deliver it to the elderly widows and widowers in the same village.

  Every time she goes home on vacation, Dawa Zhuoga goes to the village primary school in her hometown, gives school bags and stationery to the children, and tells them stories about the military camp and stories outside the plateau. She said she hopes the children can also leave the countryside.

  In 2022, Dawa Zhuoga was elected as a delegate to the 20th National Congress of the Communist Party of China. She said that she felt that the burden on her shoulders was heavier, but she was happy because she had "more ability and responsibility to help more people."

  Dawa Zhuoga has been supporting a Tibetan girl named Lhamo since 2018. Lhamo lives in a single-parent family, and her mother has no stable source of income due to her disability.

  Now Ram is a sophomore, and Dawa Zhuoga helps Ram with her tuition and living expenses every month. Ram calls Dawa Zhuoga "Ajia (sister)", and she said she wants to be a soldier and a special forces member like Ajia. Dawa Zhuoga told her to finish her studies first, so that she can be more capable of becoming a useful person to society with education.

  After becoming a platoon leader, Dawa Zhuoga did not relax his military training. On the record wall of the unit, Dawa Zhuoga's name is still written on subjects such as push-ups and pull-ups.

  Although the training seems extremely hard to ordinary people, Dawa Zhuoga said that her hobby is training.

  "On the training ground, I am confident and confident. It is the place I am most familiar with and I am happy there."

  Gesang flower, also known as the "flower of happiness", is a symbol of the Tibetan people's desire for happiness and good fortune.

  Dawa Zhuoga’s WeChat avatar is a Tibetan girl wearing ethnic costume and with a bright smile, holding a bouquet of blooming Gesang flowers in her hand.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The term "记" (jì) in the title is translated as "remembering," which incorrectly implies the subject is deceased. A more accurate translation would be "A Profile of" or "On the Record:," which captures the meaning of creating a biographical record.
2. The phrase "应声断成两截" (yìng shēng duàn chéng liǎng jié) describes the fuse breaking "in response to the sound" of the gunshot. The translation "broke into two with a 'hiss'" misinterprets the onomatopoeia and loses the nuance of instantaneous, precise action. A better rendering would be "snapped in two the instant the gun fired."
3. The internet slang "帅炸了" (shuài zhà le) is translated as "super handsome." This is too literal and flat. A translation like "insanely cool" or "strikingly awesome" would better convey the modern, high-intensity praise implied by the original.
4. The idiom "一溜烟地" (yī liù yān de), meaning to move with great speed like a puff of smoke, is omitted. Translating "跑下山" (pǎo xià shān) simply as "ran down the mountain" loses the vivid sense of her excitement and speed. A better version is "dashed down the mountain in a flash."
5. The technical military term "枪膛" (qiāng táng) is translated as "barrel." The correct term is "chamber" or "breech." This distinction is important for the imagery of loading a bullet, ready to be fired.
6. The idiom "鹤立鸡群" (hè lì jī qún), literally "a crane standing among chickens," is translated as "stood out from the crowd." While functionally correct, this loses the specific and vivid animal imagery of the original Chengyu, which emphasizes her height making her conspicuous.
7. The phrase "不服输的劲头" (bù fú shū de jìn tou) is translated as "unyielding spirit." This is adequate but a more precise translation would be "a spirit that refuses to admit defeat" or "a tenacious, competitive drive," which better captures the active resistance and vigor in "不服输" and "劲头."
8. The term "练兵备战" (liānbīng bèizhàn) is translated as "training and preparation." This simplifies a specific military concept. A more faithful translation would be "training troops and preparing for combat" or "combat training and readiness," preserving the military context.
9. The term "知心姐姐" (zhīxīn jiějiě) is translated as "caring sister." This misses the key nuance of "知心" (zhīxīn), which means "knowing the heart." A better translation would be "a confidante" or "a big-sister figure she could confide in."
10. The description "高寒缺氧" (gāo hán quēyǎng) is translated as "it is cold and lacks oxygen." This omits the crucial element of "高" (gāo), meaning "high altitude." A more accurate and descriptive translation is "high-altitude cold and oxygen-deprived."
11. The phrase "连贯完成" (liánguàn wánchéng) implies completing tasks back-to-back with little rest. The translation "and completing" fails to capture this intensity. A stronger choice would be "consecutively completing" or "completing... in a continuous sequence."
12. The descriptive phrase "泪止不住地往外流" (lèi zhǐbùzhù de wǎng wài liú) is translated as "couldn't stop crying." The original is more visual, literally "tears uncontrollably flowed outward." A more evocative translation would be "tears streamed down her face uncontrollably."
13. The romanization of the Tibetan name "拉姆" as "Ram" is a poor choice. The standard international romanization is "Lhamo," which would avoid confusion with the common Indian name Ram.
14. The phrase "我有底气" (wǒ yǒu dǐqì) is mistranslated in the repetitive "I am confident and confident." The term "底气" (dǐqì) signifies a deep-seated self-assurance rooted in solid skill and preparation. A more accurate translation is, "On the training ground, I feel grounded and confident" or "I have a solid foundation of confidence."
15. The phrase "走出农村" (zǒu chū nóngcūn), literally "walk out of the countryside," carries a strong aspirational nuance of overcoming one's origins for a better future. The translation "leave the countryside" is too neutral. A better choice would be "move beyond their rural homes" or "find opportunities beyond the countryside."
16. The term "孤寡老人" (gū guǎ lǎorén) refers specifically to elderly people who are childless and widowed/alone. The translation "elderly widows and widowers" is close but incomplete. "Solitary and widowed elderly" or "childless and elderly living alone" would be more precise.

original_text:
新华社北京6月30日电（记者刘开雄）记者30日从国家外汇管理局获悉，国家外汇管理局日前已向部分符合条件的合格境内机构投资者（QDII）发放投资额度合计30.8亿美元，旨在进一步支持QDII机构依法合规开展跨境投资业务，在有效防范风险的前提下，有序满足境内居民合理对外投资需求。



  QDII制度是我国金融市场开放的重要制度安排之一。QDII允许符合条件的境内金融机构在一定额度内，从境内汇出本外币资金，投资境外金融市场。

  “在近期外汇市场形势平稳向好的条件下，适时发放一定额度，可有序满足市场参与主体合理投资需求，有利于QDII制度健康运行发展。”国家外汇局相关部门负责人表示，国家外汇局始终坚持统筹发展和安全，综合考虑QDII机构管理资产规模、内控合规等因素，秉承公平公正、公开透明的原则，有序发放QDII额度，不断完善发放机制和规则，持续加强事中事后监管，QDII业务的国际化、市场化、规范化水平不断提高。

  博时基金相关负责人认为，此次增加QDII额度，有利于满足投资者对海外多元化资产配置的合理需求，助力投资者跨境投资的便利化，进一步做好普惠金融。

  “QDII额度增加不仅有助于推动我国金融市场高水平开放，推动构建金融双向开放新格局和跨境资本双向流动，促进跨境资本流动保持平衡，还将推动境内资本市场与国际接轨，促进跨境资产管理的发展。”博时基金上述负责人说。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, June 30 (Reporter Liu Kaixiong) The reporter learned from the State Administration of Foreign Exchange on the 30th that the State Administration of Foreign Exchange has recently issued a total investment quota of US$3.08 billion to some qualified qualified domestic institutional investors (QDII) that meet the conditions. The purpose is to further support QDII institutions to conduct cross-border investment business in accordance with the law and meet the reasonable foreign investment needs of domestic residents in an orderly manner under the premise of effectively preventing risks.



  The QDII system is one of the important institutional arrangements for the opening of my country's financial market. QDII allows qualified domestic financial institutions to remit RMB and foreign currency funds from the country within a certain limit to invest in overseas financial markets.

  "Under the recent stable and improving foreign exchange market situation, the timely issuance of a certain quota can meet the reasonable investment needs of market participants in an orderly manner, which is conducive to the healthy operation and development of the QDII system." The person in charge of the relevant department of the State Administration of Foreign Exchange said that the State Administration of Foreign Exchange has always insisted on coordinating development and security, comprehensively considering factors such as the scale of assets managed by QDII institutions, internal control compliance, and adhering to the principles of fairness, justice, openness and transparency. It has issued QDII quotas in an orderly manner, continuously improved the issuance mechanism and rules, and continuously strengthened on-site and post-event supervision. The internationalization, marketization and standardization of QDII business have been continuously improved.

  Relevant person in charge of Bosera Fund believes that the increase in QDII quota will help meet investors' reasonable demand for diversified overseas asset allocation, help facilitate investors' cross-border investment, and further improve inclusive finance.

  "The increase in QDII quota will not only help promote the high-level opening up of my country's financial market, promote the construction of a new pattern of two-way financial opening up and two-way cross-border capital flows, and promote the balance of cross-border capital flows, but will also promote the domestic capital market to keep pace with the international standards and promote the development of cross-border asset management." said the above-mentioned person in charge of Bosera Fund.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The translation "some qualified qualified domestic institutional investors (QDII) that meet the conditions" for `部分符合条件的合格境内机构投资者` is redundant. The term `合格` (hégé) is already "Qualified" in the official acronym QDII. A more concise and natural phrasing would be "certain eligible Qualified Domestic Institutional Investors (QDIIs)" to avoid repetition.
2. The term `依法合规` (yīfǎ héguī) is translated as "in accordance with the law," which only captures the `依法` (yīfǎ) part. The `合规` (héguī) part, meaning "compliance with regulations," is lost. A more complete translation is "in accordance with laws and regulations" or "in a lawful and compliant manner."
3. The use of "my country's" for `我国` (wǒguó) is a literal translation that is stylistically awkward in English news writing. For a formal news agency report, replacing it with "China's" would create a more objective and professional tone.
4. The phrase `健康运行发展` (jiànkāng yùnxíng fāzhǎn) is translated as "healthy operation and development." In a financial context, the term "sound" is more standard and formal than "healthy." A better rendering would be "the sound operation and development of the QDII system."
5. The title `相关...负责人` (xiāngguān...fùzé rén), translated as "The person in charge of the relevant department" or "Relevant person in charge," is stiff and overly literal. In English journalism, titles like "An official from the relevant department" or "A spokesperson for Bosera Fund" are more natural and idiomatic.
6. The term `事中事后监管` (shìzhōng shìhòu jiānguǎn), translated as "on-site and post-event supervision," misses the nuance of `事中` (shìzhōng). This term means "during the process" or "ongoing," not necessarily "on-site." A more accurate translation is "ongoing and ex-post supervision" or "in-process and post-facto oversight."
7. The phrase `助力...便利化` (zhùlì...biànlìhuà), translated as "help facilitate," is a tautology (a redundant pairing of words). A cleaner, more effective translation would be simply "to facilitate" or, to preserve the nuance of enhancement, "to enhance the convenience of."
8. The expression `进一步做好普惠金融` (jìnyībù zuòhǎo pǔhuì jīnróng) is rendered as "further improve inclusive finance." The verb `做好` (zuòhǎo) carries a stronger sense of effective execution and successful implementation than just "improve." A more nuanced translation could be "to further advance the provision of inclusive finance" or "to do a better job in delivering inclusive financial services."
9. The term `格局` (géjú) in `构建金融双向开放新格局` (gòujiàn jīnróng shuāngxiàng kāifàng xīn géjú) is translated as "pattern." However, `格局` implies a broader, more structural concept like a "framework," "paradigm," or "landscape." A better translation would be "to foster a new paradigm of two-way financial opening."
10. The phrase `与国际接轨` (yǔ guójì jiēguǐ) is translated as "to keep pace with the international standards." The idiom `接轨` literally means "to connect tracks," implying direct integration and alignment, which is a stronger concept than merely "keeping pace." A more faithful translation would be "to align with international practices" or "to integrate with global markets."

original_text:
2024年6月，习近平总书记在宁夏考察时强调，打好黄河“几字弯”攻坚战，统筹推进森林、草原、湿地、荒漠生态保护修复和盐碱地综合治理，让“塞上江南”越来越秀美。

  ◇宁夏牢记嘱托，以黄河流域生态保护和高质量发展先行区建设为牵引，立足“一河三山”生态坐标、“一带三区”总体布局，落实“四水四定”，并不断深化探索资源环境要素市场化配置改革，拓展完善生态产品价值实现机制和生态保护补偿机制，实施最严格的水资源管理制度，为宁夏筑牢西北重要生态安全屏障持续发力。

  ◇宁夏通过关停矿山并实施废弃矿山整治及生态修复，统筹森林、草原、湿地、荒漠系统治理，“引育并举”有效保护生物多样性等措施，重塑山之貌，谱写出一曲从“靠山吃山”到“护山养山”的生态协奏乐章。

  ◇以黄河流域生态保护和高质量发展先行区建设为牵引，治水、用水、节水三管齐下，精心涵养水之脉。

  ◇通过体制机制改革为生态产品定价，并推进市场化交易，将传统意义的资源劣势、区位劣势和环境劣势转变为高质量发展优势，点活绿之金。

  文 |《瞭望》新闻周刊记者 刘紫凌 张亮 任玮

  浩汤黄河水美岸坚，巍巍贺兰高峻雄壮，氤氲六盘山明水秀，叠翠罗山瀚海明珠。在宁夏，这“一河三山”构成重要的生态安全屏障，是谋划改革发展的基准线。

  对宁夏筑牢西北重要生态安全屏障，习近平总书记念兹在兹。

  2020年6月，习近平总书记在宁夏考察时指出，贺兰山是我国重要自然地理分界线和西北重要生态安全屏障，维系着西北至黄淮地区气候分布和生态格局，守护着西北、华北生态安全。要加强顶层设计，狠抓责任落实，强化监督检查，坚决保护好贺兰山生态。

  4年后，习近平总书记再次来到宁夏考察时强调，打好黄河“几字弯”攻坚战，统筹推进森林、草原、湿地、荒漠生态保护修复和盐碱地综合治理，让“塞上江南”越来越秀美。

  2022年4月，经国务院批复同意，国家发展改革委印发《支持宁夏建设黄河流域生态保护和高质量发展先行区实施方案》。该方案提出，坚持以水定城、以水定地、以水定人、以水定产，坚定不移走绿色低碳发展道路，打好环境问题整治、深度节水控水、生态保护修复攻坚战，扎实推进黄河大保护，确保黄河安澜，建设人与自然和谐共生的美好家园。

  2024年，水利部明确提出支持宁夏深入落实“四水四定”、加快构建现代化水网体系、加快构建现代化节水产业体系和节水型社会、推广宁夏“四水四定”试点经验等4条指导意见。

  宁夏牢记嘱托，以黄河流域生态保护和高质量发展先行区建设为牵引，立足“一河三山”生态坐标、“一带三区”总体布局，落实“四水四定”，出台《贺兰山生态环境综合整治修复工作方案》《宁夏回族自治区国土空间生态修复规划（2021—2035年）》《宁夏回族自治区“四水四定”实施方案》《宁夏回族自治区用水权市场交易规则》等一系列制度措施，并不断深化探索资源环境要素市场化配置改革，拓展完善生态产品价值实现机制和生态保护补偿机制，实施最严格的水资源管理制度，为宁夏筑牢西北重要生态安全屏障持续发力。

  完成矿山修复和国土整治56.48万亩，治理荒漠化土地270万亩，全区森林覆盖率达到11.35%，草原综合植被盖度达到56.8%，湿地保护率达到29%……在宁夏，“一河三山”生态屏障日益稳固，“塞上江南”愈发秀美。



  在宁夏贺兰山国家森林公园 拍摄的岩羊（2025年3月4日摄） 王鹏摄 / 本刊

  重塑山之貌

  仲夏时节，贺兰山运动休闲公园里树影婆娑、花海锦绣，沿着健身步道前行，不时可见彩蝶振翅，偶闻山鸟啁鸣。当翠意满目的葡萄园出现在眼前时，不觉间已从公园穿行至志辉源石酒庄内，又是一片藤蔓绕架、碧果垂枝的景象……

  “听讲解员说这里过去是寸草不生的采矿塌陷区，变成现在这么漂亮的公园和酒庄，耳目一新。”到宁夏旅游的浙江游客胡文波说，贺兰山下的矿坑“变形记”，给他留下深刻印象。

  作为西北地区重要的生态安全屏障，宁夏承担着维护西北乃至全国生态安全的重要使命。宁夏关停矿山并实施废弃矿山整治及生态修复，统筹森林、草原、湿地、荒漠系统治理，“引育并举”有效保护生物多样性等措施，重塑山之貌，谱写出一曲从“靠山吃山”到“护山养山”的生态协奏乐章。

  ——关停矿山修复“伤疤”，筑牢西北地区重要生态屏障。

  贺兰山，被宁夏人民称为“父亲山”，阻挡西北风沙，滞留东南水汽，是西北地区重要的生态安全屏障。因矿产资源丰富，自20世纪50年代开始，长期粗放无节制的开采，使贺兰山原始生态、自然地貌、人居环境等遭到严重破坏。

  面对生态问题，宁夏全面打响“贺兰山生态保卫战”，将贺兰山自然保护区内所有煤矿、非煤矿山、洗煤储煤厂等彻底关停。贺兰山脚下的石嘴山市是一座因煤而生的城市。2007年，当地煤炭产量达1558.33万吨，现在减至每年100万吨左右，非煤产业占比从15%提升至近90%。

  不独贺兰山。六盘山自然保护区内违规建筑全部拆除，三关口矿区企业全部清零，生态修复面积约115万平方米；罗山自然保护区内38座风电机组及附属设施全部退出……目前，“三山”自然保护区内问题点位已全部整改并实现动态清零。

  为整体提升“三山”生态功能，宁夏专门编制印发《贺兰山、六盘山、罗山生态保护修复专项规划（2020—2025年）》，按照分区分类分级保护治理的思路，设置“自然保护区、生态关联区、生态延伸区”三个圈层，依次构建生态“绿屏”、生态“绿带”和生态“绿网”，不断提升山脉生态系统质量。

  六盘山脚下的隆德县北象山，在专项修复规划的引领下，当地通过挖高填低、修建挡土墙和排水渠，运用挂网喷播植生+密植坡面+补植补栽技术，实现了北象山乔灌融合、三季有花、四季见绿的自然景观。

  ——通盘考量，分类施治，统筹森林、草原、湿地、荒漠系统治理。

  贺兰山、罗山和六盘山自北向南串联起宁夏的森林、草原、湿地、荒漠等各种生态形态。在治理实践中，宁夏始终坚持统筹治理、系统治理和源头治理理念，将山水林田湖草沙实施整体性保护、系统性修复、融合性发展。

  护山要治沙。宁夏沙化土地面积达1505万亩，占全区国土面积近1/5，荒漠化防治是筑牢生态屏障的重中之重。全境属于黄河“几字弯”攻坚战片区的宁夏，将腾格里沙漠固沙锁边工程作为重点项目推进，攻坚境内固沙锁边带最后26.5公里的缺口。今年6月30日，随着最后一列草方格稳稳扎进沙子，腾格里沙漠宁夏境内镶上了一条长约153公里、最宽处达38公里的“绿链”锁边。腾格里沙漠固沙锁边工程历经60多年，一代又一代治沙人接续奋斗，终于在黄河上游筑起一道重要生态屏障。

  中国林科院首席科学家、三北工程研究院院长卢琦说，沙漠锁边能有效减缓风沙侵蚀，防止沙漠向周边农田、城镇蔓延，保护绿洲、交通基础设施和宜居地带。

  护山要优林。如果说贺兰山的治理必须坚持“素颜”，那么六盘山生态修复就需“略施粉黛”。位于400毫米降水线以南的六盘山，降水量比较充沛，在宁夏“三山”中绿意最浓，但其林种单一、林分质量不高。

  宁夏在六盘山区实施精准提升森林质量项目。项目运用“近自然森林经营”理念，通过对现有林的合理改造、利用与保护，不断优化森林的结构，发展多功能林业，充分发挥森林的生态服务功能，逐步形成“多树种、多世代、多林龄、多层次、可天然更新”的优质高效森林生态系统。

  ——“引育并举”，守护“野性之山”的生物多样性。

  草兔蹦跳没入路边草丛，岩羊悠然在山脚觅食，金雕来回盘旋于山峰之间……盛夏时节沿山涧向贺兰山挺进，未及深处就能感受到大山深处的勃勃生机。

  随着贺兰山、六盘山等山脉生态环境持续向好，宁夏一手抓外来物种引入，一手抓野生动物保护，促使生物链随着更多物种的发现或重现再趋完整，山脉正逐渐再显生机盎然、万物共生的野性。

  2023年，贺兰山入选国家第一批陆生野生动物重要栖息地名录，主要野生动物岩羊、马鹿的种群数量分别达到4万余只和3000多头。近年，随着雪豹、普氏野马等野生动物陆续成功引进，贺兰山生态系统健康发展。

  保护野生动物助和谐共生。在森林覆盖率已超60%的六盘山，保护区内已通过影像识别出30余只华北豹。为了给野生动物营造更安全的迁徙环境，当地在交通建设时“为豹让路”。

  驱车行驶在宁夏固原市境内的山间公路，不时可见路边竖立的印有鹿形图案和“注意野生动物”标语的警示牌，旁边的路面设置了减速带。在部分路段路面下方，还能看到一个个方形涵洞。

  “这是我们在修路时，专门为野生动物同步规划设计的‘绿色通道’，车辆从上面走，野生动物可以从下面安全穿行。”固原市交通运输局公路科科长杨莉说，这些涵洞宽3米、高2.5米，豹、鹿等大型野生动物也能通过。

  一条条为野生动物扩散迁徙搭建的“生命之桥”，折射出人与自然和谐共生的理念愈加深入人心。
english_translation:
◇In June 2024, General Secretary Xi Jinping emphasized during his inspection tour in Ningxia the need to win the tough battle of the "Ji-shaped Bend" of the Yellow River, coordinate the promotion of ecological protection and restoration of forests, grasslands, wetlands, deserts, and comprehensive management of saline-alkali land, and make the "Jiangnan on the Great Wall" more and more beautiful.

  ◇ Ningxia keeps the instructions in mind, takes the construction of the Yellow River Basin Ecological Protection and High-quality Development Pilot Zone as the driving force, bases itself on the "one river and three mountains" ecological coordinates and the "one belt and three zones" overall layout, implements the "four waters and four determinations", and continues to deepen the exploration of market-oriented allocation reform of resources and environmental factors, expand and improve the ecological product value realization mechanism and ecological protection compensation mechanism, implement the strictest water resources management system, and continue to work hard to build a strong important ecological security barrier in the northwest for Ningxia.

  ◇ Ningxia has reshaped the appearance of mountains by closing mines and implementing remediation of abandoned mines and ecological restoration, coordinating the management of forests, grasslands, wetlands and deserts, and "attracting and nurturing" to effectively protect biodiversity. It has composed an ecological symphony from "living off the mountains" to "protecting and nurturing the mountains."

  ◇ Driven by the construction of the Yellow River Basin Ecological Protection and High-Quality Development Pilot Zone, we will adopt a three-pronged approach to water management, water use and water conservation to carefully conserve the water veins.

  ◇ Through institutional and mechanism reform, we will price ecological products and promote market-based transactions, transforming traditional resource disadvantages, location disadvantages and environmental disadvantages into advantages for high-quality development and activating green gold.

  Text | Liu Ziling, Zhang Liang and Ren Wei, reporters of Outlook News Weekly

  The mighty Yellow River has beautiful waters and strong banks, the towering Helan Mountains are majestic and majestic, the misty Liupan Mountains are picturesque, and the verdant Luoshan Mountains are like pearls in the vast sea. In Ningxia, these "one river and three mountains" constitute an important ecological security barrier and are the baseline for planning reform and development.

  General Secretary Xi Jinping is always concerned about Ningxia building an important ecological security barrier in the northwest.

  In June 2020, General Secretary Xi Jinping pointed out during his inspection in Ningxia that the Helan Mountains are an important natural geographical boundary in my country and an important ecological security barrier in the northwest. They maintain the climate distribution and ecological pattern from the northwest to the Huanghuai region and protect the ecological security of the northwest and North China. We must strengthen top-level design, focus on responsibility implementation, strengthen supervision and inspection, and resolutely protect the ecology of the Helan Mountains.

  Four years later, when General Secretary Xi Jinping visited Ningxia again, he emphasized the need to win the battle to dig deep into the "Ji-shaped bend" of the Yellow River, coordinate the promotion of ecological protection and restoration of forests, grasslands, wetlands, deserts, and comprehensive management of saline-alkali land, and make the "Jiangnan on the Great Wall" more and more beautiful.

  In April 2022, the National Development and Reform Commission issued the "Implementation Plan for Supporting Ningxia in Building a Pilot Zone for Ecological Protection and High-quality Development in the Yellow River Basin" with the approval of the State Council. The plan proposes to adhere to the principle of determining cities, land, people and production based on water, unswervingly follow the path of green and low-carbon development, fight hard to rectify environmental problems, deeply save water and control water, and protect and restore the ecology, solidly promote the protection of the Yellow River, ensure the safety of the Yellow River, and build a beautiful home where people and nature coexist in harmony.

  In 2024, the Ministry of Water Resources clearly put forward four guiding opinions, including supporting Ningxia in deeply implementing the "Four Waters and Four Determinations", accelerating the construction of a modern water network system, accelerating the construction of a modern water-saving industrial system and a water-saving society, and promoting Ningxia's "Four Waters and Four Determinations" pilot experience.

  Ningxia has kept the instructions in mind, taken the construction of the Yellow River Basin Ecological Protection and High-quality Development Pilot Zone as the driving force, based on the "one river and three mountains" ecological coordinates and the "one belt and three zones" overall layout, implemented the "four waters and four determinations", and issued the "Helan Mountain Ecological Environment Comprehensive Remediation and Restoration Work Plan", "Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region Land Space Ecological Restoration Plan (2021-2035)", "Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region "Four Waters and Four Determinations" Implementation Plan", "Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region Water Use Rights Market Trading Rules" and a series of institutional measures, and continued to deepen the exploration of market-oriented allocation reform of resources and environmental factors, expand and improve the ecological product value realization mechanism and ecological protection compensation mechanism, implement the strictest water resources management system, and continue to work hard to build a strong important ecological security barrier in the northwest for Ningxia.

  Completed mine restoration and land reclamation of 564,800 mu, controlled 2.7 million mu of desertified land, the forest coverage rate in the whole region reached 11.35%, the comprehensive vegetation coverage of grassland reached 56.8%, and the wetland protection rate reached 29%... In Ningxia, the ecological barrier of "one river and three mountains" is becoming increasingly stable, and the "Jiangnan on the Great Wall" is becoming more and more beautiful.



  Blue sheep photographed in Helan Mountain National Forest Park, Ningxia (March 4, 2025) Photo by Wang Peng/Our magazine

  Reshaping the Mountain

  In midsummer, the Helan Mountain Sports and Leisure Park is full of swaying trees and splendid flowers. Walking along the fitness trail, you can see butterflies fluttering and hear mountain birds chirping. When the green vineyards appear before your eyes, you have walked from the park to Zhihui Yuanshi Winery, where vines are entwined and green fruits are hanging from branches...

  "I heard from the tour guide that this place used to be a barren mining subsidence area, but it has now become such a beautiful park and winery, which is refreshing." Hu Wenbo, a Zhejiang tourist who visited Ningxia, said that the "transformation" of the mine under the Helan Mountains left a deep impression on him.

  As an important ecological security barrier in the northwest region, Ningxia shoulders the important mission of maintaining the ecological security of the northwest and even the whole country. Ningxia has shut down mines and implemented the remediation and ecological restoration of abandoned mines, coordinated the management of forests, grasslands, wetlands, and deserts, and effectively protected biodiversity through "introduction and cultivation" to reshape the appearance of the mountains and compose an ecological concerto from "living off the mountains" to "protecting and nurturing the mountains".

  ——Close mines, repair “scars” and build a strong ecological barrier in the northwest region.

  Helan Mountain, called "Father Mountain" by the people of Ningxia, blocks the northwest wind and sand and retains the southeast moisture, and is an important ecological security barrier in the northwest region. Due to its rich mineral resources, long-term extensive and uncontrolled mining since the 1950s has seriously damaged the original ecology, natural landforms, and living environment of Helan Mountain.

  In the face of ecological problems, Ningxia launched a comprehensive "Helan Mountain Ecological Protection War" and completely shut down all coal mines, non-coal mines, coal washing and storage plants, etc. in the Helan Mountain Nature Reserve. Shizuishan City at the foot of the Helan Mountain is a city born out of coal. In 2007, local coal production reached 15.5833 million tons, which has now been reduced to about 1 million tons per year, and the proportion of non-coal industries has increased from 15% to nearly 90%.

  The situation is not unique to the Helan Mountains. All illegal buildings in the Liupanshan Nature Reserve have been demolished, all enterprises in the Sanguankou mining area have been cleared, and an ecological restoration area of about 1.15 million square meters has been completed. All 38 wind turbines and ancillary facilities in the Luoshan Nature Reserve have been withdrawn... At present, all problematic points in the "Three Mountains" Nature Reserve have been rectified and dynamically cleared.

  In order to improve the overall ecological functions of the "Three Mountains", Ningxia has specially compiled and issued the "Special Plan for Ecological Protection and Restoration of Helan Mountain, Liupan Mountain and Luoshan Mountain (2020-2025)". In accordance with the idea of zoning, classification and grading protection and management, it has set up three circles of "nature reserves, ecological association areas, and ecological extension areas", and constructed an ecological "green screen", ecological "green belt" and ecological "green network" in turn to continuously improve the quality of the mountain ecosystem.

  At Beixiang Mountain in Longde County at the foot of Liupan Mountain, under the guidance of a special restoration plan, the local authorities have achieved a natural landscape with a fusion of trees and shrubs, flowers in three seasons, and greenery in four seasons by digging high and filling low, building retaining walls and drainage channels, and using hanging net spraying vegetation + dense planting on slopes + replanting technology.

  ——Take comprehensive considerations, adopt differentiated treatments, and coordinate the management of forests, grasslands, wetlands, and desert systems.

  Helan Mountain, Luo Mountain and Liupan Mountain connect Ningxia's forests, grasslands, wetlands, deserts and other ecological forms from north to south. In governance practice, Ningxia has always adhered to the concepts of overall governance, systematic governance and source governance, and implemented holistic protection, systematic restoration and integrated development of mountains, rivers, forests, fields, lakes, grasslands and deserts.

  To protect the mountains, we need to control the sand. The desertified land area in Ningxia has reached 15.05 million mu, accounting for nearly 1/5 of the region's land area. Desertification control is the top priority for building a strong ecological barrier. Ningxia, whose entire territory belongs to the "Jizi Bend" battle area of the Yellow River, has promoted the Tengger Desert sand fixation and border locking project as a key project to tackle the last 26.5 kilometers of gaps in the sand fixation and border locking belt in the territory. On June 30 this year, as the last row of grass squares was firmly planted in the sand, a "green chain" border locking with a length of about 153 kilometers and a maximum width of 38 kilometers was inlaid in the Tengger Desert in Ningxia. After more than 60 years of sand fixation and border locking projects, generations of sand control workers have continued to struggle and finally built an important ecological barrier in the upper reaches of the Yellow River.

  Lu Qi, chief scientist of the Chinese Academy of Forestry and director of the Three Norths Engineering Research Institute, said that desert edge locking can effectively slow down wind and sand erosion, prevent the desert from spreading to surrounding farmland and towns, and protect oases, transportation infrastructure and habitable areas.

  Protecting the mountain requires good forests. If the management of the Helan Mountains must stick to the "natural look", then the ecological restoration of the Liupan Mountains needs to be "slightly powdered". Located south of the 400 mm precipitation line, the Liupan Mountains have relatively abundant precipitation and are the greenest of the "three mountains" in Ningxia, but their forest species are single and the forest stand quality is not high.

  Ningxia has implemented a precision forest quality improvement project in the Liupanshan area. The project uses the concept of "near-natural forest management" to continuously optimize the structure of forests, develop multifunctional forestry, give full play to the ecological service functions of forests, and gradually form a high-quality and efficient forest ecosystem with "multiple tree species, multiple generations, multiple forest ages, multiple levels, and natural renewal" through the reasonable transformation, utilization and protection of existing forests.

  ——“Introduce and cultivate” to protect the biodiversity of the “wild mountains”.

  Grass rabbits hop into the grass by the roadside, blue sheep leisurely forage for food at the foot of the mountain, golden eagles circle back and forth between the peaks... In midsummer, as you advance along the mountain stream towards the Helan Mountains, you can feel the vitality deep in the mountains before you even reach the depths.

  As the ecological environment of mountains such as the Helan Mountains and the Liupan Mountains continues to improve, Ningxia has been focusing on the introduction of alien species on the one hand and the protection of wild animals on the other, prompting the food chain to become more complete with the discovery or rediscovery of more species. The mountains are gradually regaining their wild nature of vitality and symbiosis.

  In 2023, Helan Mountain was included in the first list of important terrestrial wildlife habitats in China, and the populations of the main wild animals, blue sheep and red deer, reached more than 40,000 and 3,000, respectively. In recent years, with the successful introduction of wild animals such as snow leopards and Przewalski's horses, the ecosystem of Helan Mountain has developed healthily.

  Protecting wildlife helps harmonious coexistence. In Liupan Mountain, where the forest coverage rate has exceeded 60%, more than 30 North China leopards have been identified through images in the reserve. In order to create a safer migration environment for wildlife, the local government "makes way for leopards" during transportation construction.

  Driving on the mountain roads in Guyuan City, Ningxia, you can often see warning signs with deer images and slogans like "Watch out for wild animals" erected on the roadside, speed bumps set up on the roadside, and square culverts under the road surface on some sections.

  "This is the 'green channel' we designed specifically for wild animals when we were building the road. Vehicles go on top and wild animals can pass safely underneath." Yang Li, chief of the Highway Section of Guyuan Municipal Transportation Bureau, said that these culverts are 3 meters wide and 2.5 meters high, and large wild animals such as leopards and deer can also pass through.

  The "bridges of life" built for the spread and migration of wild animals reflect that the concept of harmonious coexistence between man and nature is becoming more and more popular.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The term "攻坚战" (gōngjiānzhàn) in "黄河‘几字弯’攻坚战" is translated as "tough battle." A more potent translation like "critical campaign" or "decisive battle" would better convey the original's sense of a focused, high-intensity effort to overcome a major challenge.
2. The cultural phrase "塞上江南" (Sāi shàng Jiāngnán), translated as "Jiangnan on the Great Wall," loses some of its evocative power. A richer translation would be "a verdant paradise in the north" or "an oasis beyond the Great Wall," to better explain the cultural reference to 'Jiangnan' as a region of lush beauty and prosperity.
3. The phrase "牢记嘱托" (láojì zhǔtuō) is rendered as "keeps the instructions in mind." The original term carries a much heavier weight of a formal, solemn entrustment. A translation like "heeding the solemn charge" or "bearing in mind the important entrustment" would better capture this formal tone.
4. The technical term "四水四定" (sì shuǐ sì dìng), translated as "four waters and four determinations," is unclear. A more explanatory translation like "the 'Four Determinations based on Water' principle" would clarify that it refers to determining urban scale, land use, population, and production based on water resource availability.
5. The phrase "点活绿之金" (diǎn huó lǜ zhī jīn), translated as "activating green gold," is somewhat abstract. A more functional translation like "unlocking the economic value of green assets" or "transforming green potential into gold" would better convey the meaning of converting ecological advantages into economic ones.
6. The poetic, four-character-phrase structure of the opening descriptive paragraph ("浩汤黄河水美岸坚，巍巍贺兰高峻雄壮...") is lost in the prosaic translation. A more literary rendering, preserving the parallelism, would be: "Vast and surging are the Yellow River's waters, its banks beautiful and strong; towering and majestic are the Helan Mountains, grand and imposing..." to maintain the original's elevated tone.
7. The classical idiom "念兹在兹" (niànzīzàizī), translated as "is always concerned about," could be stronger. The original implies a constant, profound commitment. "Constantly holds in his thoughts" or "remains deeply devoted to" would better reflect its gravity.
8. "确保黄河安澜" (quèbǎo Huánghé ānlán) is translated as "ensure the safety of the Yellow River." The term "安澜" (ānlán) specifically means 'peaceful waves' and refers to flood control and the river's stability. A more precise translation is "to ensure the Yellow River flows peacefully" or "to safeguard the Yellow River's tranquility."
9. The headline "重塑山之貌" (chóngsù shān zhī mào) is translated as "Reshaping the Mountain." A more poetic translation like "Reshaping the Mountains' Visage" or "Restoring the Face of the Mountains" would better capture the literary quality of "貌" (mào), which means 'face' or 'countenance'.
10. The phrase "矿坑“变形记”" (kuàngkēng “biànxíngjì”) is translated as "the 'transformation' of the mine." The term "变形记" is the Chinese title for Ovid's "Metamorphoses," a significant literary allusion. Translating it as "the metamorphosis of the mining pits" would preserve this cultural reference.
11. The term "动态清零" (dòngtài qīnglíng), translated as "dynamically cleared," is vague. A more accurate translation would be "achieved dynamic clearance," implying a state where any new problems are continuously identified and resolved to maintain a zero-issue status.
12. "引育并举" (yǐn yù bìng jǔ), translated as "'introduction and cultivation'," can be expressed more fluently as "adopting a dual approach of introducing new species while nurturing native ones," which clarifies the parallel actions involved.
13. In the phrase "习近平总书记再次来到宁夏考察时强调，打好黄河“几字弯”攻坚战...", the translation of "攻坚战" is given as "the battle to dig deep into the 'Ji-shaped bend'". This is an inaccurate rendering of "攻坚". It should be consistent with the earlier, more correct translation of "tough battle" or an improved version like "critical campaign".
14. The poetic metaphor in "守护“野性之山”的生物多样性" (shǒuhù “yěxìng zhī shān” de shēngwù duōyàngxìng) is slightly flattened by the translation "protect the biodiversity of the 'wild mountains'." The term "野性" (yěxìng) refers to 'wildness' or a primal nature. A more evocative translation would be "safeguarding the biodiversity of the 'mountains of wildness'" to better capture this nuance.

original_text:
游客在位于宁夏固原市的六盘山国家森林公园游览（2024 年 8 月 4 日摄） 毛竹摄／本刊

  涵养水之脉

  依黄河而生、因黄河而兴，宁夏作为唯一全境属于黄河流域的省区，黄河水自古是当地生命线，保护黄河安澜是宁夏义不容辞的责任。宁夏以黄河流域生态保护和高质量发展先行区建设为牵引，治水、用水、节水三管齐下，精心涵养水之脉。

  ——统筹治污减排，精细治水固生态。

  走进位于银川市通贵乡河滩村的银川黄河湿地公园，眼之所及水面开阔、芦草丰美、鸥鸟盘旋、鱼潜水底，是城郊一处亲水休闲的好地方。

  而在河滩村村民记忆中，这里曾经废水入沟、臭味扑鼻。近年，银川市实施滨河水系截污净化湿地扩整连通工程，集黄河行洪区河滩地整治、水系连通、环境治理、生态修复等功能于一体，彻底改变了臭水入黄的历史，河滩村的面貌也因之一新。

  宁夏始终从国家战略全局、黄河流域协同治理的角度看待自身定位和发展，牢牢扛稳“上游担当”。宁夏坚持统筹水资源、水环境、水生态治理，扎实开展入河排污口排查整治，全区地级城市建成区13条黑臭水体完成治理、县级城市黑臭水体保持动态“清零”。化学需氧量、氨氮重点工程减排量提前2年完成“十四五”时期目标任务。

  “黄河干流宁夏段水质连续8年保持Ⅱ类进出。”宁夏生态环境厅副厅长杜鹏介绍，2024年宁夏沿黄重要湖泊（水库）水质总体良好，水质优良比例为100%。

  ——探索“四水四定”，让黄河水释放更大价值。

  合理利用黄河水资源是黄河保护的重大课题，为了探索现代化治黄、用黄体系，2023年起宁夏在全国率先开展“以水定城、以水定地、以水定人、以水定产”改革，探索再造一套水资源承载能力与区域经济社会发展相协调、相适应的新模式。

  宁夏首先从算明白水资源家底着手，划定72.84亿立方米取水总量和41.5亿立方米耗水总量的阶段性“红线”。经过全面科学测算，出台用水权管控指标方案，从区域、行业、产业等方面重构水资源配置体系，实行总量控制、指标到县、定额管理。

  宁夏水利厅水资源管理处副处长陈丹说，宁夏已完成用水权工农业确权，共确权末级渠系和地下水取用水户16472个、灌溉面积1058万亩，工业企业3701家。通过“总量管控、定额分配、适宜单元、管理到户”，实现“有多少汤泡多少馍”。

  水指标“紧箍咒”一念，宁夏各地各行业发展均要量水而行，管水手段、用水方式、水生态产品价值实现均发生显著变化。

  “闸门开多大、淌多少水，都能在电脑上远程操控，农田灌溉更加精准高效。”在吴忠市利通区高闸镇，民鑫农业灌溉服务专业合作社理事长梅南薇见证了管水方式从过去“靠经验”到现在“靠科技”。

  用水“锱铢必较”，是因为省下来的水指标能卖成钱。利通区通过高效节水改造，耕地亩均用水量下降15%，节约出来的800万立方米用水权以10年8000万元的价格卖给了吴忠市太阳山工业园区，解了园区新增项目无用水权指标的燃眉之急。如此一来，黄河水从较低产出的农业向高产值的工业“流动”，每一滴黄河水迸发出更大的生产力。

  ——精打细算，拧紧节水“水龙头”。

  节水就是拓发展空间，用水主体自觉千方百计节水。

  宁夏宝丰能源集团股份有限公司是用水大户，拥有水权3800万立方米。“这3800万立方米水权就是红线，不够的话要么去买水权，要么自己想办法省出来。”公司水务负责人陈铭说，企业通过产业耦合、分质利用和工艺革新，实现水资源“取、用、节、排”全流程管理，把节水指标和绩效绑定，引导全员形成节水自觉。去年企业水重复利用率达98.5%，单位产品水耗较区域先进值降低27%以上。

  再生水等非常规水源开发利用，进一步为宁夏节水开源。在吴忠市盐池县，“污水处理—中水提标—湿地净化—雨水收集—水库调蓄—综合利用”的再生水循环利用完整链条，实现了县城污水的全收集、零排放。

  “通过探索推进再生水开发利用，我们完成了3.7万亩城北生态防护林、1.9万亩城区绿化的灌溉水源替换，解决了重点工业企业、饮马湖水系补水等用水需求。”盐池县水务局副局长张宏坤说，当地城市再生水利用率达80%以上，每年可稳定节约新鲜水400万立方米，增效1000万元。

  农业节水增效、工业节水减排、城市节水降损、再生水循环利用……“四水四定”激发了各行各业的节水自觉。近5年，宁夏压减水稻种植面积54.9万亩，农业用水占比下降3.5个百分点；全区51%工业门类的万元工业增加值用水量实现下降，工业水重复利用率达到97.3%。



  宁夏银川市典农河一景（2024 年 6 月 23 日摄） 王鹏摄 / 本刊

  点活绿之金

  好生态是最普惠的民生福祉，也是促进高质量发展的强劲动能。着眼于让越来越秀美的生态“颜值”转变为富民增收的产业“价值”，宁夏通过体制机制改革为生态产品定价，并推进市场化交易，将传统意义的资源劣势、区位劣势和环境劣势转变为高质量发展优势，点活绿之金。

  ——资源环资要素市场定价，“六权”改革助力自然资源全品类定价交易。

  去年9月，一笔特殊的交易发生在六盘山下——作为水土保持项目碳汇出让方，固原市彭阳县盛泽水务投资有限公司与宁夏雅豪新能源科技有限公司签订协议，交易水土保持碳汇3.6万吨，总金额111.6万元。

  这是黄河流域水土保持项目碳汇交易的首单签约，交易收益将反哺彭阳县县域水土保持及生态保护修复项目建设。

  “水土保持造就的好山好水，不仅能长树长草长庄稼，现在还能‘长’出钱来。”彭阳县水土保持工作站站长晁永福介绍说，这次交易的碳汇项目位于彭阳县王洼镇李岔小流域，这里自2000年起连续开展水土流失综合治理。经测算、核证，该流域从2002年到2023年的水土保持碳汇总量为9.3万吨，水土保持生态产品价值转化金额可达300万元以上。

  这笔交易是宁夏“六权”改革的一个缩影。2021年起，宁夏陆续启动用水权、土地权、山林权、排污权、用能权、碳排放权“六权”改革，通过构建确权到位、权能有效、定价合理、入市有序的市场体系，曾经制约宁夏经济发展的关键性资源环境要素，被赋予商品属性、市场属性、金融属性，借助市场这只“看不见的手”实现流转，向高效产业、高质产能聚焦，倒逼产业向低消耗、低污染方式转型。

  截至2024年6月底，宁夏已累计完成“六权”交易4705笔346亿余元，抵押融资43.4亿元。

  今年初，宁夏又发布《关于加快推进“六权”综合改革全面提高要素协同配置效率的实施意见》，进一步提出将建立健全资源环境要素集约协同开发利用机制，引导各类要素协同向绿色低碳产业和先进生产力集聚，拓宽生态优势转化为发展优势新路径。

  ——转观念谋发展，因地制宜化生态区位“劣势”为高质量发展“优势”。

  变绿水青山为金山银山需要改革的加持，更需要观念的转变。宁夏充分发挥主观能动性针对生态区位特色锻造高质量发展长板。

  立足特色挖“卖点”，打造独特文旅品牌。在宁夏，山大沟深则卖“冷凉气候”，南部山区“18℃的夏天”文旅品牌逐渐叫响，每年都成为全国避暑游的热门目的地；三面环沙则卖“瀚海荒凉”，沙漠旅游已成为宁夏金字招牌，被誉为“沙漠水城”的中卫市仅今年5月就接待沙漠旅游板块的游客近600万人次……

  变治为用，科技助力处处皆资源。宁夏平原灌区的盐碱地在技术的加持下成为“金银滩”。银川市贺兰县“以渔治碱”激活土地潜力，通过对黄河灌区大面积盐碱地开发与治理，建成西北最大的南美白对虾设施养殖集群基地。

  “盐碱地水质中含有一定盐度，凭借海虾淡养技术，南美白对虾可以在经过改良的养殖水体内快速适应。同时，南美白对虾也可以从原来的盐碱水中带走大量的盐和碱，一举两得。”宁夏农业农村厅渔业渔政管理局局长唐亮说。

  继南美白对虾、大黄鱼在盐碱水中养殖成功后，宁夏多个县区把盐碱地当作新型资源，从产业链的角度谋划治理方向，陆续开展青蟹、黄鳍鲷、石斑鱼、大西洋鲑等“海鲜陆养”，越来越多盐碱地变成致富田。

  宁夏回族自治区党委主要负责同志说，宁夏始终坚持生态优先、绿色发展，自觉扛起维护西北乃至全国生态安全的重要使命。绿水青山就是金山银山已成为宁夏各族人民的普遍共识和普惠福祉，“塞上江南”必将越来越秀美。
english_translation:
Tourists visit Liupanshan National Forest Park in Guyuan City, Ningxia (Photo taken on August 4, 2024) Photo by Mao Zhu/Our magazine

  Conserving the water vein

  Born and prospered by the Yellow River, Ningxia is the only province in the Yellow River Basin. The Yellow River has been the lifeline of the region since ancient times. It is Ningxia's unshirkable responsibility to protect the Yellow River. Guided by the ecological protection of the Yellow River Basin and the construction of a high-quality development pilot zone, Ningxia has taken a three-pronged approach to water management, water use and water conservation to carefully conserve the water vein.

  ——Comprehensively control pollution and reduce emissions, and carefully manage water to consolidate the ecology.

  Walking into the Yinchuan Yellow River Wetland Park located in Hetan Village, Tonggui Township, Yinchuan City, you can see vast water surface, lush reeds, circling seagulls, and fish diving. It is a great place for water leisure in the suburbs.

  In the memory of the villagers of Hetan Village, wastewater used to flow into the ditch and the stench was overwhelming. In recent years, Yinchuan City has implemented the Binhe River System Wastewater Interception and Purification Wetland Expansion and Connection Project, which integrates the functions of river beach land improvement in the Yellow River flood control area, water system connection, environmental governance, and ecological restoration. This has completely changed the history of stinky water flowing into the Yellow River, and the appearance of Hetan Village has also been changed.

  Ningxia has always viewed its own positioning and development from the perspective of the overall national strategy and the coordinated governance of the Yellow River Basin, and has firmly shouldered the "upstream responsibility". Ningxia insists on coordinating the governance of water resources, water environment, and water ecology, and solidly carries out the investigation and rectification of sewage outlets into the river. 13 black and odorous water bodies in the built-up areas of prefecture-level cities in the region have been treated, and black and odorous water bodies in county-level cities have been dynamically "cleared". The reduction in chemical oxygen demand and ammonia nitrogen key projects has completed the "14th Five-Year Plan" period target task two years ahead of schedule.

  "The water quality of the Ningxia section of the Yellow River has remained Class II for eight consecutive years." Du Peng, deputy director of the Ningxia Department of Ecology and Environment, introduced that in 2024, the water quality of important lakes (reservoirs) along the Yellow River in Ningxia was generally good, and the proportion of excellent water quality was 100%.

  ——Explore the “Four Waters and Four Determinations” to release greater value of the Yellow River water.

  Rational use of the Yellow River water resources is a major issue in the protection of the Yellow River. In order to explore a modern system for the management and use of the Yellow River, Ningxia will take the lead in the country to carry out the "water-based city, water-based land, water-based population, and water-based production" reform starting from 2023, and explore the reconstruction of a new model in which water resources carrying capacity is coordinated and adapted to regional economic and social development.

  Ningxia first started by calculating the water resources and set a phased "red line" of 7.284 billion cubic meters of total water withdrawal and 4.15 billion cubic meters of total water consumption. After comprehensive and scientific calculations, a water rights control indicator plan was issued to reconstruct the water resources allocation system from the aspects of region, industry, and industry, and implement total control, indicators to the county, and quota management.

  Chen Dan, deputy director of the Water Resources Management Department of the Ningxia Water Resources Department, said that Ningxia has completed the industrial and agricultural water rights confirmation, with a total of 16,472 end-canal and groundwater users, 10.58 million mu of irrigation area, and 3,701 industrial enterprises confirmed.
