While "grit their teeth" is an excellent idiom, "make every effort" is too generic for "全力攻坚" (quánlì gōngjiān), which means to storm a fortified position. A stronger translation would be "make an all-out push to overcome key obstacles" or "tackle the toughest challenges head-on.", preserving the military metaphor of tackling the most difficult problems.
11. The term "生动实践" (shēngdòng shíjiàn) is rendered literally as "vivid practice." In this propaganda context, it refers to real-world examples of policy implementation. A more natural English phrasing would be "dynamic examples of implementation" or "vivid real-world efforts.", which is clearer to an English-speaking audience.
12. The idiom "风雨无阻向前进" (fēngyǔ wúzǔ xiàng qián jìn) is translated literally as "Moving forward regardless of wind and rain." A more natural and idiomatic English equivalent would be "Forging ahead, rain or shine" or "Advancing undeterred by any obstacle."

original_text:
题：努力完成全年经济社会发展目标任务——从中央政治局会议看下半年经济工作部署

  新华社“新华视点”记者

  中共中央政治局7月30日召开会议，分析研究当前经济形势，部署下半年经济工作，为完成全年经济社会发展目标任务、实现“十四五”圆满收官指明了前进方向。

  巩固拓展经济回升向好势头

  今年上半年，面对更趋复杂严峻的外部环境，我国经济顶住压力、迎难而上，国内生产总值（GDP）同比增长5.3%，主要经济指标表现良好，高质量发展取得新成效。

  此次中央政治局会议指出，今年以来，“我国经济展现强大活力和韧性”，同时指出，“当前我国经济运行依然面临不少风险挑战”。

  “要正确把握形势，增强忧患意识，坚持底线思维，用好发展机遇、潜力和优势，巩固拓展经济回升向好势头。”会议作出重要判断。

  国家发展改革委宏观经济研究院研究员张林山表示，会议科学分析研判当前经济形势，既看到成绩，也不回避问题，强调从底线思维出发部署应对风险挑战之策，更好统筹发展和安全、着力激活经济发展潜力，有助于引导社会预期，切实增强做好经济工作的责任感和紧迫感。

  “保持政策连续性稳定性，增强灵活性预见性”“着力稳就业、稳企业、稳市场、稳预期”“有力促进国内国际双循环”……会议作出一系列重要部署。

  宏观政策持续发力、适时加力

  宏观政策是护航经济稳定运行的重要手段。会议指出，“宏观政策要持续发力、适时加力”“要落实落细更加积极的财政政策和适度宽松的货币政策”。

  “会议的重要部署，表明我国宏观政策空间大、工具箱充足。”中国财政科学研究院院长杨志勇说。

  会议明确作出“加快政府债券发行使用，提高资金使用效率”“兜牢基层‘三保’底线”等多项部署。

  杨志勇表示，今年以来，财政政策更加积极，更加注重惠民生、促消费、增后劲，为经济社会发展提供有力支撑。根据会议部署，财政政策要落实落细、债券资金使用要提效，要通过推进财政科学管理，让财政政策释放更大效能。

  货币政策要保持流动性充裕，促进社会综合融资成本下行；用好各项结构性货币政策工具，加力支持科技创新、提振消费、小微企业、稳定外贸等……会议就货币政策作出一系列针对性部署。

  在清华大学国家金融研究院院长田轩看来，下半年货币政策持续发力且方向明确。一方面保持流动性充裕，金融总量有望合理增长；另一方面促进社会综合融资成本下行，贷款利率或将维持低位。

  有效释放内需潜力

  外部环境越是复杂严峻，越要把做强国内大循环摆在更加突出的位置，通过扩大内需稳定经济运行、应对外部冲击。会议强调，“要有效释放内需潜力”。

  今年上半年，最终消费支出对经济增长贡献率达52%，消费“主引擎”作用进一步凸显。

  会议强调，“深入实施提振消费专项行动，在扩大商品消费的同时，培育服务消费新的增长点”。

  “近年来，国内服务消费需求迅速增长，但有效率、高质量的服务供给还不足，尽快补齐医疗、养老、托育等方面短板，有助于打开更广阔的内需空间。”习近平经济思想研究中心副主任王蕴说。

  “会议特别强调在保障改善民生中扩大消费需求。”清华大学中国发展规划研究院常务副院长董煜表示，服务业涉及量大面广的中小微企业，培育扩大服务消费不仅有利于稳就业，也将进一步改善百姓生活品质，形成经济发展与民生改善的良性循环。

  投资是扩大内需的重要抓手。会议指出，高质量推动“两重”建设，激发民间投资活力，扩大有效投资。

  “‘两重’建设不仅是基础设施投资的重要支撑，也给相关领域上下游产业链带来新的增长空间。发挥‘两重’政策效能，激发民间投资活力，将为经济增长注入强劲动能。”董煜说。

  坚定不移深化改革

  越是面临困难挑战，越是要向改革要动力。会议指出，“要坚定不移深化改革”。

  “坚持以科技创新引领新质生产力发展”“纵深推进全国统一大市场建设，推动市场竞争秩序持续优化”“依法依规治理企业无序竞争”“推进重点行业产能治理”“规范地方招商引资行为”……会议部署一系列重要改革举措。

  在中国信息通信研究院政策与经济研究所所长辛勇飞看来，这一系列改革部署突出问题导向，有效回应了各方关切。落实落细会议部署，将进一步畅通国民经济循环，提高资源配置效率，增强我国经济发展内生动能。

  “落实好会议部署，要持续推动科技体制改革，加快构建产学研深度融合格局，促进劳动、资本、技术、数据等生产要素向发展新质生产力集聚。”辛勇飞说。

  促进民营经济健康发展、高质量发展，是全面深化改革的重要内容。会议强调，坚持“两个毫不动摇”，激发各类经营主体活力。

  “扎扎实实落实各项助企纾困政策，持续优化营商环境，促进民营经济健康发展，将为高质量发展提供源源不断的推动力。”张林山说。

  扩大高水平对外开放

  会议强调“要扩大高水平对外开放，稳住外贸外资基本盘”，彰显我国扩大高水平对外开放的决心。

  会议要求，帮助受冲击较大的外贸企业，强化融资支持，促进内外贸一体化发展。

  对外经济贸易大学教授庄芮说，稳外贸关键在于增强外贸新动能新优势。外贸企业要加快攀“高”向“新”步伐，推动产业升级，提升产品竞争力。与此同时，要用好用足现有政策红利，运用新技术发展跨境电商等新业态，积极参加境内外各类展会，提升综合竞争力。

  “优化出口退税政策”“高水平建设自贸试验区等开放平台”……一系列重要部署旨在为外贸企业营造可预期、更优质的营商环境。

  持续防范化解重点领域风险

  统筹发展和安全，才能确保经济行稳致远。会议强调，要持续防范化解重点领域风险。

  会议指出，落实好中央城市工作会议精神，高质量开展城市更新。

  上海交通大学住房与城乡建设研究中心主任陈杰说，城市更新已成为城市发展的重要转折点。开展城市更新，有助于存量提质增效、激活内需，持续巩固房地产市场稳定态势，推动房地产行业转型升级。各地应坚持因地制宜，探索高质量城市更新实践路径。

  会议指出，积极稳妥化解地方政府债务风险，严禁新增隐性债务，有力有序有效推进地方融资平台出清。

  杨志勇说，地方债务风险化解仍需贯彻落实党中央部署，坚决遏制新增隐性债务，稳步化解存量债务。推进融资平台风险出清，将有力清除隐性债务滋生的“温床”，为地方财政高质量发展提供有力支持。

  会议还对资本市场作出部署，提出“增强国内资本市场的吸引力和包容性，巩固资本市场回稳向好势头”。

  中山大学岭南学院教授韩乾表示，未来一段时间，资本市场内外部环境仍然错综复杂，困难挑战不少。会议的相关部署，将有力推动资本市场稳健发展，持续提升资本市场吸引力、竞争力。

  扎实做好民生保障工作

  会议强调“要扎实做好民生保障工作”，既体现了一以贯之的要求，也释放出持续增进民生福祉、让发展成果更多更公平惠及全体人民的鲜明信号。

  当前，正值高校毕业生离校就业季。会议强调，突出就业优先政策导向，促进高校毕业生、退役军人、农民工等重点群体就业。

  人力资源社会保障部政策研究司司长崔鹏程表示，将会同有关方面推进政策落实、服务提效，促进毕业生更好就业。同时，积极开展农民工稳岗就业专项行动，加强输入输出地信息衔接，稳定务工规模。

  会议强调“始终把人民群众生命安全放在第一位”。“加强安全生产和食品安全监管”“全力做好防汛应急抢险救灾”“保障迎峰度夏期间能源电力供应”……一系列重要部署织密织牢民生保障安全网。

  今年也是“十五五”规划谋篇布局之年。会议指出，“十五五”时期是基本实现社会主义现代化夯实基础、全面发力的关键时期，要求“做好‘十五五’规划编制工作”。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, July 30 (Xinhua ) -- Striving to Complete the Annual Goals and Tasks for Economic and Social Development -- Analyzing the Economic Work Plan for the Second Half of the Year from the Politburo Meeting of the CPC Central Committee

  Xinhua News Agency "Xinhua Viewpoint" reporter

  The Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee held a meeting on July 30 to analyze and study the current economic situation, deploy economic work in the second half of the year, and point out the way forward for completing the annual economic and social development goals and tasks and achieving a successful conclusion of the "14th Five-Year Plan".

  Consolidate and expand the positive momentum of economic recovery

  In the first half of this year, faced with an increasingly complex and severe external environment, my country's economy withstood the pressure and rose to the challenge. The gross domestic product (GDP) grew by 5.3% year-on-year, major economic indicators performed well, and new achievements were made in high-quality development.

  The meeting of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee pointed out that since the beginning of this year, "my country's economy has demonstrated strong vitality and resilience", and also pointed out that "my country's current economic operation still faces many risks and challenges."

  "We must correctly grasp the situation, enhance our sense of crisis, adhere to bottom-line thinking, make good use of development opportunities, potential and advantages, and consolidate and expand the momentum of economic recovery." The meeting made an important judgment.

  Zhang Linshan, a researcher at the Macroeconomic Research Institute of the National Development and Reform Commission, said that the meeting scientifically analyzed and assessed the current economic situation, not only seeing the achievements but also not avoiding problems. It emphasized the deployment of strategies to deal with risks and challenges based on bottom-line thinking, better coordinating development and security, and focusing on activating economic development potential. It will help guide social expectations and effectively enhance the sense of responsibility and urgency in doing a good job in economic work.

  "Maintain policy continuity and stability, and enhance flexibility and foresight", "focus on stabilizing employment, stabilizing enterprises, stabilizing the market, and stabilizing expectations", "vigorously promote domestic and international dual circulation"... The meeting made a series of important deployments.

  Macroeconomic policies continue to exert force and strengthen them at the right time

  Macroeconomic policies are an important means of safeguarding the stable operation of the economy. The meeting pointed out that "macroeconomic policies must continue to exert their force and be strengthened at the appropriate time" and that "a more proactive fiscal policy and a moderately loose monetary policy must be implemented in detail."

  "The important arrangements of the meeting show that my country has ample macro-policy space and a sufficient toolbox," said Yang Zhiyong, president of the Chinese Academy of Fiscal Sciences.

  The meeting clearly made a number of arrangements, including "accelerating the issuance and use of government bonds, improving the efficiency of fund use" and "ensuring the bottom line of the 'three guarantees' at the grassroots level."

  Yang Zhiyong stated that since the beginning of this year, fiscal policy has become more proactive, focusing more on improving people's livelihoods, promoting consumption, and increasing stamina, providing strong support for economic and social development. According to the meeting's arrangements, fiscal policy must be implemented in detail, the use of bond funds must be more efficient, and by promoting scientific fiscal management, fiscal policy must be made more effective.

  Monetary policy should maintain ample liquidity and promote a downward trend in the overall social financing costs; make good use of various structural monetary policy tools, increase support for scientific and technological innovation, boost consumption, small and micro enterprises, stabilize foreign trade, etc. The meeting made a series of targeted deployments on monetary policy.

  Tian Xuan, Dean of the National Institute of Finance at Tsinghua University, believes that monetary policy will continue to exert force in the second half of the year and its direction is clear. On the one hand, it will maintain ample liquidity, and the total amount of finance is expected to grow reasonably; on the other hand, it will promote a decline in overall social financing costs, and loan interest rates are likely to remain low.

  Effectively release the potential of domestic demand

  The more complex and severe the external environment becomes, the more prominent the need is to strengthen the domestic circulation, stabilize economic operations and respond to external shocks by expanding domestic demand. The meeting emphasized the need to effectively unleash the potential of domestic demand.

  In the first half of this year, final consumption expenditure contributed 52% to economic growth, and the role of consumption as the "main engine" was further highlighted.

  The meeting emphasized that "we should implement special actions to boost consumption in depth, and cultivate new growth points for service consumption while expanding commodity consumption."

  "In recent years, domestic demand for service consumption has grown rapidly, but the supply of efficient and high-quality services is still insufficient. Filling the gaps in medical care, elderly care, childcare and other areas as soon as possible will help open up a broader space for domestic demand," said Wang Yun, deputy director of the Xi Jinping Economic Thought Research Center.

  "The meeting particularly emphasized expanding consumer demand while ensuring and improving people's livelihood." Dong Yu, executive vice president of the China Development Research Institute of Tsinghua University, said that the service industry involves a large number of small and medium-sized enterprises. Cultivating and expanding service consumption will not only help stabilize employment, but will also further improve people's quality of life and form a virtuous circle of economic development and improvement of people's livelihood.

  Investment is an important tool for expanding domestic demand. The meeting pointed out that high-quality promotion of "double-digit" construction should be promoted to stimulate the vitality of private investment and expand effective investment.

  "'Dual-level' construction is not only an important support for infrastructure investment, but also brings new growth space to the upstream and downstream industrial chains in related fields. Giving full play to the effectiveness of the 'dual-level' policy and stimulating the vitality of private investment will inject strong momentum into economic growth." Dong Yu said.

  Unswervingly deepen reform

  The more difficult and challenging we are, the more we need to seek momentum from reform. The meeting pointed out that "we must unswervingly deepen reform."

  "Adhere to scientific and technological innovation to lead the development of new quality productivity", "Deepen the construction of a unified national market and promote the continuous optimization of market competition order", "Govern disorderly competition among enterprises in accordance with laws and regulations", "Promote production capacity governance in key industries", "Standardize local investment promotion behavior"... The meeting deployed a series of important reform measures.

  Xin Yongfei, director of the Policy and Economics Research Institute at the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology, believes this series of reforms is problem-oriented and effectively addresses the concerns of all parties. Detailed implementation of the conference arrangements will further streamline the national economic cycle, improve resource allocation efficiency, and enhance the endogenous driving force of my country's economic development.

  "To implement the arrangements of the meeting, we must continue to promote the reform of the science and technology system, accelerate the construction of a deep integration pattern of industry, academia and research, and promote the gathering of production factors such as labor, capital, technology, and data to develop new quality productive forces." Xin Yongfei said.

  Promoting the healthy and high-quality development of the private economy is an important part of comprehensively deepening reform. The meeting emphasized the need to adhere to the "two unshakable" principles and stimulate the vitality of various business entities.

  "Solidly implementing various policies to help enterprises and alleviate their difficulties, continuously optimizing the business environment, and promoting the healthy development of the private economy will provide a continuous driving force for high-quality development," said Zhang Linshan.

  Expand high-level opening up to the outside world

  The meeting emphasized that "we must expand high-level opening up to the outside world and stabilize the basic foundation of foreign trade and foreign investment", demonstrating my country's determination to expand high-level opening up to the outside world.

  The meeting called for helping foreign trade enterprises that have been hit hard, strengthening financing support, and promoting the integrated development of domestic and foreign trade.

  Professor Zhuang Rui of the University of International Business and Economics stated that the key to stabilizing foreign trade lies in enhancing new drivers and advantages. Foreign trade companies should accelerate their pace of growth, promote industrial upgrading, and enhance product competitiveness. At the same time, they should fully leverage existing policy dividends, apply new technologies to develop new business models such as cross-border e-commerce, and actively participate in various domestic and international exhibitions to enhance their overall competitiveness.

  "Optimize export tax rebate policies", "build high-level open platforms such as free trade pilot zones" ... a series of important deployments aim to create a predictable and higher-quality business environment for foreign trade companies.

  Continue to prevent and resolve risks in key areas

  Only by coordinating development and security can we ensure the long-term stability of the economy. The meeting stressed the need to continuously prevent and resolve risks in key areas.

  The meeting pointed out that it is necessary to implement the spirit of the Central Urban Work Conference and carry out urban renewal with high quality.

  Chen Jie, director of the Housing and Urban-Rural Development Research Center at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, stated that urban renewal has become a crucial turning point in urban development. Urban renewal will help improve the quality and efficiency of existing properties, stimulate domestic demand, maintain the stability of the real estate market, and promote the transformation and upgrading of the real estate industry. Local governments should adhere to local conditions and explore practical paths for high-quality urban renewal.

  The meeting pointed out that it is necessary to actively and steadily resolve local government debt risks, strictly prohibit the creation of new hidden debts, and vigorously, orderly and effectively promote the clearing of local financing platforms.

  Yang Zhiyong stated that resolving local debt risks still requires implementing the Party Central Committee's deployment, resolutely curbing new hidden debt, and steadily resolving existing debt. Promoting the elimination of risks in financing platforms will effectively eliminate the breeding ground for hidden debt and provide strong support for high-quality development of local finances.

  The meeting also made arrangements for the capital market, proposing to "enhance the attractiveness and inclusiveness of the domestic capital market and consolidate the capital market's momentum of stabilization and improvement."

  Han Qian, a professor at the Lingnan College of Sun Yat-sen University, said that the internal and external environment of the capital market will remain complex and face many difficulties and challenges in the coming period. The relevant arrangements made at the meeting will effectively promote the steady development of the capital market and continuously enhance its attractiveness and competitiveness.

  Do a solid job in ensuring people's livelihood

  The meeting emphasized that "we must do a solid job in ensuring people's livelihood," which not only reflects a consistent requirement, but also sends a clear signal of continuously improving people's livelihood and allowing the fruits of development to benefit all people more and more equitably.

  It is currently the job-seeking season for college graduates. The meeting emphasized the importance of prioritizing employment policies and promoting employment for key groups such as college graduates, retired military personnel, and migrant workers.

  Cui Pengcheng, Director of the Policy Research Department of the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security, stated that the ministry will work with relevant parties to promote policy implementation and improve service efficiency to promote better employment for graduates. Meanwhile, the ministry will actively carry out special actions to stabilize the employment of migrant workers, strengthen information connection between input and output areas, and stabilize the scale of employment.

  The meeting emphasized "always prioritizing the safety of people's lives." A series of important deployments, including "strengthening production safety and food safety supervision," "making every effort to prevent floods, respond to emergencies, and provide disaster relief," and "ensuring energy and power supply during the peak summer season," have woven a tight and secure safety net for people's livelihoods.

  This year is also the year for planning and laying out the 15th Five-Year Plan. The meeting pointed out that the 15th Five-Year Plan period is a critical period for basically achieving socialist modernization and consolidating the foundation and making comprehensive efforts, and called for "doing a good job in the preparation of the 15th Five-Year Plan.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The term "部署" (bùshǔ) in the title is translated as "Work Plan." A more direct translation like "Arrangements" or "Deployments" would better capture the authoritative, top-down tone of a Politburo meeting announcement.
2. The phrase "增强忧患意识" (zēngqiáng yōuhuàn yìshí) is translated as "enhance our sense of crisis." A more nuanced translation would be "enhance the awareness of potential hardships" or "strengthen the sense of vigilance," as "忧患" implies a broader concern for potential difficulties rather than an immediate crisis.
3. The official phrase "落实落细" (luòshí luòxì) is translated as "implemented in detail." This misses the dual emphasis. A better rendering is "ensuring thorough and meticulous implementation," which captures both the completeness (`落实`) and the detailed attention (`落细`).
4. The term "'三保'底线" (sānbǎo dǐxiàn) is translated as "the 'three guarantees' at the grassroots level" without clarifying the term. In a refined translation, this specific jargon should be clarified as the guarantees for "basic livelihoods, salaries, and government operations" to provide necessary context.
5. The phrase `“两重”建设` (liǎng zhòng jiànshè) is critically mistranslated first as "'double-digit' construction" and then inconsistently as "'dual-level' construction." This term is an abbreviation for major national strategic projects and security capacity building. It should be accurately translated as "construction of the 'Two Major' initiatives" or "key national projects."
6. The term `新质生产力` (xīn zhì shēngchǎnlì) is translated as "new quality productivity." The more established and precise translation is "new quality productive forces," which better conveys the concept of new economic drivers (technology, data, etc.) rather than just an improvement in output quality.
7. The political principle "两个毫不动摇" (liǎng ge háo bù dòngyáo) is translated as "the 'two unshakable' principles" without context. A more informative translation would note that this refers to the principles of unshakably developing the public sector and unshakably supporting the non-public sector.
8. The phrase `攀“高”向“新”步伐` (pān “gāo” xiàng “xīn” bùfá) is oversimplified as "pace of growth." This translation completely loses the specific strategic direction. It should be translated as "accelerate the pace of advancing toward 'high-end' industries and 'new' technologies" to reflect the goal of industrial upgrading.
9. The idiom `行稳致远` (xíng wěn zhì yuǎn) is translated as "long-term stability." This loses the dynamic sense of the original, which means "to walk steadily and go far." A better translation is "to ensure steady and sustained progress," capturing both present stability and long-term momentum.
10. The term `出清` (chūqīng) in `地方融资平台出清` is translated as "clearing." This is ambiguous. A more precise translation would be "the winding down of" or "market exit of" local financing platforms, clarifying the intended action of resolving these entities.
11. The term `务工` (wùgōng) in `稳定务工规模` is translated generally as "employment." However, `务工` specifically refers to migrant labor. The translation should be more precise: "stabilize the scale of migrant worker employment."
12. The phrase `在保障改善民生中扩大消费需求` is translated as "expanding consumer demand while ensuring and improving people's livelihood." The preposition `中` (zhōng) implies a causal link. A better translation is "expanding consumer demand *through* the process of guaranteeing and improving people's livelihoods."

original_text:
新华社北京8月4日电 题：乘风破浪！中国外贸奋力交出“韧性答卷”

  新华社记者邹多为、丁乐、张璇

  “十四五”期间，中国货物贸易规模连续跨过5万亿美元、6万亿美元两个台阶，稳居全球第一；服务贸易规模首破1万亿美元，位居全球第二；出口、进口国际市场份额稳定在14%和10%以上……经贸大国地位进一步巩固。

  眼下，“十四五”规划主要目标指标进入冲刺收官阶段。迎难而上、聚力攻坚，以创新优质的产品、多元稳定的市场、抢抓机遇的拼劲，中国外贸在“风高浪急”中乘风破浪，奋力交出一张质量高、成色足的“韧性答卷”。

  顶压前行，勇立潮头破困局

  2026年美加墨世界杯的战鼓还未擂响，“义乌制造”已率先“破门”全球市场。据义乌海关统计，2025年上半年，义乌体育用品及设备出口58.6亿元，同比增长16.8%，其中对美加墨等地的体育用品出口增长12.0%。

  申请设计专利、针对不同市场定制产品、借赛事加速品牌出海……“世界超市”义乌从设计端到生产端的全链条敏捷响应，恰是我国外贸顶压前行、化危为机的鲜活例证。

  事非经过不知难。这几年，全球单边主义、保护主义升温，外部环境复杂性、严峻性、不确定性增加，但我国外贸实现逆势增长。与“十三五”末的2020年相比，2024年我国货物贸易进出口总值增长32.4%，知识密集型服务贸易额增长38%，可数字化交付的服务进出口额增长近四成……外贸韧性与活力凸显。

  “外贸之路既非坦途也非遥不可及，我们提前做好技术储备、积极延伸产业链布局，不断提高全球制造、全球服务、全球合作的能力。”谈起面对海内外竞争加剧、材料供应波动等“闯关”经历，惠州亿纬锂能股份有限公司财务中心运营部总监朱小军感慨万千。

  商务部部长王文涛表示，越是困难大、挑战多，越能体现我国制度优势、庞大市场和完备产业体系优势，越能展现我国经济的广阔潜力、强大韧性和强劲活力，越能彰显我国负责任大国的责任担当。

  以变应变，创新提质强支撑

  炎炎夏日，空调、风扇、遮阳伞等“清凉产品”成为热门出口商品。走进江苏腾魄休闲用品有限公司，各种型号规格、造型新颖别致的庭院伞整齐排列。

  “依托智能化技术，这些可调节角度、带照明级电动旋转功能的产品，可实现对不同时段阳光角度的遮蔽，在海外市场很受欢迎。”公司关务负责人王芳说，今年以来，企业的高端定制户外遮阳用品已远销海外50多个国家和地区，目前公司出口货值近8000万元，同比增长50%以上。

  从拼“量”拼“价”，到竞“智”逐“新”，我国外贸经历了深刻的结构性变革，“质升”“质优”成为显著标识。

  据统计，2024年，货物贸易中高技术产品出口占比达到18.2%；今年上半年，我国高技术产品出口同比增长9.2%，连续9个月保持增长，其中自主品牌在高技术产品出口中的占比提升至32.4%。

  “中国制造业正突破关键核心技术壁垒，在全球价值链中完成能级跃升。”中国国际经济交流中心科研信息部副部长刘向东说，电动汽车、船舶、工业机器人等产品的崛起重塑了我国出口竞争力，即便面对关税压力仍能有效稳住市场。国货潮品走俏，也让各国充分感受到中国的生产力、创新力。

  走出“舒适区”，培育新增量。面对地缘政治风险和贸易壁垒，以跨境电商、保税维修、市场采购等为代表的新业态新模式助力各国消费者、生产者“买全球、卖全球”，成为稳外贸的重要引擎。

  数据显示，2024年我国跨境电商进出口2.7万亿元，比2020年增长67%；今年上半年，全国保税维修业务进出口货值同比增长7.5%，进一步释放外贸增长潜力。

  叠加发力，开放引领再出发

  “等不是办法，得主动找新航道！”山西嘉世达机器人技术有限公司董事长牛立群告诉记者，近段时间，为了更好应对外部冲击，公司果断开拓欧洲和新兴市场。虽然过程并非一帆风顺，但在安排展会、关税减让、优惠贷款、信用担保等政策“组合拳”支持下，来自多国的订单已排到四季度。

  开放带来进步，合作才能共赢。我国是150多个国家和地区的主要贸易伙伴，2024年，我国与共建“一带一路”国家贸易比重已超过50%。今年上半年，我国对190多个国家和地区进出口实现增长，贸易规模超过500亿元的伙伴数量达到61个，比去年同期增加5个。

  加快发展服务贸易，正是扩大高水平对外开放、培育外贸发展新动能的重要抓手。

  还有不到40天，2025年中国国际服务贸易交易会（服贸会）将在北京举行。目前公布的首批参展商名单中，共有648家企业机构，参展企业整体国际化率超过20%。

  举办消博会、进博会、广交会、链博会等重点展会，扩大面向全球的高标准自贸区网络和对最不发达国家单边开放，加快与东盟等有关国家和地区自贸协定谈判进程……国际经济秩序和治理体系面临严重冲击下，我国进一步发挥政策叠加优势，对接国际高标准经贸规则，稳步扩大制度型开放，为贸易强国建设注入不竭动力。

  开放的土地，永不惧风浪。王文涛表示，展望“十五五”，将更大力度推进贸易高质量发展，壮大创新动能，加大力度扩大进口，加强国际合作，增强贸易韧性，努力构建开放合作、共同发展、互利共赢的国际贸易格局。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, August 4th, Title : Riding the Wind and Waves! China's Foreign Trade Strives to Deliver a "Resilient Answer"

  Xinhua News Agency reporters Zou Duowei, Ding Le and Zhang Xuan

  During the 14th Five-Year Plan period, China's goods trade volume has successively crossed the two thresholds of US$5 trillion and US$6 trillion, ranking first in the world; the scale of service trade has exceeded US$1 trillion for the first time, ranking second in the world; the export and import international market shares have remained stable at 14% and above 10%... The status of a major economic and trade power has been further consolidated.

  The key targets of the 14th Five-Year Plan are now entering their final sprint. China's foreign trade sector has bravely faced challenges, focused on overcoming challenges, and driven by innovation, high-quality products, a diversified and stable market, and a relentless drive to seize opportunities. The country is forging ahead despite the storm, striving to deliver a high-quality and resilient performance.

  Moving forward against pressure, standing at the forefront and breaking through difficulties

  Even before the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Mexico City and the US has begun, "Made in Yiwu" products have already taken the lead in breaking into the global market. According to Yiwu Customs, in the first half of 2025, Yiwu's exports of sporting goods and equipment reached 5.86 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 16.8%, with exports of sporting goods to the US, Canada, Mexico, and other countries increasing by 12.0%.

  Applying for design patents, customizing products for different markets, using events to accelerate brand expansion overseas... Yiwu, the "world supermarket", responds agilely across the entire chain from design to production, which is a vivid example of my country's foreign trade forging ahead under pressure and turning crises into opportunities.

  One never knows how difficult something is until they've experienced it. In recent years, despite the rise of global unilateralism and protectionism, and the increasing complexity, severity, and uncertainty of the external environment, my country's foreign trade has achieved growth against the trend. Compared to 2020, the end of the 13th Five-Year Plan, my country's total import and export value of goods in 2024 will increase by 32.4%, knowledge-intensive services trade will increase by 38%, and digitally deliverable services import and export will increase by nearly 40%, highlighting the resilience and vitality of foreign trade.

  "The road to foreign trade is neither smooth nor out of reach. We have made technological preparations in advance, actively extended the industrial chain layout, and continuously improved our global manufacturing, global service, and global cooperation capabilities." Talking about the experience of "breaking through" in the face of intensified competition at home and abroad and fluctuations in material supply, Zhu Xiaojun, director of the operations department of the financial center of Huizhou Yiwei Lithium Energy Co., Ltd., was full of emotion.

  Minister of Commerce Wang Wentao said that the greater the difficulties and the more challenges there are, the more it can reflect my country's institutional advantages, huge market and complete industrial system advantages, the more it can demonstrate the vast potential, strong resilience and strong vitality of my country's economy, and the more it can demonstrate my country's responsibility as a responsible major country.

  Adapt to changes, innovate and improve quality to provide strong support

  In the scorching summer, cooling products such as air conditioners, fans, and parasols have become popular export commodities. At Jiangsu Tengpo Leisure Products Co., Ltd., a variety of models and specifications, with novel and unique designs, are neatly arranged.

  "Relying on intelligent technology, these products with adjustable angles and lighting-level electric rotation functions can block sunlight at different angles during different periods of time and are very popular in overseas markets." Wang Fang, the company's customs manager, said that since the beginning of this year, the company's high-end customized outdoor sunshade products have been exported to more than 50 countries and regions overseas. The company's current export value is nearly 80 million yuan, an increase of more than 50% year-on-year.

  From competing in "quantity" and "price" to competing in "intelligence" and pursuing "innovation", my country's foreign trade has undergone profound structural changes, with "quality improvement" and "high quality" becoming its prominent characteristics.

  According to statistics, in 2024, the export of high-tech products in goods trade accounted for 18.2%; in the first half of this year, my country's exports of high-tech products increased by 9.2% year-on-year, maintaining growth for 9 consecutive months, among which the proportion of domestic brands in high-tech product exports increased to 32.4%.

  "China's manufacturing industry is breaking through barriers to key core technologies and leaping up the global value chain," said Liu Xiangdong, deputy director of the Research and Information Department of the China Center for International Economic Exchanges. The rise of products like electric vehicles, ships, and industrial robots has reshaped my country's export competitiveness, effectively stabilizing the market even in the face of tariff pressure. The popularity of trendy Chinese products has also allowed other countries to fully appreciate China's productivity and innovation.

  Stepping out of the "comfort zone" and cultivating new growth. Faced with geopolitical risks and trade barriers, new business formats and models, such as cross-border e-commerce, bonded maintenance, and market procurement, are helping consumers and producers around the world "buy and sell globally," becoming a key engine for stabilizing foreign trade.

  Data shows that my country's cross-border e-commerce imports and exports reached 2.7 trillion yuan in 2024, a 67% increase over 2020; in the first half of this year, the value of imports and exports of bonded maintenance business nationwide increased by 7.5% year-on-year, further releasing the potential for foreign trade growth.

  Combined efforts, opening up leads to a new start

  "Waiting isn't an option; we need to proactively find new opportunities!" Niu Liqun, Chairman of Shanxi Jiashida Robot Technology Co., Ltd., told reporters. To better cope with external shocks, the company has recently made decisive moves to expand into Europe and emerging markets. While the process hasn't been smooth sailing, thanks to a combination of policies, including exhibitions, tariff reductions, preferential loans, and credit guarantees, orders from many countries are already booked into the fourth quarter.

  Openness brings progress, and cooperation leads to win-win results. my country is the main trading partner of more than 150 countries and regions. By 2024, the proportion of my country's trade with countries participating in the Belt and Road Initiative exceeded 50%. In the first half of this year, my country's imports and exports with more than 190 countries and regions increased, and the number of partners with trade exceeding 50 billion yuan reached 61, an increase of 5 over the same period last year.

  Accelerating the development of service trade is an important means to expand high-level opening up to the outside world and cultivate new momentum for foreign trade development.

  In less than 40 days, the 2025 China International Fair for Trade in Services (CIFTIS) will be held in Beijing. The first batch of exhibitors announced so far includes 648 companies and institutions, with an overall internationalization rate of over 20%.

  We will hold key exhibitions such as the China International Consumer Products Expo, the China International Import Expo, the Canton Fair, and the China International Chain Exhibition, expand the global network of high-standard free trade zones and unilateral opening to the least developed countries, and accelerate the negotiation process of free trade agreements with relevant countries and regions such as ASEAN... As the international economic order and governance system face severe shocks, my country will further leverage the advantages of policy superposition, connect with international high-standard economic and trade rules, steadily expand institutional opening up, and inject inexhaustible impetus into the construction of a trading power.

  An open land is never afraid of storms. Wang Wentao stated that looking ahead to the 15th Five-Year Plan, greater efforts will be made to promote high-quality trade development, strengthen innovation momentum, increase imports, strengthen international cooperation, enhance trade resilience, and strive to build an international trade landscape characterized by openness, cooperation, common development, and mutual benefit.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The metaphorical phrase "交出‘韧性答卷’" (jiāochū 'rènxìng dájuàn'), translated as "Deliver a 'Resilient Answer'", loses some nuance. The original implies successfully completing a test. A more evocative translation would be "delivering a powerful testament to its resilience" or "passing the test of resilience with flying colors," better capturing the sense of meeting a significant challenge.
2. The parallel phrase "迎难而上、聚力攻坚" (yíng nán ér shàng, jù lì gōng jiān) is rendered as "bravely faced challenges, focused on overcoming challenges," which is repetitive. A more dynamic and concise translation like "advancing against headwinds and concentrating efforts on key challenges" would better reflect the forceful tone of the original.
3. The expression "质量高、成色足" (zhìliàng gāo, chéngsè zú) is translated as "high-quality and resilient." The term "成色足" is a metaphor from metallurgy meaning "of high purity" or "substantial." A better translation would be "of high quality and true substance," which preserves the distinct metaphorical layers of the original phrase.
4. In the sentence about Yiwu, the term "破门" (pò mén) is a direct reference to scoring a goal in soccer, creating a clever pun related to the World Cup theme. The translation "breaking into the global market" conveys the general meaning but completely loses this witty and context-specific wordplay.
5. The term "闯关" (chuǎng guān), translated as "breaking through," literally means "passing through gates/levels," as in a video game. This implies overcoming a series of distinct obstacles. A more nuanced translation like "navigating a series of hurdles" or "clearing successive challenges" would better capture this sense of a sequential struggle.
6. The parallel structure "越能体现...越能展现...越能彰显..." (yuè néng tǐxiàn... yuè néng zhǎnxiàn... yuè néng zhāngxiǎn) is translated using "reflect... demonstrate... and demonstrate." The original uses three distinct verbs. A better translation would use varied synonyms like "the more it can reflect... the more it can showcase... and the more it can manifest..." to mirror the original's stylistic variation.
7. The phrase "负责任大国的责任担当" (fùzérèn dàguó de zérèn dāndāng) is translated as "responsibility as a responsible major country," which is stylistically redundant in English. A smoother rendering would be "shouldering the duties of a responsible major power" or "fulfilling its commitment as a responsible major country."
8. The heading "以变应变，创新提质强支撑" (yǐ biàn yìng biàn, chuàngxīn tízhì qiáng zhīchēng) is translated literally. A more idiomatic and punchy English heading would be "Adapting and Innovating to Bolster Growth" or "Strengthening Support through Dynamic Innovation."
9. The phrase "从拼“量”拼“价”，到竞“智”逐“新”" describes a strategic shift. The verb "拼" (pīn) implies a tough, desperate fight, whereas "竞" (jìng) and "逐" (zhú) suggest a more sophisticated race or pursuit. The translation uses "competing" for both, losing this shift in intensity. A better version would be "from battling on 'quantity' and 'price' to competing on 'intelligence' and 'innovation'."
10. The term "国货潮品" (guóhuò cháopǐn) is translated as "trendy Chinese products." This translation misses the connection to the specific cultural phenomenon known in China as "Guochao" (国潮), which refers to the rising popularity of fashionable, high-quality domestic brands. A more culturally aware translation could be "the 'Guochao' trend of fashionable domestic goods" or "the boom in trendy national brands."
11. The phrase "主动找新航道" (zhǔdòng zhǎo xīn hángdào) is translated as "proactively find new opportunities." The original uses the specific metaphor of finding a "new shipping lane" or "new course" (新航道). Preserving this imagery with a translation like "proactively charting new courses" or "seeking out new channels" would be more faithful to the original's figurative language.
12. The term "政策“组合拳”" (zhèngcè 'zǔhé quán'), a boxing metaphor for a "combination punch," is translated as "combination of policies." This is functionally correct but loses the metaphor's dynamism. A more evocative translation would be "a policy one-two punch" or "a coordinated policy offensive."
13. The recurring use of "my country" to translate "我国" (wǒ guó) is a direct, literal choice that reflects the source text's first-person national perspective. However, in formal English news writing, using "China" or "the country" is more conventional and maintains a more objective tone for an international audience.
14. The term "政策叠加优势" (zhèngcè diéjiā yōushì) is translated as "advantages of policy superposition." "Policy superposition" is overly technical and literal. A more natural and understandable English phrasing would be "the synergistic advantages of multiple policies" or "the combined impact of various policies."

original_text:
8月1日，国家发展改革委在北京召开新闻发布会，解读当前经济形势和经济工作。新华社记者 陈晔华 摄

  新华社北京8月1日电 题：保持政策连续性、稳定性 常态化开展政策预研储备——国家发展改革委解读当前经济形势

  新华社记者魏玉坤、张晓洁

  上半年中国经济运行态势如何？下半年宏观调控政策如何发力？针对当前经济形势和经济工作，国家发展改革委1日举行新闻发布会，国家发展改革委有关负责人进行了分析解读。

  上半年我国经济稳中有进、好于预期

  国家发展改革委国民经济综合司司长周陈表示，上半年我国经济稳中有进、好于预期，高质量发展取得新成效。

  主要宏观指标表现良好，经济运行彰显强大韧性。上半年，国内生产总值（GDP）同比增长5.3%，就业、物价和居民收入总体稳定。内需对经济增长的贡献率达68.8%，进出口规模站上20万亿元台阶。

  “关于下一步经济工作，7月30日召开的中央政治局会议已作出全面部署，国家发展改革委将坚决抓好贯彻落实。”周陈说。

  周陈表示，一方面，持续发力、适时加力实施好已部署的各项政策举措，坚定不移实施扩大内需战略，特别是继续推动稳就业稳经济若干举措陆续出台实施，保持政策连续性、稳定性，增强灵活性、预见性，将外部压力转化为内生动力，稳住经济大盘。另一方面，加强经济监测预测预警，常态化开展政策预研储备，不断完善稳就业扩内需政策工具箱，根据外部环境变化及时推出，统筹今明两年政策衔接、工作衔接，着力稳就业、稳企业、稳市场、稳预期。

  纵深推进全国统一大市场建设

  建设全国统一大市场，是党中央作出的重大决策。

  国家发展改革委体制改革综合司司长王任飞表示，近年来，全国统一大市场建设取得积极成效：一是“四梁八柱”基本建立，市场基础制度逐步健全，市场基础设施持续完善。二是社会共识明显增强，公平竞争理念深入人心。三是建设效果不断彰显。今年上半年，全国跨省区交易电量同比增长18.2%。1至4月，全国省际贸易销售额占全部销售收入比重为40.4%，较上年同期提高0.6个百分点。

  王任飞说，国家发展改革委将发挥好牵头部门作用，研究制定纵深推进全国统一大市场建设行动方案。进一步规范政府行为尺度，制定《妨碍统一市场和公平竞争行为防范事项清单》。深化要素市场化配置改革，扎实开展市场准入壁垒清理整治行动。

  持续做好扩消费工作

  消费是经济增长的“主引擎”，也是民生幸福的“晴雨表”。

  周陈表示，上半年消费有三个主要特点：一是增速加快，社会消费品零售总额累计增长5%，增速较一季度提高0.4个百分点；二是亮点增多，限额以上家电、通讯器材零售额同比增长30.7%、24.1%，新能源汽车销量同比增长40.3%；三是环境更优，各部门围绕落实提振消费专项行动，出台了多项重大政策，举办形式多样的促消费活动。

  “消费持续健康发展是供需双向奔赴的结果。”周陈说，下一步，将着力推动增强消费能力，加快落实稳就业稳经济推动高质量发展若干举措，促进居民收入稳步提升。培育服务消费新的增长点，落实《提振消费专项行动方案》部署，推动地方有序减少消费限制。持续优化消费供给，积极培育国货“潮品”，大力发展“人工智能+”消费，加力创新应用场景。

  全国电力供应平稳有序

  近期，各地气温攀升，能源保供工作进入迎峰度夏的关键期。国家发展改革委政策研究室主任、新闻发言人蒋毅表示，目前全国电力供应平稳有序，各地用电需求得到较好保障。

  据介绍，下一步，国家发展改革委将充分发挥煤电油气运保障工作部际协调机制作用，主要做好以下五方面工作：

  一是保障源头供应。指导各地做好电煤产运需衔接和发电用气协调，保障一次能源供应充足稳定。二是提升顶峰能力。持续加强各类常规电源运行管理，统筹新能源发电支撑作用和火电兜底保障作用。三是加强余缺互济。积极通过电力中长期合同、现货市场、应急调度等方式开展跨省跨区电力调度。四是优化需求侧管理。综合运用分时电价、需求响应补贴等方式，保障电网安全稳定运行和电力有序供应。五是强化应急处置。紧盯重大自然灾害和突发事件，第一时间组织电力企业高效开展应急处置和抢修复电工作。

  加快推动标志性改革举措落地见效

  推动高质量发展、构建新发展格局，必须要进一步全面深化改革，向改革要动力，以改革激活力。

  王任飞表示，为更好推动改革和发展深度融合、高效联动，将加快推动一些标志性改革举措落地见效：

  一是紧扣扩内需稳经济深化改革。推动出台实施促进服务消费、首发经济、数字消费等举措，健全政府投资有效带动社会投资体制机制，研究促进民间投资发展的政策举措。

  二是紧扣破解经济运行中的突出矛盾深化改革。统一政府行为尺度，进一步明确招商引资鼓励和禁止的具体行为，治理和防范有碍统一市场和公平竞争的各种行为和做法，依法依规整治企业无序竞争。

  三是紧扣培育发展新动能深化改革。优化新业态新领域市场准入环境，加快制定一批放宽市场准入特别措施，出台培育和开放新场景的政策举措。推动要素市场化配置综合改革试点，深入探索数据等新型要素确权和参与分配的实现路径，促进各类生产要素顺畅流动、高效配置。
english_translation:
On August 1, the National Development and Reform Commission held a press conference in Beijing to interpret the current economic situation and economic work. (Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Chen Yehua)

  Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, August 1st : Maintaining policy continuity and stability and conducting regular policy pre-research and reserve - National Development and Reform Commission interprets the current economic situation

  Xinhua News Agency reporters Wei Yukun and Zhang Xiaojie

  What was the performance of China's economy in the first half of the year? How will macroeconomic control policies be implemented in the second half of the year? Regarding the current economic situation and economic work, the National Development and Reform Commission held a press conference on the 1st, where relevant officials from the NDRC provided analysis and interpretation.

  my country's economy maintained steady progress in the first half of the year, exceeding expectations

  Zhou Chen, director of the Comprehensive Department of National Economy of the National Development and Reform Commission, said that my country's economy maintained steady progress in the first half of the year, better than expected, and achieved new results in high-quality development.

  Key macroeconomic indicators performed well, demonstrating strong economic resilience. In the first half of the year, gross domestic product (GDP) grew by 5.3% year-on-year, with employment, prices, and household income generally stable. Domestic demand contributed 68.8% to economic growth, and import and export volumes exceeded 20 trillion yuan.

  "Regarding the next step of economic work, the Political Bureau of the Central Committee held a meeting on July 30 and made comprehensive arrangements. The National Development and Reform Commission will resolutely implement them," Zhou Chen said.

  Zhou Chen stated that, on the one hand, we will continue to exert efforts and timely strengthen the implementation of all deployed policy measures, unswervingly implement the strategy of expanding domestic demand, and especially continue to promote the implementation of a number of measures to stabilize employment and the economy. We will maintain policy continuity and stability, enhance flexibility and foresight, transform external pressure into internal driving force, and stabilize the overall economy. On the other hand, we will strengthen economic monitoring, forecasting, and early warning, regularly conduct policy pre-research and preparation, continuously improve the policy toolbox for stabilizing employment and expanding domestic demand, and timely introduce them according to changes in the external environment. We will coordinate the policy and work coordination between this year and next year, focusing on stabilizing employment, enterprises, the market, and expectations.

  Deepen the construction of a unified national market

  Building a unified national market is a major decision made by the Party Central Committee.

  Wang Renfei, Director of the Comprehensive Department of Institutional Reform at the National Development and Reform Commission, stated that in recent years, the development of a unified national market has achieved positive results: First, the "four pillars and eight pillars" have been basically established, with the basic market institutions gradually being improved and the market infrastructure continuously being enhanced. Second, social consensus has been significantly strengthened, and the concept of fair competition has taken root in the hearts of the people. Third, the effectiveness of the development is continuously evident. In the first half of this year, inter-provincial electricity transactions nationwide increased by 18.2% year-on-year. From January to April, inter-provincial trade sales accounted for 40.4% of total sales revenue, an increase of 0.6 percentage points over the same period last year.

  Wang Renfei stated that the National Development and Reform Commission will play a leading role in researching and formulating an action plan to further advance the construction of a unified national market. This will further standardize government behavior and formulate a "List of Preventative Measures for Behaviors that Hinder the Unified Market and Fair Competition." The reform of market-based allocation of factors will be deepened, and efforts will be made to clean up and rectify market access barriers.

  Continue to do a good job in expanding consumption

  Consumption is the "main engine" of economic growth and the "barometer" of people's livelihood and well-being.

  Zhou Chen said that consumption in the first half of the year had three main characteristics: first, the growth rate accelerated, with the total retail sales of consumer goods increasing by 5%, an increase of 0.4 percentage points from the first quarter; second, there were more highlights, with the retail sales of household appliances and communication equipment above the quota increasing by 30.7% and 24.1% year-on-year, and the sales of new energy vehicles increasing by 40.3% year-on-year; third, the environment was better, with various departments issuing a number of major policies and holding various forms of consumption promotion activities around the implementation of special actions to boost consumption.

  "The sustained and healthy growth of consumption is the result of a two-way convergence of supply and demand." Zhou Chen stated that the next step will be to focus on enhancing consumer spending, accelerating the implementation of measures to stabilize employment, stabilize the economy, and promote high-quality development, thereby steadily increasing residents' incomes. New growth areas for service consumption will be cultivated, the "Special Action Plan to Boost Consumption" will be implemented, and local governments will be encouraged to orderly reduce consumption restrictions. Consumption supply will be continuously optimized, with the cultivation of trendy domestic products, the development of "AI+" consumption, and the intensification of innovative application scenarios.

  The national power supply is stable and orderly

  With temperatures rising across the country recently, ensuring energy supply has entered a critical period of peak summer demand. Jiang Yi, Director of the Policy Research Office and spokesperson for the National Development and Reform Commission, stated that the national power supply is currently stable and orderly, and electricity demand in all regions is well met.

  According to reports, the National Development and Reform Commission will give full play to the role of the inter-ministerial coordination mechanism for coal, electricity, oil, gas and transportation security work in the next step, and focus on the following five aspects:

  First, ensure supply at the source. Guide local governments to ensure effective coordination between coal production, transportation, and demand, and gas consumption for power generation, to ensure an adequate and stable supply of primary energy. Second, enhance peak capacity. Continue to strengthen the operational management of all types of conventional power sources, coordinating the supporting role of renewable energy generation and the backup role of thermal power. Third, strengthen the coordination of surpluses and shortages. Actively implement cross-provincial and cross-regional power dispatch through medium- and long-term power contracts, the spot market, and emergency dispatch. Fourth, optimize demand-side management. Comprehensively utilize time-of-use electricity pricing, demand response subsidies, and other methods to ensure the safe and stable operation of the power grid and the orderly supply of electricity. Fifth, strengthen emergency response. Keep a close eye on major natural disasters and emergencies, and promptly organize power companies to efficiently carry out emergency response and power restoration work.

  Accelerate the implementation of landmark reform measures

  To promote high-quality development and build a new development pattern, we must further deepen reform in an all-round way, seek momentum from reform, and stimulate vitality through reform.

  Wang Renfei stated that in order to better promote the deep integration and efficient linkage of reform and development, some landmark reform measures will be accelerated to achieve results:

  First, we will deepen reforms closely focused on expanding domestic demand and stabilizing the economy. We will promote the implementation of measures to boost service consumption, the initial public offering economy, and digital consumption, improve the system and mechanism for government investment to effectively drive social investment, and study policy measures to promote the development of private investment.

  Second, we will deepen reforms focused on resolving prominent contradictions in economic operations. We will unify the standards for government behavior, further clarify specific behaviors that are encouraged and prohibited in attracting investment, address and prevent various behaviors and practices that hinder a unified market and fair competition, and regulate disorderly competition among enterprises in accordance with laws and regulations.

  Third, we will deepen reform with a focus on fostering new drivers of development. We will optimize the market access environment for new business formats and sectors, accelerate the formulation of a series of special measures to ease market access, and introduce policy measures to foster and open up new scenarios. We will promote pilot programs for comprehensive reform of the market-based allocation of factors, explore in-depth pathways for confirming ownership and participating in the distribution of new factors such as data, and promote the smooth flow and efficient allocation of various production factors.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The term "发力" (fālì) in "宏观调控政策如何发力" is translated as "how will...policies be implemented." This is too passive. A better translation like "how will...policies be strengthened" or "how will...policies ramp up efforts" would more accurately capture the original's dynamic sense of exerting force or taking stronger action.
2. The phrase "稳中有进" (wěn zhōng yǒu jìn) is a key concept translated as "maintained steady progress." A more nuanced rendering would be "advanced amidst stability," which better conveys the dual achievement of making progress while simultaneously ensuring stability, a core tenet of the policy statement.
3. The translation of "限额以上" (xiàn'é yǐshàng) as "above the quota" is a significant error. This is a specific statistical term in China referring to "above-designated-size" enterprises. The translation should be corrected to "by above-designated-size retailers" to be accurate.
4. The term "首发经济" (shǒufā jīngjì) is incorrectly translated as "the initial public offering economy." The term "首发" (shǒufā) refers to 'first launch' or 'debut.' The correct translation should be the "debut economy" or "first-launch economy," which relates to brands opening their first stores or launching new products in a region.
5. The term "整治" (zhěngzhì) in "整治企业无序竞争" is translated as "regulate." This translation is too weak. "整治" implies a much stronger action, such as "to rectify," "to crack down on," or "to overhaul," indicating a more forceful intervention against disorderly competition.
6. The expression "落地见效" (luòdì jiànxiào), translated as "implementation," only captures the first half of the meaning ("落地" - to land/be implemented). The second half, "见效" (to see effects), is lost. A more complete translation would be "be implemented and deliver tangible results" to reflect the focus on achieving concrete outcomes.
7. The idiom "四梁八柱" (sì liáng bā zhù), an architectural metaphor for a foundational structure, is literally translated as "'four pillars and eight pillars'". This is awkward in English. A more natural and effective translation would be "the foundational framework" or "the core architecture."
8. The word "尺度" (chǐdù) in "规范政府行为尺度" (standardize government behavior) is insufficiently translated. "尺度" refers to scope, parameters, or limits. A more precise translation would be "standardize the parameters of government conduct" or "regulate the scope of government actions."
9. The phrase "双向奔赴" (shuāngxiàng bēnfù) is translated as "a two-way convergence." This is technically adequate but loses the modern, dynamic, and enthusiastic connotation of the original, which literally means "a two-way rush to meet each other." A more evocative translation might be "a dynamic meeting of supply and demand" or "supply and demand enthusiastically meeting each other."
10. The term "兜底保障" (dōudǐ bǎozhàng) is translated as "backup role." While functional, this misses the nuance of providing a definitive safety net. "Fail-safe role" or "role as a fundamental backstop" would better capture the meaning of providing an ultimate, bottom-line guarantee.
11. The translation of "国货‘潮品’" (guóhuò 'cháopǐn') as "trendy domestic products" is correct but lacks cultural depth. A more insightful translation could be "'Guochao' (National Trend) products" or "fashionable domestic brands," which alludes to the specific and popular 'Guochao' consumer trend in China.
12. The term "抢修" (qiǎngxiū) is translated simply as part of "power restoration work." This omits the sense of urgency inherent in "抢" (qiǎng), which means to rush or scramble. A better translation would be "emergency repair and power restoration work" to convey this urgency.
13. The phrase "向改革要动力，以改革激活力" is translated well, but the tone of official Chinese pronouncements often carries a prescriptive force. Translating it as "we must seek momentum from reform and stimulate vitality through reform" would better reflect this authoritative tone common in policy documents.
14. The term "顶峰能力" (dǐngfēng nénglì) is translated as "peak capacity," which could be ambiguous (e.g., total generation capacity). A more precise technical term would be "peak-shaving capability" or "peak demand management capacity," which specifically refers to the ability to manage and meet the highest points of electricity demand.

original_text:
7月28日，国务院新闻办公室举行“高质量完成‘十四五’规划”系列主题新闻发布会，国家税务总局局长胡静林，税务总局副局长王道树，税务总局副局长蔡自力，税务总局总经济师兼新闻发言人荣海楼介绍“十四五”时期税收改革与发展有关情况，并答记者问。



  新华社记者 陈晔华 摄

  ■“十四五”时期，我国经济平稳增长，税务部门累计征收的税费收入预计将超155万亿元，占全口径财政收入的比重已达80%左右。经济社会发展和民生改善的财力基础不断夯实。


  ■“十四五”期间，全国累计新增减税降费预计10.5万亿元，办理出口退税预计超9万亿元。


  ■2024年个税汇算中享受专项附加扣除的人数达1.19亿人，较2020年初次汇算增长55%，减税金额增长156.5%，由2020年的1160亿元增加到今年近3000亿元。


  ■从税务登记数据看，截至今年6月底，全国涉税经营主体已突破1亿户，比2020年底净增加3000万户，显示出我国市场活力足、韧性强。


  ■今年1月至6月，国内离境退税商店数量成倍增加，已超过7200家，享受退税人数同比增长186%，退税商品销售额及退税金额同比分别增长94.6%和93.2%，境外旅客“中国游”热度持续提升。


  ■2024年度，有超过1亿的纳税人依法申请退税1300多亿元，也有700多万纳税人自行依法申报补税480余亿元。这一退一补中，体现了我国新个税制度带来的法治规范与公平。


  综合新华社记者报道

  新华社音视频部制作
english_translation:
On July 28, the State Council Information Office held a series of press conferences on the theme of "High-quality Completion of the 14th Five-Year Plan". Hu Jinglin, Director of the State Administration of Taxation, Wang Daoshu, Deputy Director of the State Administration of Taxation, Cai Zilii, Deputy Director of the State Administration of Taxation, and Rong Hailou, Chief Economist and Spokesperson of the State Administration of Taxation, introduced the relevant situation of tax reform and development during the "14th Five-Year Plan" period and answered questions from reporters.



  Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Chen Yehua

  During the 14th Five-Year Plan period, my country's economy will maintain steady growth, and the tax authorities are expected to collect over 15.5 trillion yuan in tax revenue, accounting for approximately 80% of total fiscal revenue. This will strengthen the financial foundation for economic and social development and improvements in people's livelihoods.


  ■During the 14th Five-Year Plan period, the country's cumulative new tax and fee reductions are expected to reach 10.5 trillion yuan, and export tax rebates are expected to exceed 9 trillion yuan.


  ■The number of people who enjoyed special additional deductions in the 2024 personal income tax reconciliation reached 119 million, an increase of 55% from the initial reconciliation in 2020, and the amount of tax reduction increased by 156.5%, from 116 billion yuan in 2020 to nearly 300 billion yuan this year.


  ■According to tax registration data, as of the end of June this year, the number of tax-related business entities nationwide has exceeded 100 million, a net increase of 30 million from the end of 2020, showing that my country's market is full of vitality and strong resilience.


  ■From January to June this year, the number of domestic departure tax refund shops has doubled to more than 7,200. The number of people enjoying tax refunds has increased by 186% year-on-year, and the sales volume of tax-refundable goods and the amount of tax refunds have increased by 94.6% and 93.2% year-on-year respectively. The enthusiasm of overseas tourists for "travel to China" continues to increase.


  In 2024, over 100 million taxpayers applied for tax refunds exceeding 130 billion yuan, while over 7 million taxpayers voluntarily declared and paid back over 48 billion yuan in taxes. This combination of refunds and supplements demonstrates the rule of law and fairness brought about by my country's new individual income tax system.
translation_improvement_points:
1. A significant numerical error exists in the translation. The original text states "155万亿元" (155 wàn yì yuán), which correctly translates to 155 trillion yuan. The provided translation incorrectly states "15.5 trillion yuan", understating the figure by a factor of ten.
2. The Chinese term "税费" (shuì fèi) explicitly means "taxes and fees". In the first bullet point, it is translated simply as "tax revenue", losing the distinction. In the second bullet point, it is correctly translated as "tax and fee reductions". For accuracy and consistency, the first instance should also be rendered as "taxes and fees".
3. The translation of "不断夯实" (bùduàn hāngshí) as "will strengthen" is weak. The verb "夯实" (hāngshí) implies a more forceful action of consolidating or solidifying a foundation. The adverb "不断" (bùduàn) indicates a continuous, ongoing process. A more faithful translation would be "has been continuously consolidated" or "is being steadily solidified", which also corrects the future tense used in the translation to a present perfect progressive, better reflecting an achievement of the ongoing Five-Year Plan.
4. The phrase "成倍增加" (chéngbèi zēngjiā), referring to the number of tax refund shops, is translated as "has doubled". This is an overly specific interpretation. The original Chinese term means "to multiply" or "increase several-fold" without specifying the exact multiple. A more accurate translation would be "has multiplied" or "has increased several-fold".
5. The phrase "这一退一补中" (zhè yí tuì yí bǔ zhōng) employs a concise and powerful parallel structure, literally "in this one refund, one supplement". The translation "This combination of refunds and supplements" is functional but loses the rhetorical elegance and the sense of a direct, balanced dynamic. A more nuanced rendering would be "This interplay of refunds and supplemental payments" or "This dynamic of tax refunds and back-payments".
6. The term "法治规范" (fǎzhì guīfàn) is partially translated as "rule of law". This captures "法治" (fǎzhì) but omits the crucial meaning of "规范" (guīfàn), which refers to norms, standards, or regulation. A more complete and accurate translation would be "the legal standardization and fairness" or "the norms of the rule of law and fairness" to convey the full concept of a regulated, orderly, and fair system.
7. The term "全口径" (quán kǒujìng) is a specific financial term meaning "comprehensive" or "all-encompassing". While translating it as "total" in "total fiscal revenue" is acceptable, using "comprehensive fiscal revenue" would be more precise and would preserve the technical specificity of the original language used in official reports.
8. The translation of "涉税经营主体" (shèshuì jīngyíng zhǔtǐ) as "tax-related business entities" is a literal but slightly awkward rendering in English. A more natural and professional-sounding equivalent would be "tax-registered business entities" or "taxpaying entities".
9. The colloquial term "“中国游”" (Zhōngguó yóu), literally "China travel", is translated as "'travel to China'". Placing the phrase in quotes in the English text is stylistically clumsy. A smoother integration would be "the popularity of traveling in China" or "the enthusiasm for 'China tours'", which better captures the sense of a popular concept without awkward punctuation.

original_text:
新华社北京8月4日电（记者刘开雄）记者4日从国家税务总局了解到，从增值税发票数据看，今年上半年，全国企业销售收入保持平稳增长。

  增值税发票数据显示，上半年，制造业销售收入增速较全国企业总体销售收入增速快1.5个百分点，是稳定经济增长的重要支撑。制造业“高端化”稳步推进。上半年，装备制造业、高技术制造业销售收入同比分别增长8.9%和11.9%。

  同期，新质生产力加快培育。上半年，高技术产业销售收入同比增长14.3%，保持快速增长。上半年，数字经济核心产业销售收入同比增长10.1%，全国企业采购数字技术金额同比增长9.9%，反映出数字产业化、产业数字化进程持续加快。

  此外，在大规模设备更新政策带动下，上半年，全国企业采购机械设备金额同比增长11.1%，延续去年以来较快增长势头。随着消费品以旧换新系列政策持续显效，居民消费需求加快释放。上半年，电视机等家用视听设备零售、冰箱等日用家电零售同比分别增长45.3%和56.6%；与家装相关的家具零售同比增长34%；新扩围的手机等通信设备零售同比增长25.4%。

  值得注意的是，上半年，全国省际间销售额占全国企业销售收入比重为40.7%，较上年同期提高0.6个百分点，反映省际间贸易联系持续加深，全国统一大市场建设稳步推进。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, August 4 (Reporter Liu Kaixiong) The reporter learned from the State Administration of Taxation on the 4th that judging from the value-added tax invoice data, the sales revenue of enterprises across the country maintained steady growth in the first half of this year.

  VAT invoice data shows that in the first half of the year, sales revenue in the manufacturing sector grew 1.5 percentage points faster than the national overall sales revenue, providing a key support for stabilizing economic growth. The "high-end" manufacturing sector is steadily progressing. In the first half of the year, sales revenue in the equipment manufacturing and high-tech manufacturing sectors increased by 8.9% and 11.9% year-on-year, respectively.

  During the same period, the cultivation of new-quality productive forces accelerated. In the first half of the year, sales revenue of high-tech industries increased by 14.3% year-on-year, maintaining rapid growth. In the first half of the year, sales revenue of core digital economy industries increased by 10.1% year-on-year, and the amount of digital technology purchased by enterprises nationwide increased by 9.9% year-on-year, reflecting the continued acceleration of the digital industrialization and industrial digitization.

  Furthermore, driven by large-scale equipment replacement policies, the value of machinery and equipment purchased by businesses nationwide increased by 11.1% year-on-year in the first half of the year, continuing the rapid growth momentum seen since last year. With the continued effectiveness of the consumer goods trade-in policy, consumer demand is accelerating. In the first half of the year, retail sales of home audio-visual equipment such as televisions and household appliances such as refrigerators increased by 45.3% and 56.6% year-on-year, respectively. Retail sales of home furnishing-related furniture increased by 34% year-on-year. Retail sales of newly expanded mobile phones and other communications equipment increased by 25.4% year-on-year.

  It is worth noting that in the first half of the year, inter-provincial sales accounted for 40.7% of the national corporate sales revenue, an increase of 0.6 percentage points from the same period last year, reflecting the continued deepening of inter-provincial trade ties and the steady progress of the construction of a unified national market.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The phrase "制造业‘高端化’稳步推进" (zhìzàoyè ‘gāoduānhuà’ wěnbù tuījìn) is translated as "The 'high-end' manufacturing sector is steadily progressing." This phrasing is slightly awkward as it suggests a specific sector rather than a process. A more precise translation like "The high-end transformation of the manufacturing sector is progressing steadily" or "The push towards high-end manufacturing is steadily advancing" would better capture the nuance of "高端化" (gāoduānhuà) as an ongoing process of upgrading.
2. The term "新质生产力" (xīn zhì shēngchǎnlì), translated as "new-quality productive forces," is a key term in Chinese economic policy. While the translation is standard, its meaning can be opaque. A refined translation could be enhanced with a brief, non-intrusive clarification for clarity, such as "new, quality-driven productive forces," to better convey the emphasis on innovation and high-tech development inherent in the original concept.
3. The phrase "全国企业采购数字技术金额" (quánguó qǐyè cǎigòu shùzì jìshù jīn'é) is rendered as "the amount of digital technology purchased by enterprises nationwide." This is functional but clunky. A more natural and professional phrasing would be "nationwide enterprise spending on digital technology" or "the value of digital technology procured by enterprises nationwide."
4. For "大规模设备更新政策" (dà guīmó shèbèi gēngxīn zhèngcè), the translation "large-scale equipment replacement policies" is slightly narrow. The word "更新" (gēngxīn) encompasses both "upgrading" and "replacement." A more comprehensive translation would be "large-scale equipment upgrade and replacement policies."
5. The phrase "消费品以旧换新系列政策持续显效" (xiāofèipǐn yǐ jiù huàn xīn xìliè zhèngcè chíxù xiǎnxiào) is translated as "With the continued effectiveness of the consumer goods trade-in policy." This loses two nuances: "系列" (xìliè) means a "series" of policies, not a single one, and "显效" (xiǎnxiào) implies that the policies are actively yielding tangible results. A better translation would be "As the series of consumer goods trade-in policies continue to yield clear results..."
6. The translation of "居民消费需求加快释放" (jūmín xiāofèi xūqiú jiākuài shìfàng) as "consumer demand is accelerating" is too generic. It misses the dynamic nature of "释放" (shìfàng), which means "to release" or "unleash." A more vivid and accurate translation would be "the release of consumer demand is accelerating" or "consumer demand is being unleashed at a faster pace."
7. The clause "与家装相关的家具零售" (yǔ jiāzhuāng xiāngguān de jiājù língshòu) is translated as "Retail sales of home furnishing-related furniture." This is syntactically awkward. A smoother, more idiomatic rendering would be "retail sales of furniture related to home decoration" or more concisely, "retail sales in home furnishings."
8. The phrase "新扩围的手机等通信设备" (xīn kuòwéi de shǒujī děng tōngxìn shèbèi) is translated as "newly expanded mobile phones and other communications equipment," which is ambiguous and could imply the phones themselves were expanded. "新扩围的" refers to items newly added to the scope of the trade-in policy. A much clearer translation would be "retail sales of items newly included in the policy, such as mobile phones and other communication devices."

original_text:
新华社联合国7月24日电 中国常驻联合国代表傅聪24日在联合国安理会关于联合国同伊斯兰合作组织合作问题公开会上发言，驳斥美国代表涉疆谎言。

  傅聪说，中方对美国代表就涉疆问题的无端指责表示坚决反对、完全拒绝。当前新疆社会稳定、经济繁荣发展、人民安居乐业，正处于历史上最好的发展时期。美国处心积虑炒作涉疆议题，妄图干涉中国内政、遏制中国发展，其霸权本质、“双标”嘴脸暴露无遗。

  傅聪指出，过去6年，包括广大伊斯兰国家在内的上百个国家在联大第三委员会以不同方式表态，支持中方正义立场，明确反对将人权问题政治化，反对以人权为借口干涉别国内政。这充分表明，美国“以疆制华”的图谋早已破产，借反华遏华挑起阵营对抗的险恶用心已完全失败。

  傅聪还说，美国如果真的关心穆斯林的人权，为何对加沙的人间炼狱置若罔闻？为何对巴勒斯坦人民的历史不公视若无睹？美国对国内枪支暴力、种族歧视等痼疾视而不见，不顾国民人权和尊严遭到践踏，却打着人权幌子，肆意干涉别国内政，侵犯了大量发展中国家人民的人权。中方奉劝美国反躬自省、改弦更张，多为维护国际和平与安全做些好事实事。
english_translation:
Xinhua News Agency, United Nations, July 24: China's Permanent Representative to the United Nations Fu Cong spoke at an open meeting of the UN Security Council on cooperation between the United Nations and the Organization of Islamic Cooperation on the 24th, refuting the lies of the US representative about Xinjiang.

  Fu Cong stated that China firmly opposes and completely rejects the groundless accusations made by the US representative regarding Xinjiang. Xinjiang is currently experiencing the best period of development in its history, with social stability, economic prosperity, and people living and working in peace and contentment. The US is deliberately hyping up issues related to Xinjiang in an attempt to interfere in China's internal affairs and curb its development, fully exposing its hegemonic nature and double standards.

  Fu Cong pointed out that over the past six years, hundreds of countries, including many Islamic nations, have expressed their support for China's just position in various ways at the UN General Assembly's Third Committee, clearly opposing the politicization of human rights issues and interference in other countries' internal affairs under the pretext of human rights. This fully demonstrates that the US's attempt to "use Xinjiang to contain China" has long since failed, and its sinister intention to provoke confrontation between camps by using anti-China sentiment to contain China has completely failed.

  Fu Cong also asked, "If the United States truly cares about the human rights of Muslims, why does it turn a blind eye to the living hell in Gaza? Why does it turn a blind eye to the historical injustices against the Palestinian people?" The United States has turned a blind eye to chronic problems such as gun violence and racial discrimination at home, disregarding the trampling of its citizens' human rights and dignity. Yet, under the guise of human rights, it has wantonly interfered in the internal affairs of other countries, violating the human rights of countless people in developing countries. China urges the United States to reflect on itself, change its course, and do more good deeds to maintain international peace and security.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The term "驳斥" (bóchì) is translated as "refuting." A more forceful translation like "forcefully refuted" or "rebuked" would better capture the original's strong, confrontational tone in this diplomatic context.
2. The phrase "处心积虑" (chǔxīnjīlǜ), translated as "deliberately," loses its strong negative connotation of long-term, malicious plotting. A more accurate rendering would be "meticulously scheming" or "has gone to great lengths to plot."
3. The word "妄图" (wàngtú) is translated as "in an attempt to." This is too neutral. The original implies an arrogant and futile effort. A better translation is "in a vain attempt to" or "futilely attempting to," which captures the dismissive tone.
4. The expression "“双标”嘴脸" (shuāngbiāo zuǐliǎn) is rendered as "double standards." This translation misses the visceral contempt conveyed by "嘴脸" (zuǐliǎn), which literally means "face" but is used to mean an ugly or despicable look. A more faithful translation would be "its ugly face of double standards" or "its hypocritical double standards."
5. The term "图谋" (túmóu), translated as "attempt," understates the original meaning. "Plot" or "scheme" would be more accurate, reflecting the clandestine and negative nature of the action implied by the Chinese word.
6. The idiom "早已破产" (zǎoyǐ pòchǎn), meaning "has long since failed," loses the power of the original metaphor. The term literally means "has long been bankrupt," a common phrase in Chinese political discourse to signify the complete and utter collapse of a plan or ideology. Retaining this metaphor would be more impactful.
7. The original text uses two distinct idioms for ignoring reality: "置若罔闻" (zhìruòwǎngwén - to turn a deaf ear) and "视若无睹" (shìruòwúdǔ - to turn a blind eye). The translation uses "turn a blind eye" for both, losing the rhetorical distinction. Translating them as "turn a deaf ear to the living hell in Gaza" and "turn a blind eye to the historical injustices" would preserve this nuance.
8. The word "痼疾" (gùjí), translated as "chronic problems," is very good, but its combination with "视而不见" (shì'érbújiàn - to look but not see) deserves attention. The translation uses "turned a blind eye" for a third time, which feels repetitive. Using a variant like "ignores" or "remains blind to" for "视而不见" would improve the rhetorical flow.
9. The term "奉劝" (fèngquàn), translated as "urges," is a highly formal term suggesting advice given from a position of moral superiority or seniority. "Advises" or more strongly, "solemnly advises," would better capture this specific diplomatic tone of condescension.
10. The phrase "好事实事" (hǎoshì shíshì) is translated as "good deeds." This simplifies the meaning by omitting the emphasis on tangible action in "实事" (shíshì - practical/concrete matters). A better translation would be "more practical and constructive actions" or "do more good and concrete things" to reflect both the moral and tangible aspects.

original_text:
7月25日上午，国家主席习近平在北京人民大会堂接受16位驻华大使递交国书。这是仪式结束后，习近平在北京厅对使节们发表讲话。新华社记者 谢环驰 摄

　　新华社北京7月25日电（记者邵艺博、曹嘉玥）7月25日上午，国家主席习近平在北京人民大会堂接受16位驻华大使递交国书。

　　人民大会堂北门外，礼兵庄严列队，迎宾号角吹响。使节们相继抵达，穿过旗阵，沿汉白玉台阶拾级而上。

　　在巨幅壁画《江山如此多娇》前，习近平分别接受使节们递交国书，并同他们一一合影。

　　他们是：越南驻华大使范清平、巴拿马驻华大使雷鸣、多米尼加驻华大使戈麦斯、阿尔巴尼亚驻华大使波达、新西兰驻华大使乔文博、巴布亚新几内亚驻华大使卡姆巴内、安哥拉驻华大使艾伦、埃及驻华大使纳兹米、尼加拉瓜驻华大使孔乐然、伊朗驻华大使法兹里、智利驻华大使阿里亚兰、乌克兰驻华大使涅奇塔伊洛、贝宁驻华大使阿贾巴、美国驻华大使庞德伟、以色列驻华大使贝以理、南苏丹驻华大使莫里斯。习近平还接见了上海合作组织秘书长叶尔梅克巴耶夫。



  7月25日上午，国家主席习近平在北京人民大会堂接受16位驻华大使递交国书。这是仪式结束后，习近平在北京厅对使节们发表讲话。新华社记者 李响 摄

　　仪式结束后，习近平在北京厅对使节们发表讲话。

　　习近平欢迎使节们来华履新，请他们转达对各自国家领导人和人民的良好祝愿，希望使节们全面、深入了解中国，为深化中国同各国友谊、增进中国同世界交往作出积极贡献。

　　习近平指出，中国始终珍视同世界各国人民的友好情谊，愿在相互尊重、平等相待、互利共赢的基础上同各国开展全方位合作，加强各领域交流。当前，中国正以中国式现代化全面推进强国建设、民族复兴伟业，经济持续稳中向好。中国将坚定不移扩大高水平对外开放，释放超大规模市场红利，让中国新发展成为各国的新机遇，为世界经济增长注入更多确定性。

　　习近平强调，面对加速演进的世界百年变局和变乱交织的国际形势，各国比以往任何时候都更加需要团结合作，以宽广胸襟超越隔阂冲突，以博大情怀关照人类命运。今年是中国人民抗日战争暨世界反法西斯战争胜利80周年，也是联合国成立80周年。中国愿同各国一道，坚定维护以联合国为核心的国际体系和以国际法为基础的国际秩序，做友好合作的践行者、文明互鉴的推动者、人类命运共同体的构建者，携手开创这个星球更加美好的未来。

　　王毅参加上述活动.
english_translation:
On the morning of July 25, President Xi Jinping received credentials from 16 ambassadors to China at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. This is Xi Jinping's speech to the envoys in the Beijing Hall after the ceremony. ( Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Xie Huanchi)

　　Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, July 25 (Reporters Shao Yibo and Cao Jiayue) On the morning of July 25, President Xi Jinping accepted the credentials of 16 ambassadors to China at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing.

　　Outside the north gate of the Great Hall of the People, honor guards lined up solemnly and welcoming horns blew. The envoys arrived one after another, passing through the array of flags and ascending the white marble steps.

　　In front of the huge mural "Such a Beautiful Countryside", Xi Jinping accepted the credentials of the envoys and took photos with them one by one.

　　They are: Vietnamese Ambassador to China Pham Thanh Binh, Panamanian Ambassador to China Lei Ming, Dominican Ambassador to China Gomez, Albanian Ambassador to China Boda, New Zealand Ambassador to China Jovan Bo, Papua New Guinean Ambassador to China Kambane, Angolan Ambassador to China Allen, Egyptian Ambassador to China Nazmi, Nicaraguan Ambassador to China Kong Leran, Iranian Ambassador to China Fazli, Chilean Ambassador to China Ariyaran, Ukrainian Ambassador to China Nechitaylo, Benin Ambassador to China Ajaba, US Ambassador to China Bondevich, Israeli Ambassador to China Yili Bei, and South Sudanese Ambassador to China Morris. Xi Jinping also met with Shanghai Cooperation Organization Secretary-General Yermekbayev.



  On the morning of July 25, President Xi Jinping received the credentials of 16 ambassadors to China at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. This is Xi Jinping's speech to the envoys in the Beijing Hall after the ceremony. ( Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Li Xiang)

　　After the ceremony, Xi Jinping delivered a speech to the envoys in the Beijing Hall.

　　Xi Jinping welcomed the envoys to China to assume their new posts and asked them to convey his best wishes to the leaders and people of their respective countries. He hoped that the envoys would have a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of China and make positive contributions to deepening China's friendship with other countries and enhancing China's exchanges with the world.

　　Xi Jinping pointed out that China always cherishes its friendship with the people of all countries in the world and is willing to carry out all-round cooperation with all countries and strengthen exchanges in various fields on the basis of mutual respect, equality, mutual benefit and win-win results. Currently, China is comprehensively advancing the great cause of building a strong country and national rejuvenation through Chinese-style modernization, and its economy continues to maintain steady growth. China will unswervingly expand high-level opening up, unleash the dividends of its super-large market, and make China's new development a new opportunity for all countries, injecting more certainty into global economic growth.

　　Xi Jinping emphasized that faced with the accelerating global transformations of a century and the intertwined international landscape of change and turmoil, countries need unity and cooperation more than ever before, transcending divisions and conflicts with a broad mind, and caring for the destiny of humanity with a broad heart. This year marks the 80th anniversary of the victory of the Chinese People's War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression and the World Anti-Fascist War, as well as the 80th anniversary of the founding of the United Nations. China is willing to work with all countries to firmly uphold the international system with the United Nations at its core and the international order based on international law. China will be a practitioner of friendly cooperation, a promoter of mutual learning among civilizations, and a builder of a community with a shared future for mankind, working together to create a better future for this planet.

　　Wang Yi attended the above activities.
translation_improvement_points:
1. The phrase "沿汉白玉台阶拾级而上" (yán hànbáiyù táijiē shíjī ér shàng) is translated as "ascending the white marble steps." The original Chinese is a highly formal, literary expression that emphasizes a ceremonial, step-by-step ascent. A more nuanced translation like "ascended the white marble staircase step by step" would better capture this formality and deliberate pacing.
2. The name of the mural, "《江山如此多娇》" (Jiāngshān rúcǐ duō jiāo), is translated as "Such a Beautiful Countryside." This is a rather plain rendering of a title from a famous poem by Mao Zedong. A more established and poetic translation is "This Land So Rich in Beauty," which better reflects its cultural and artistic significance.
3. The term "友好情谊" (yǒuhǎo qíngyì) is simplified to "friendship." While related, "情谊" carries a deeper connotation of affection, camaraderie, and established goodwill than the more general "友谊" (friendship). A phrase like "cherished bonds of friendship" or "friendly ties and goodwill" would more fully convey the original's warmth and depth.
4. The phrase "平等相待" (píngděng xiāngdài) is translated as "equality." The original term describes an action or behavior—"treating each other as equals"—rather than just the abstract principle of "equality." Translating it as an active verb phrase would be more faithful to the original's dynamic sense.
